records.englishTranslation:
ORHAN YEGİN (Ankara) - President, thank you.
I respectfully greet everyone in the hall.
There was a lot of talk about soldiers and students who were indisciplined when it came to taking the oath. What we understand from what we read, from what we are told - not from social media, not from here and there - but from what we listen to and hear from the mouths of authorized people is this: Even though these brothers said they wanted to hold such an additional ceremony 7 times and they were told 7 times by their superiors that it would not be appropriate, those brothers, our students, those soldiers, caused such an image.
CAVİT ARI (Antalya) - What did they do?
ORHAN YEGİN (Ankara) - Therefore, the basis of military service is discipline. Mustafa Kemal Atatürk also underlined the importance of discipline in the military. Our Ministry of National Defense is investigating the issue within its own internal mechanisms, an investigation has been opened and it is being examined. Let's leave it to them, in their own media, in accordance with their own procedures, their own laws, their own disciplinary regulations, whatever the essence of this issue is, whatever the truth is. Of course, they are our children, of course our children can make mistakes too. Of course, when our children make a mistake, a sanction can be applied to them or something different can be done depending on the severity, importance and importance of that mistake.
TAHSİN OCAKLI (Rize) - But you're not kicking him out of the house, are you?
ORHAN YEGİN (Ankara) - Let them decide, let them execute. You "'We are Mustafa Kemal's soldiers.' You are doing this to these children just because they said so." By saying this, you are making all kinds of statements aimed at politicizing the issue, diluting it, and wearing down your soldiers, your army, your national combat defense and deterrent power. Don't do it, it's a shame! This army is the army that protects your law. This army, with its Laz, Circassian, Alevi, Sunni, Kurdish, Terekeme, those who pray and those who do not, those who clink glasses and those who do not, "I am a citizen of this country." The army of everyone who says, is an army that respects everyone's law. Please do not speak such shameful and ugly words to your soldiers, your army, your law enforcement officers.
CAVİT ARI (Antalya) - Oh, we are the ones defending the army's rights and laws! You're the one doing the ugly thing! You brought the army to this situation by weakening it.
ORHAN YEGİN (Ankara) - Now, the essence of the matter is this: Recently, CHP's spokesperson came here at the Ministry of Foreign Affairs budget and said: "There is a family of Western states of which we are a member." "The basis of many of the problems we face today stems from the fact that we fight with our organic identity by forgetting which development our republic was founded as an extension of, which front it was established as an extension of, or even denying it, thus exhibiting symptoms of split personality." he said. Friends, Türkiye is not the old Türkiye you want. "I set my sights on the West, I go wherever the West pulls me, I serve whatever the interests of the Western family of states require, I have peace of mind, I feel at ease. I turn my back to the East, I don't care what's happening at my border, what's happening above me. I have the West behind me. Oh, that's how I'll be at ease.

"There is no such world, friends. Today, Turkey is a self-confident country that is an ally of any state with the West when the time comes, but can also show the courage to confront it on another issue in line with its own national interests when the time comes. It derives this self-confidence from many things. It derives this self-confidence from its stable administration, its power, and the People's Alliance.
VELİ AĞBABA (Malatya) - It derives from its stable foreign policy.
ORHAN YEGİN (Ankara) - It comes from the fact that the nation stands behind the theses and policies that it has been behind for more than twenty years. It derives this from the technology and science achieved by its young people. He gets this from the strong power of his army. this,
It derives from its entire nation, its brotherhood, unity and integrity. There is no "division or separation" here. "The government extends its hand when it is Sisi, I don't know, when it is Assad, it extends its arms when it is the Kurds." Leave aside these nonsense, these absurd sentences, and attempts to sow discord within this nation, and leave aside the longing to be a state that supports the West. Have self-confidence with your country. What has this country achieved in twenty years?
TAHSİN OCAKLI (Rize) - You screwed up, Mr. Orhan.
ORHAN YEGİN (Ankara) - What did they try to do to the region? He stood in front of them like a young man.
AYYÜCE TÜRKEŞ TAŞ (Adana) - It has stood for centuries.
ORHAN YEGİN (Ankara) - He ruined all the plans.
TAHSİN OCAKLI (Rize) - You brought the biggest debt in the history of the Republic!
ORHAN YEGİN (Ankara) - Yes, he could not bring everything exactly and perfectly to the point he wanted because he was not the only one who was capable here.
VELİ AĞBABA (Malatya) - Friends, do not interrupt Orhan Bey, he is telling the truth. He challenged Sisi, he stands like a lion in front of Sisi.
ORHAN YEGİN (Ankara) - Ağbaba fought with America here, with France here, with Russia here, with the powerful countries of Europe here.
VELİ AĞBABA (Malatya) - He stands like a lion in front of the Saudi Prince; First he called him "murderer", then he greeted him at the airport with a bang.
ORHAN YEGİN (Ankara) - Brother, brother, look, being against the government is something else.
CHAIRMAN OF THE SESSION ORHAN ERDEM - Dear Ağbaba, please.
ORHAN YEGİN (Ankara) - You are in opposition to your government, you should remain in opposition.
VELİ AĞBABA (Malatya) - He shook hands with Herzog. Well done! We celebrate! Stable foreign policy.
ORHAN YEGİN (Ankara) - We understand that you remain opposed to your government, Tayyip Erdoğan, and the People's Alliance, but you speak hostilely towards your army because you will oppose him.
VELİ AĞBABA (Malatya) - What happened to Sisi, Sisi?
CAVİT ARI (Antalya) - You are the enemy of the army.
TAHSİN OCAKLI (Rize) - We are trying to protect the army from you.
ORHAN YEGİN (Ankara) - He told the army that we would oppose him, "He used chemical weapons." You stand behind the Fincan people who say:
VELİ AĞBABA (Malatya) - Mind your business, your business!
ORHAN YEGİN (Ankara) - Just because we would oppose him, "The army came in pit actions, used chemical weapons, and massacred its neighbors, the Kurds." You stand behind those who insult their army and use treasonous statements and encourage them.
VELİ AĞBABA (Malatya) - Who are you standing behind? Fez, fez.

"I wish Greece had won." You stand next to the one who says.
ORHAN YEGİN (Ankara) - Well, be aware of what situation you are in. Mr. Ağbaba, look, I know you as a person who loves his nation and his country, but the sentences you make always chill the hearts of those who are hostile to your nation and country.
VELİ AĞBABA (Malatya) - Of course, of course! Tell me one sentence.
ORHAN YEGİN (Ankara) - If you love God, leave these things
HEVAL BOZDAĞ (Ağrı) - Mr. President, we have listened to this speech before, this is the 3rd repetition.
ORHAN YEGİN (Ankara) - Friends, now, look, the multicultural structure of Anatolia and Mesopotamia has been ignored. Politics was done with a monist approach and a single sectarian approach. Brother, the only thing we say is this, we say: "Do not divide the state, the nation." We say "one state", "one flag", "one state, one nation". This is the only conceptualization we produce and the framework we use in which we use the term "one". Apart from that, Alevi or Sunni, short or long skirts, nose rings, earrings or no earrings. Oh, we haven't singled anyone out!
AYYÜCE TÜRKEŞ TAŞ (Adana) - He never left! The Republic has not been separated since its founding.
ORHAN YEGİN (Ankara) - We are a policy that has served to provide service to every part of this country, to every segment, to every individual, and to ensure that everyone in this country sees this state as their own state, as the state to take refuge in, as the state that will protect them, and to go to the army, school, hospital and university without any discrimination based on lifestyle, ethnicity or sect!
HÜSEYİN OLAN (Bitlis) - You were the one who marginalized us the most.
ORHAN YEGİN (Ankara) - You make divisive statements and accuse us of being separatist, you are doing a great shame.
And like tough people, we kept saying: "We might come suddenly one night." To whom do we use that expression? We use it against those who fire mortars here from beyond our border, and against those who attempt to kill our people in Kilis and Reyhanlı.
TAHSİN OCAKLI (Rize) - He comes from Syria every night, suddenly one night.
ORHAN YEGİN (Ankara) - We use this for those who want to perform surgery at the borders of the region. We, those who try to divide the maps of Iraq, those who try to establish statelets through organizations in Syria, those who try to become DAESH and establish a state, become YPG-DSG and say "We will establish a state." We say this to those who want to say this, to those who are hostile to this country.
VELİ AĞBABA (Malatya) - With whom are you collaborating?
ORHAN YEGİN (Ankara) - And we do not say this to be rude, we say this to warn them, we say it so that they do not do it, look, if you do it, we will have to come down on you, we say it so that they behave. "Don't do it, we might come suddenly one night." we say.
HÜSEYİN OLAN (Bitlis) - Didn't you say, "We will drop bombs from across the border?" Now you deny it.
ORHAN YEGİN (Ankara) - And when they do, we warn them again: "Look, we may come suddenly one night." we say. America then said, "You can't do it, if you do, I will declare war on you." he says. European Union: "If you do it, I will impose an embargo." he says, "We may come suddenly one night." we say.

We say to those who fall for their words and continue: "Brother, we are a state capable of using our power." we say. And yes, we are leaving suddenly one night. We become the Euphrates Shield, we become the Peace Spring, we go. Why do you feel uncomfortable about this?
VELİ AĞBABA (Malatya) - What did you do against those who martyred our 33 soldiers? You went and stood at the door.
ORHAN YEGİN (Ankara) - Who are you talking to serve here?
VELİ AĞBABA (Malatya) - What did you do against those who martyred our 33 soldiers? Tell me.
CAVİT ARI (Antalya) - He waited at the door in the main stance.
ORHAN YEGİN (Ankara) - Leave these things aside. My brother, stop being hostile to your state just because you think we will be hostile to the government.
VELİ AĞBABA (Malatya) - Come on from there! Does something like this happen?
CHAIRMAN OF THE SESSION ORHAN ERDEM - Dear Ağbaba.
ORHAN YEGİN (Ankara) - Your Land Forces, Air Forces,
Stop criticizing your Navy and army! Know where to stop, know where to stop!
VELİ AĞBABA (Malatya) - We do not stand ready against Morsi one day and Sisi the other day.
ORHAN YEGİN (Ankara) - Don't do such stupid things, friends. Now.
VELİ AĞBABA (Malatya) - We are not begging like cats to meet Esat.
ORHAN YEGİN (Ankara) - Those who do not know how to make peace should not get into fights. Türkiye knows how to make peace. They accused us in such a mild manner of acting together with remnants of DAESH and Al-Qaeda. Both DAESH and Al Qaeda in this region.
VELİ AĞBABA (Malatya) - Also with Al Nusra.
ORHAN YEGİN (Ankara) - If there is a country that has struggled with its remnants, the SDF, I don't know what else, and all kinds of dirty, hypocritical structures, it is Turkey; If there is a soldier who has fought, it is Türkiye's soldier, a Turkish soldier. No one told us under soft sentences: "Cooperate with DAESH." Don't say that, friends.
AYYÜCE TÜRKEŞ TAŞ (Adana) - Not yours, but that soldier of all of us.
ORHAN YEGİN (Ankara) - Now, friends, let me summarize the point I have reached.
ONUR DANDANMEZ (Hakkari) - Those who burn soldiers.
ORHAN YEGİN (Ankara) - Let me summarize it like this.
(The microphone was automatically turned off by the device)
ONUR DHUNMEZ (Hakkari) - Didn't those who burned our soldiers, those who burned the members of the army you call "our army", set up a coop for themselves in Hatay?
CHAIRMAN OF THE SESSION ORHAN ERDEM - Mr. Orhan, I promise you one minute, complete it.
ORHAN YEGİN (Ankara) - You are only dealing with us, we are dealing with everything, everything. You are turning everything into a material to attack us, but we are trying to protect, preserve and develop what is yours, what is ours, what is ours, our peace that you do not hesitate to disturb, everything we have in common; We are trying to protect our democracy, brotherhood, flag, borders and strengthen our indivisible integrity. You stand against everyone and everything, including our borders, our schools, our cross-border operations, our TCG ANATOLIA, our rights arising from international law, our Blue Homeland, those who reach out to us for our national interests, to attack Tayyip Erdoğan, the AK PARTY, the People's Alliance.

(The microphone was automatically turned off by the device)
ORHAN YEGİN (Ankara) - President, I am very divided, I ask you to give me a minute.
CHAIRMAN OF THE SESSION ORHAN ERDEM - Please, Mr. Orhan, finish because this is the procedure.
ORHAN YEGİN (Ankara) - IHA.
VELİ AĞBABA (Malatya) - Shake it, shake it abundantly, Orhan Yegin, shake it, you found the empty square.
ORHAN YEGİN (Ankara) - President, it is very short.
CHAIRMAN OF THE SESSION ORHAN ERDEM - Hello.
ORHAN YEGİN (Ankara) - Greeting.
CHAIRMAN OF THE SESSION ORHAN ERDEM - Please greet immediately, do not continue.
ORHAN YEGİN (Ankara) - You are attacking our UAVs, our tanks, everything and everyone.
CAVİT ARI (Antalya) - What happened to tank pallets, tank pallets?
ORHAN YEGİN (Ankara) - "We will touch it when it comes." you were saying. Look, the nation did not have the chance, you could not come, you are sitting in the same place, with the same numbers. Don't do this! Give up this politics, friends.
VELİ AĞBABA (Malatya) - Know your place, your place! We are the 1st party in the last election.
ORHAN YEGİN (Ankara) - Now, I said the other day, Ağbaba.
CHAIRMAN OF THE SESSION ORHAN ERDEM - Mr. Orhan, let's greet each other.
ORHAN YEGİN (Ankara) - I'm finishing.
VELİ AĞBABA (Malatya) - Know your place! We are the 1st party in the last election.
ORHAN YEGİN (Ankara) - What you know is not true, your intentions are not pleasant, your style is not decent, and your judgment is not fair. I said that you are not aware of whose interests you are playing into with this knowledge, intention, style and judgment, and I added that if you repent with a pure heart, it is hoped that God and the nation will forgive you. Today I am changing it, I am saying that repenting is not enough, if you repent with a pure heart and remain true to your repentance, hopefully God and the nation will forgive you.
Come on, be safe.
AYYÜCE TÜRKEŞ TAŞ (Adana) - God knows, do not make judgments in the name of God, God knows who to forgive.
VELİ AĞBABA (Malatya) - Repent a little. Look, I won't let the representative of Türkiye's 1st party be too hard on you.
HEVAL BOZDAĞ (Ağrı) - Mr. President, there is teasing.
CHAIRMAN OF THE SESSION ORHAN ERDEM - Mr. Ağbaba, your spokesperson will now take the floor.
Mr. Heval, as you know, as per the procedure, when Mr. Saruhan comes, we will give you your right to speak.
CHAIRMAN OF THE SESSION ORHAN ERDEM - Dear Rahmi Aşkın Türeli, please come.
AYYÜCE TÜRKEŞ TAŞ (Adana) - Who do you support by praising Ahmet Türk and calling Öcalan?
ORHAN YEGİN (Ankara) - Oh, Mr. Türkeş, don't do it.
AYYÜCE TÜRKEŞ TAŞ (Adana) - But it is.
ORHAN YEGİN (Ankara) - Don't go out either.
VELİ AĞBABA (Malatya) - Look, next week I will remind you of that group you are pointing your finger at.
CHAIRMAN OF THE SESSION ORHAN ERDEM - Please, friends, please.
AYYÜCE TÜRKEŞ TAŞ (Adana) - You will be fair, God is on the side of justice, you will be fair.
ORHAN YEGİN (Ankara) - My respect to you and your esteemed father.
AYYÜCE TÜRKEŞ TAŞ (Adana) - It is mandatory, it is mandatory. Nobody can call Öcalan.
CHAIRMAN OF THE SESSION ORHAN ERDEM - I give my word to Mr. Türeli.
VELİ AĞBABA (Malatya) - Mr. President, Mr. Yegin has been teasing and teasing a lot.
ORHAN YEGİN (Ankara) - What teasing? What did I lie about?
VELİ AĞBABA (Malatya) - It is as if it is not his own party that salutes Sisi.
CHAIRMAN OF THE SESSION ORHAN ERDEM - Mr. Türeli will take the floor, he will answer all of them.
VELİ AĞBABA (Malatya) - As if the crown prince was not the one who greeted him at the door after calling him a "murderer".

CHAIRMAN OF THE SESSION ORHAN ERDEM - Mr. Ağbaba, Mr. Türeli.
VELİ AĞBABA (Malatya) - As if he was not the one lying at Esat's door.
ORHAN YEGİN (Ankara) - My brother, there is neither eternal enmity nor eternal friendship in international relations.
VELİ AĞBABA (Malatya) - It seems like he is not the one saluting against the Russians who killed 33 of our soldiers.
ORHAN YEGİN (Ankara) - There is neither eternal enmity nor eternal friendship in international relations.
VELİ AĞBABA (Malatya) - Come on dear, come on!
CAVİT ARI (Antalya) - When you do it, friendship becomes enmity, right?
ORHAN YEGİN (Ankara) - There are interests, there are mutual interests, do you understand?
VELİ AĞBABA (Malatya) - What interest do you have? Morsi, Morsi, Morsi!
ORHAN YEGİN (Ankara) - We did not put all the negativity on the man we called "Gandi Kemal, Gandhi Kemal" for thirteen years and said "Come on Kemal, come on Kemal".
VELİ AĞBABA (Malatya) - Your hands are swollen from saying "Teacher, teacher" to Davutoğlu and applauding. You were calling Davutoğlu "sir, teacher" and running after him.
CHAIRMAN OF THE SESSION ORHAN ERDEM - Mr. Türeli, I am restarting your time.
Dear Ağbaba, Mr. Orhan Yegin.
Mr. Yegin, Mr. Ağbaba, please.
Mr. Türeli, I am starting it again.
AYYÜCE TÜRKEŞ TAŞ (Adana) - You made Fetullah Gülen a terrorist.
ORHAN YEGİN (Ankara) - Yes.
AYYÜCE TÜRKEŞ TAŞ (Adana) - Well, okay, but you applauded.
ORHAN YEGİN (Ankara) - He became a terrorist, so we treated him as a terrorist.
AYYÜCE TÜRKEŞ TAŞ (Adana) - You appointed him everywhere, handed over the army, and then declared him a "terrorist", you will be fair.
ORHAN YEGİN (Ankara) - Madam.
VELİ AĞBABA (Malatya) - Look, you will start negotiations again soon, be smart with Öcalan.
CHAIRMAN OF THE SESSION ORHAN ERDEM - Friends, let's stop talking to each other, please.
VELİ AĞBABA (Malatya) - You set the table with Öcalan again,
You have set the table with Öcalan, let's go.
CHAIRMAN OF THE SESSION ORHAN ERDEM - Dear Ağbaba. Mr. Ağbaba, your spokesperson answers.
Here you go, Mr. Türeli.
(Mutual exchanges between AK PARTY and CHP, İYİ Party MPs)
CHAIRMAN OF THE SESSION ORHAN ERDEM - Mr. Orhan, I have been making my promise many times. I'm starting it. Please.
ORHAN YEGİN (Ankara) - Dear Mr. President, Ağbaba keeps teasing and does not sit comfortably.

records.originalTurkish:
ORHAN YEGİN (Ankara) - Başkanım, teşekkür ediyorum.
Salonda bulunan herkesi saygıyla selamlıyorum.
Yemin konusunda disiplinsizlik yapan askerlerle ilgili, öğrencilerle ilgili konu çokça konuşuldu. Bizim okuduklarımızdan, bizim anlatılanlardan -bizim sosyal medyadan, oradan buradan değil de- yetkili insanların ağızlarından dinlediklerimizden, duyduklarımızdan anladığımız şudur: Bu kardeşlerimiz 7 defa böyle bir ek tören yapmak istediklerini söylemelerine ve bunun uygun olmayacağı amirleri tarafından kendilerine tam 7 defa söylenmiş olmasına rağmen o kardeşlerimiz böyle bir görüntüye vesile olmuşlardır, o öğrencilerimiz, o askerlerimiz.
CAVİT ARI (Antalya) - Ne yapmışlar?
ORHAN YEGİN (Ankara) - Dolayısıyla askerliğin temelinde de disiplin vardır. Mustafa Kemal Atatürk de askerdeki disiplinin ehemmiyetinin altını çizmiştir. Millî Savunma Bakanlığımız konuyu kendi iç mekanizmaları içerisinde tetkik etmektedir, soruşturma açılmıştır, incelenmektedir. Bırakalım, onlar kendi mecralarında, kendi usulleri, kendi hukukları, kendi disiplin yönetmelikleri gereği, bu meselenin esası neyse, hakikati neyse... Elbette onlar bizim çocuklarımız, elbette bizim çocuklarımız da hata yapabilir, elbette bizim çocuklarımız da hata yaptığı zaman o hatanın şiddetine, önemine, ehemmiyetine göre ya onlara bir müeyyide uygulanabilir yahut da farklı bir şey yapılabilir.
TAHSİN OCAKLI (Rize) - Ama evden kovmuyorsunuz değil mi?
ORHAN YEGİN (Ankara) - Bırakalım onlar karar versinler, onlar icra etsinler. Siz "'Mustafa Kemal'in askerleriyiz.' dediler diye bu çocuklara bunları yapıyorsunuz." diyerek işi siyasallaştırmaya, sulandırmaya, askerinize, ordunuza, millî muharip savunma ve caydırıcı gücünüzü yıpratmaya dönük her türlü cümlenin içerisine giriyorsunuz. Yapmayın, ayıp ediyorsunuz! Bu ordu sizin de hukukunuzu koruyan ordu. Bu ordu Laz'ıyla, Çerkez'iyle, Alevi'siyle, Sünni'siyle, Kürt'üyle, Terekeme'siyle, namaz kılanıyla kılmayanıyla, kadeh tokuşturanı tokuşturmayanıyla, "Ben bu ülkenin vatandaşıyım." diyen herkesin ordusu, herkesin hukukunu gözeten bir ordu. Askerinize, ordunuza, kolluğunuza böyle ayıp ve çirkin laflar etmeyin lütfen.
CAVİT ARI (Antalya) - Ya, ordunun hakkını hukukunu biz savunuyoruz ya! Çirkinliği yapan sizsiniz ya! Orduyu zayıflata zayıflata bu hâle getirdiniz.
ORHAN YEGİN (Ankara) - Şimdi, meselenin özü şu: Şimdi, geçenlerde burada Dışişleri Bakanlığı bütçesinde CHP'nin sözcüsü geldi şöyle bir ifade kullandı, dedi ki: "Bizim üyesi olduğumuz Batı devletleri ailesi var." dedi ve "Bugün karşı karşıya bulunduğumuz pek çok sorunun temeli, cumhuriyetimizin hangi gelişimin uzantısı olarak kurulduğunu, hangi cephenin uzantısı olarak kurulduğunu unutarak hatta onu yadsıyarak organik kimliğimizle kavga etmemiz de âdeta kişilik bölünmesi semptomlarını sergilememizden kaynaklanıyor." dedi. Arkadaşlar, Türkiye sizin istediğiniz o eski Türkiye değil. "Ben Batı'ya kancayı atarım, Batı beni nereye çekiyorsa oraya giderim, Batı devletler ailesinin menfaatleri neyi gerektiriyorsa ona hizmet ederim, kafam rahat, rahat ederim. Doğu'ya dönerim sırtımı, sınırımda ne oluyormuş, üstümde tepemde ne oluyormuş umurumda olmaz. Benim arkamda Batı var. Oh, ben öyle rahat ederim." Böyle bir dünya yok arkadaşlar. Türkiye, bugün yeri geldiğinde Batı'yla herhangi bir devletle müttefik olan ama yeri geldiğinde başka bir konuda da onunla karşı karşıya gelebilme cesaretini kendi millî menfaatleri doğrultusunda gösterebilen, özgüveni olan bir ülkedir. Bu özgüveni birçok şeyden almaktadır. Bu özgüveni istikrarlı yönetiminden, iktidarından almaktadır, Cumhur İttifakı'ndan almaktadır.
VELİ AĞBABA (Malatya) - İstikrarlı dış politikadan almaktadır.
ORHAN YEGİN (Ankara) - Milletin yirmi küsur yıldır arkasında durduğu tezlerin ve politikaların arkasında durmasından almaktadır. Bunu, yetiştirdiği gençlerinin başardığı teknolojiden, başardığı bilimden almaktadır. Bunu ordusunun o kuvvetli gücünden almaktadır. Bunu,
milletinin tamamından, milletinin kardeşliğinden, birliğinden, bütünlüğünden almaktadır. Gelip burada ikide bir "bölünme, ayrışma" Yok "Sisi olunca, bilmem, Esat olunca elini uzatan iktidar, Kürtler olunca silah uzatıyor." Bu safsataları, bu abuk subuk cümleleri, bu milletin içerisine nifak sokma girişimlerini artık bir kenara bırakın, Batı'nın payandası bir devlet olma özlemini bir kenara bırakın. Özgüven duyun ya ülkenizle. Neleri başardı bu ülke yirmi senede?
TAHSİN OCAKLI (Rize) - Batırdınız Orhan Bey.
ORHAN YEGİN (Ankara) - Bölgeyi ne hâle getirmeye çalıştılar; delikanlı gibi durdu hepsinin karşısında.
AYYÜCE TÜRKEŞ TAŞ (Adana) - Asırlardır durdu.
ORHAN YEGİN (Ankara) - Bütün planları bozdu.
TAHSİN OCAKLI (Rize) - Cumhuriyet tarihinin en büyük borcunu getirdiniz ya!
ORHAN YEGİN (Ankara) - Evet, her şeyi tam ve mükemmel istediği noktaya getiremedi çünkü burada tek muktedir olan o değildi.
VELİ AĞBABA (Malatya) - Arkadaşlar, Orhan Bey'in sözünü kesmeyin, Orhan Bey doğru söylüyor. Sisi'ye meydan okudu, Sisi'nin karşısında aslan gibi duruyor.
ORHAN YEGİN (Ankara) - Burada Amerika'yla, burada Fransa'yla, burada Rusya'yla, burada Avrupa'nın güçlü ülkeleriyle mücadele etti Ağbaba.
VELİ AĞBABA (Malatya) - Suudi Prensinin karşısında aslan gibi duruyor; önce "katil" dedi, sonra havaalanında davul zurnayla karşıladı.
ORHAN YEGİN (Ankara) - Ağbaba, kardeşim, bak, Hükûmete muhalif olmak başka bir şey.
OTURUM BAŞKANI ORHAN ERDEM - Sayın Ağbaba, lütfen.
ORHAN YEGİN (Ankara) - Siz Hükûmetinize muhalifsiniz, muhalif de kalmalısınız.
VELİ AĞBABA (Malatya) - Herzog'la el sıkıştı. Bravo! Kutluyoruz! İstikrarlı dış politika.
ORHAN YEGİN (Ankara) - Hükûmetinize, Tayyip Erdoğan'a, Cumhur İttifakı'na muhalif de kalmanızı anlıyoruz ama ona muhalefet edeceğiz diye ordunuza düşmanca konuşuyorsunuz.
VELİ AĞBABA (Malatya) - Sisi ne oldu, Sisi?
CAVİT ARI (Antalya) - Orduya düşman olan sizsiniz ya.
TAHSİN OCAKLI (Rize) - Orduyu sizden korumaya çalışıyoruz.
ORHAN YEGİN (Ankara) - Ona muhalefet edeceğiz diye orduya "Kimyasal silah kullandı." diyen Fincancıların arkasında duruyorsunuz.
VELİ AĞBABA (Malatya) - İşine bak, işine!
ORHAN YEGİN (Ankara) - Ona muhalefet edeceğiz diye "Ordu, çukur eylemlerinde geldi, kimyasal silah kullandı, komşusu olan Kürtleri katletti." diye ordusuna hakaret eden, haince cümleler kullananların arkasında durup onları cesaretlendiriyorsunuz.
VELİ AĞBABA (Malatya) - Sen kimin arkasında duruyorsun? Fesli, fesli... "Keşke Yunan kazansaydı." diyenin yanında duruyorsun.
ORHAN YEGİN (Ankara) - Yahu, ne durumda olduğunuzun farkında olun. Sayın Ağbaba, bak ben seni milletini memleketini seven bir insan olarak bilirim ama kurduğunuz cümleler hep milletinize memleketinize düşmanlık eden adamların yüreğini soğutuyor.
VELİ AĞBABA (Malatya) - Tabii, tabii! Bir cümlemi söylesene.
ORHAN YEGİN (Ankara) - Allah'ınızı severseniz bırakın bu işleri
HEVAL BOZDAĞ (Ağrı) - Sayın Başkanım, biz bu konuşmayı daha önce dinledik, 3'üncü tekrar.
ORHAN YEGİN (Ankara) - Arkadaşlar, şimdi, bakın, Anadolu ve Mezopotamya'nın çok kültürlü yapısı yok sayıldı. Tekçi yaklaşımla, tek mezhepçi yaklaşımla siyaset yapıldı. Kardeşim, bizim tek cümle kurduğumuz şey şurasıdır, deriz ki: "Bölmeyin devleti, milleti." "Tek devlet" deriz, "tek bayrak" deriz, "tek devlet, tek millet" deriz. Bizim "tek" ifadesini kullandığımız, ürettiğimiz tek kavramsallaştırma ve yaptığımız çatı budur. Onun dışında, Alevisi'ni Sünni'sini, eteği kısa olanını uzun olanını, burnu hızmalı olanını, kulağı küpeli küpesiz olanı... Ya, biz kimseyi ayırmamışız ya!
AYYÜCE TÜRKEŞ TAŞ (Adana) - Hiçbir zaman ayrılmadı ya! Cumhuriyet kurulduğundan beri ayrılmadı.
ORHAN YEGİN (Ankara) - Biz bu ülkenin her yerine, her kesimine, her ferdine hizmet götürmeye ve bu ülkede herkesin bu devleti kendi devleti olarak görmesine, sığınacağı devleti olarak görmesine, kendisine sahip çıkacak devleti olarak görmesine, ordusuna da okuluna da hastanesine de üniversitesine de giderken ne yaşam tarzından ne etnik kökeninden ne mezhebinden hiçbir ayrım görmeden gidebilmesine hizmet etmiş bir siyasetiz biz ya!
HÜSEYİN OLAN (Bitlis) - En fazla ötekileştiren sizdiniz.
ORHAN YEGİN (Ankara) - Siz bölücü cümleler kurup bizi bölücü olmakla suçluyorsunuz, çok büyük ayıp ediyorsunuz.
Bir de külhanbeyli gibi durmadan diyormuşuz ki: "Bir gece ansızın gelebiliriz." Biz o ifadeyi kime kullanıyoruz? Sınırımızın ötesinden buraya havan topları atanlara, Kilis'te, Reyhanlı'da insanlarımızın canına kastedenlere kullanıyoruz.
TAHSİN OCAKLI (Rize) - Suriye'den her gece geliyor, siz bir gece ansızın.
ORHAN YEGİN (Ankara) - Biz, bölgede sınırlarda ameliyat yapmak isteyenlere bunu kullanıyoruz. Biz, Irak'ın haritalarını bölmeye çalışanlara, Suriye'de örgütler üzerinden devletçikler kurmaya çalışanlara, biz DEAŞ olup devlet kurmaya çalışanlara, YPG-DSG olup orada "Devlet kuracağız." demek isteyenlere, bu ülkeye düşmanlık edenlere diyoruz.
VELİ AĞBABA (Malatya) - Kiminle iş birliği yapıyorsunuz?
ORHAN YEGİN (Ankara) - Ve bunu külhanbeylilik olsun diye demiyoruz, bunu onları uyarmak için diyoruz, yapmayın diye söylüyoruz, bak, yaparsanız biz de üstünüze gelmek zorunda kalırız diye söylüyoruz, uslu dursunlar diye söylüyoruz. "Yapmayın, bir gece ansızın gelebiliriz." diyoruz.
HÜSEYİN OLAN (Bitlis) - Siz demediniz mi "Sınırın ötesinden bomba atarız." Şimdi de inkâr ediyorsunuz.
ORHAN YEGİN (Ankara) - Ve yaptıkları zaman da bir daha uyarıyoruz: "Bak, bir gece ansızın gelebiliriz." diyoruz. Amerika oradan "Yapamazsın, yaparsan sana savaş açarım." diyor. Avrupa Birliği "Yaparsan ambargo uygularım." diyor, "Bir gece ansızın gelebiliriz." diyoruz. Onların cümlelerine kanıp devam edenlere de diyoruz ki "Kardeşim, biz gücümüzü kullanmaya muktedir bir devletiz." diyoruz. Ve evet, bir gece ansızın gidiyoruz. Fırat Kalkanı oluyoruz, Barış Pınarı oluyoruz, gidiyoruz. Ya, niye rahatsızlık duyuyorsunuz bundan?
VELİ AĞBABA (Malatya) - 33 askerimizi şehit edenlere karşı ne yaptın? Gittin kapısında durdun.
ORHAN YEGİN (Ankara) - Siz kime hizmet etmek için konuşuyorsunuz burada?
VELİ AĞBABA (Malatya) - 33 askerimizi şehit edenlere karşı ne yaptın? Söylesene.
CAVİT ARI (Antalya) - Kapısında esas duruşta bekledi.
ORHAN YEGİN (Ankara) - Bırakın bu işleri. Kardeşim, Hükûmete düşmanlık edeceğiz diye devletinize düşmanlık etmekten vazgeçin.
VELİ AĞBABA (Malatya) - Hadi oradan! Böyle bir şey olur mu ya?
OTURUM BAŞKANI ORHAN ERDEM - Sayın Ağbaba...
ORHAN YEGİN (Ankara) - Hükûmeti kötüleyeceğiz diye Kara Kuvvetlerinizi, Hava Kuvvetlerinizi,
Deniz Kuvvetlerinizi, ordunuzu kötülemekten vazgeçin ya! Bir duracağınız yeri bilin, bir nerede duracağınızı bilin ya!
VELİ AĞBABA (Malatya) - Bir gün Mursi'nin, bir gün Sisi'nin karşısında hazır olda durmuyoruz.
ORHAN YEGİN (Ankara) - Böyle abuk subuk işler yapmayın arkadaşlar. Şimdi...

ORHAN YEGİN (Ankara) - Barışmayı bilmeyen kavgaya girmemeli, Türkiye barışmayı biliyor. Bizi böyle yumuşak bir üslupla DEAŞ ve El-Kaide artıklarıyla birlikte hareket etmekle itham ettiler. Bu bölgede DEAŞ'la da El Kaide'yle de...
VELİ AĞBABA (Malatya) - El Nusra'yla da.
ORHAN YEGİN (Ankara) - ...onun artıklarıyla da DSG'siyle de bilmem nesiyle de her türlü kirli, münafık yapılarıyla da mücadele etmiş bir ülke varsa o da Türkiye'dir; mücadele etmiş bir asker varsa o da Türkiye'nin askeridir, Türk askeridir. Kimse bize yumuşak cümlelerin altında "DEAŞ'la iş birliği yapın." demesin arkadaşlar.
AYYÜCE TÜRKEŞ TAŞ (Adana) - Sizin değil ama hepimizin o asker.
ORHAN YEGİN (Ankara) - Şimdi, arkadaşlar, bakın geldiğim noktanın özetini şöyle yapayım...

(Mikrofon otomatik cihaz tarafından kapatıldı)

OTURUM BAŞKANI ORHAN ERDEM - Orhan Bey, bir dakika söz veriyorum, tamamlayın.

Siz, her şeyi bize saldırmak için bir malzemeye dönüştürüyorsunuz bizse sizin de olan bizim de olan, hepimizin olanı korumaya, muhafaza etmeye ve geliştirmeye, sizin bozmaktan çekinmediğiniz huzurumuzu, ortak olan neyimiz varsa hepsini; demokrasimizi, kardeşliğimizi, bayrağımızı, sınırlarımızı korumaya, bölünmez bütünlüğümüzü tahkim etmeye çalışıyoruz. Siz, Tayyip Erdoğan'a, AK PARTİ'ye, Cumhur İttifakı'na saldırmak için sınırlarımıza da okullarımıza da sınır ötesi operasyonlarımıza da TCG ANADOLU'muza da uluslararası hukuktan dolayı kaynaklanan haklarımıza da Mavi Vatanımıza da millî menfaatlerimiz için elimizi uzattığımıza da bizimle yakınlaşana da herkese, her şeye karşı duruyorsunuz.
(Mikrofon otomatik cihaz tarafından kapatıldı)

OTURUM BAŞKANI ORHAN ERDEM - Lütfen hemen selamlayın, devam etmeyin.

CAVİT ARI (Antalya) - Tank palet ne oldu, tank palet?
ORHAN YEGİN (Ankara) - "Gelince dokunacağız." diyordunuz. Bak, millet nasip etmedi, siz gelemediniz, aynı yerde, aynı sayılarla oturuyorsunuz. Yapmayın bunu! Bu siyasetten vazgeçin arkadaşlar.
VELİ AĞBABA (Malatya) - Haddini bil, haddini! Son seçimin 1'inci partisiyiz biz.
ORHAN YEGİN (Ankara) - Şimdi, geçen gün demiştim ki Ağbaba...
OTURUM BAŞKANI ORHAN ERDEM - Orhan Bey, selamlayalım.
ORHAN YEGİN (Ankara) - Bitiriyorum.
VELİ AĞBABA (Malatya) - Haddini bil! Son seçimin 1'inci partisiyiz biz .
ORHAN YEGİN (Ankara) - ...bildiğiniz doğru değil, niyetiniz hoş değil, üslubunuz nezih değil, hükmünüz de adil değil. Bu bilgi, niyet, üslup ve hükümle kimlerin ekmeğine yağ sürüyorsunuz farkında değilsiniz demiştim ve eklemiştim, nasuh bir kalple tövbe ederseniz umulur ki Allah da millet de affeder. Bugün değiştiriyorum, diyorum ki tövbe etmeniz yetmez, nasuh bir kalple tövbe edip tövbenize sadık kalabilirseniz umulur ki Allah da millet de sizleri affeder.
Hadi selametle.
AYYÜCE TÜRKEŞ TAŞ (Adana) - Allah bilir, Allah adına ahkâm kesme, Allah bilir kimi affedeceğini.
VELİ AĞBABA (Malatya) - Biraz sen tövbe et. Bak, haddini Türkiye'nin 1'nci partisinin vekiline fazla sallatmam sana.
HEVAL BOZDAĞ (Ağrı) - Sayın Başkan, sataşma var.
OTURUM BAŞKANI ORHAN ERDEM - Sayın Ağbaba, şimdi, sözcünüz zaten söz alacak.
Heval Bey, usul gereği biliyorsunuz, Sayın Saruhan Bey geldiğinde söz hakkınızı veririz.
OTURUM BAŞKANI ORHAN ERDEM - Sayın Rahmi Aşkın Türeli, buyurun.
AYYÜCE TÜRKEŞ TAŞ (Adana) - Ahmet Türk'ü överek Öcalan'ı çağırarak kime destek veriyorsunuz?
ORHAN YEGİN (Ankara) - Ya, Sayın Türkeş sen yapma.
AYYÜCE TÜRKEŞ TAŞ (Adana) - Ama öyle.
ORHAN YEGİN (Ankara) - Bir de sen çıkma.
VELİ AĞBABA (Malatya) - Bak, haftaya o parmak salladığın grubu hatırlatırım sana.
OTURUM BAŞKANI ORHAN ERDEM - Lütfen, arkadaşlar, lütfen.
AYYÜCE TÜRKEŞ TAŞ (Adana) - Adil olacaksın, Allah adaletten yana, adil olacaksın.
ORHAN YEGİN (Ankara) - Size de muhterem babanıza da saygım...
AYYÜCE TÜRKEŞ TAŞ (Adana) - Mecbur, mecbur... Kimse Öcalan'ı çağıramaz.
OTURUM BAŞKANI ORHAN ERDEM - Sayın Türeli'ye söz veriyorum.
VELİ AĞBABA (Malatya) - Sayın Başkan, Sayın Yegin çok sataşmada bulundu, sallıyor.
ORHAN YEGİN (Ankara) - Ya, ne sataşması? Neyi yalan söyledim?
VELİ AĞBABA (Malatya) - Sanki Sisi'nin karşısında selam duran kendi partisi değil.
OTURUM BAŞKANI ORHAN ERDEM - Sayın Türeli söz alacak, o hepsini cevaplar.
VELİ AĞBABA (Malatya) - Sanki veliaht prens "katil" deyip kapısında karşılayan kendisi değil.
OTURUM BAŞKANI ORHAN ERDEM - Sayın Ağbaba, Sayın Türeli...
VELİ AĞBABA (Malatya) - Sanki Esat'ın kapısında yatan kendisi değil.
ORHAN YEGİN (Ankara) - Kardeşim, uluslararası ilişkilerde ebedi düşmanlık da olmaz, ebedi dostluk da olmaz.
VELİ AĞBABA (Malatya) - 33 askerimizi öldüren Rusların karşısında selam duran kendisi değil sanki.
ORHAN YEGİN (Ankara) - Uluslararası ilişkilerde ebedi düşmanlık da olmaz, ebedi dostluk da olmaz.
VELİ AĞBABA (Malatya) - Hadi canım, hadi!
CAVİT ARI (Antalya) - Siz yapınca dostluk, düşmanlık öyle mi!
ORHAN YEGİN (Ankara) - Menfaatler vardır, karşılıklı çıkarlar vardır, anladın mı?
VELİ AĞBABA (Malatya) - Hangi çıkarın var? Mursi, Mursi, Mursi!
ORHAN YEGİN (Ankara) - Biz on üç yıl "Gandi Kemal, Gandi Kemal" dediğimiz adamın üstüne bütün olumsuzlukları yıkıp "Hadi Kemal, hadi Kemal" demedik.
VELİ AĞBABA (Malatya) - Senin Davutoğlu'na "Hocam, hocam" deyip alkışlamaktan ellerin şişti. Davutoğlu'na "hocam, hocam" deyip peşinde koşuyordunuz.
OTURUM BAŞKANI ORHAN ERDEM - Sayın Türeli, sürenizi yeniden başlatıyorum.
Sayın Ağbaba, Sayın Orhan Yegin Bey...
Sayın Yegin, Sayın Ağbaba, lütfen.
Sayın Türeli, tekrar başlatıyorum.
AYYÜCE TÜRKEŞ TAŞ (Adana) - Siz Fetullah Gülen'i terörist yaptınız.
ORHAN YEGİN (Ankara) - Evet.
AYYÜCE TÜRKEŞ TAŞ (Adana) - E, tamam ama alkışladınız.
ORHAN YEGİN (Ankara) - Terörist oldu, biz de terörist muamelesi yaptık.
AYYÜCE TÜRKEŞ TAŞ (Adana) - Bütün her yere atadınız, orduyu teslim ettiniz, sonra da "terörist" diye ilan ettiniz, adil olacaksınız.
ORHAN YEGİN (Ankara) - Hanımefendi..
VELİ AĞBABA (Malatya) - Bak, yakında yine görüşmelere başlıyorsunuz Öcalan'la akıllı ol.
OTURUM BAŞKANI ORHAN ERDEM - Arkadaşlar, karşılıklı konuşmayı bırakalım lütfen.
VELİ AĞBABA (Malatya) - Öcalan'la yine masayı kurdunuz,
masayı kurdunuz Öcalan'la, haydi bakalım.
OTURUM BAŞKANI ORHAN ERDEM - Sayın Ağbaba... Sayın Ağbaba, sözcünüz cevap verir.
Buyurun Sayın Türeli.
(AK PARTİ ve CHP, İYİ Parti milletvekilleri arasında karşılıklı laf atmalar)
OTURUM BAŞKANI ORHAN ERDEM - Orhan Bey, kaç seferdir söz veriyorum. Başlatıyorum. Lütfen...
ORHAN YEGİN (Ankara) - Sayın Başkanım, Ağbaba sataşıp duruyor, rahat durmuyor ki...
records.englishTranslation:
ORHAN YEGİN (Ankara) - President, thank you.
I respectfully greet everyone in the hall.
There was a lot of talk about soldiers and students who were indisciplined when it came to taking the oath. What we understand from what we read, from what we are told - not from social media, not from here and there - but from what we listen to and hear from the mouths of authorized people is this: Even though these brothers said they wanted to hold such an additional ceremony 7 times and they were told 7 times by their superiors that it would not be appropriate, those brothers, our students, those soldiers, caused such an image.
CAVİT ARI (Antalya) - What did they do?
ORHAN YEGİN (Ankara) - Therefore, the basis of military service is discipline. Mustafa Kemal Atatürk also underlined the importance of discipline in the military. Our Ministry of National Defense is investigating the issue within its own internal mechanisms, an investigation has been opened and it is being examined. Let's leave it to them, in their own media, in accordance with their own procedures, their own laws, their own disciplinary regulations, whatever the essence of this issue is, whatever the truth is. Of course, they are our children, of course our children can make mistakes too. Of course, when our children make a mistake, a sanction can be applied to them or something different can be done depending on the severity, importance and significance of that mistake.
TAHSİN OCAKLI (Rize) - But you're not kicking him out of the house, are you?
ORHAN YEGİN (Ankara) - Let them decide, let them execute. You "'We are Mustafa Kemal's soldiers.' You are doing this to these children just because they said so." By saying this, you are making all kinds of statements aimed at politicizing the issue, diluting it, and wearing down your soldiers, your army, your national combat defense and deterrent power. Don't do it, it's a shame! This army is the army that protects your law. This army, with its Laz, Circassian, Alevi, Sunni, Kurdish, Terekeme, those who pray and those who do not, those who clink glasses and those who do not, "I am a citizen of this country." The army of everyone who says, is an army that respects everyone's law. Please do not speak such shameful and ugly words to your soldiers, your army, your law enforcement officers.
CAVİT ARI (Antalya) - Oh, we are the ones defending the army's rights and laws! You're the one doing the ugly thing! You brought the army to this situation by weakening it.
ORHAN YEGİN (Ankara) - Now, the essence of the matter is this: Recently, CHP's spokesperson came here at the Ministry of Foreign Affairs budget and said: "There is a family of Western states of which we are a member." "The basis of many of the problems we face today stems from the fact that we fight with our organic identity by forgetting which development our republic was founded as an extension of, which front it was established as an extension of, or even denying it, thus exhibiting symptoms of split personality." he said. Friends, Türkiye is not the old Türkiye you want. "I set my sights on the West, I go wherever the West pulls me, I serve whatever the interests of the Western family of states require, I have peace of mind, I feel at ease. I turn my back to the East, I don't care what's happening at my border, what's happening above me. I have the West behind me. Oh, that's how I'll be at ease.

"There is no such world, friends. Today, Turkey is a self-confident country that is an ally of any state with the West when the time comes, but can also show the courage to confront it on another issue in line with its own national interests when the time comes. It derives this self-confidence from many things. It derives this self-confidence from its stable administration, its power, and the People's Alliance.
VELİ AĞBABA (Malatya) - It derives from its stable foreign policy.
ORHAN YEGİN (Ankara) - It comes from the fact that the nation stands behind the theses and policies that it has been behind for more than twenty years. It derives this from the technology and science achieved by its young people. He gets this from the strong power of his army. this,
It derives from its entire nation, its brotherhood, unity and integrity. There is no "division or separation" here. "The government extends its hand when it is Sisi, I don't know, when it is Assad, it extends its arms when it is the Kurds." Leave aside these nonsense, these absurd sentences, and attempts to sow discord within this nation, and leave aside the longing to be a state that supports the West. Have self-confidence with your country. What has this country achieved in twenty years?
TAHSİN OCAKLI (Rize) - You screwed up, Mr. Orhan.
ORHAN YEGİN (Ankara) - What did they try to do to the region? He stood in front of them like a young man.
AYYÜCE TÜRKEŞ TAŞ (Adana) - It has stood for centuries.
ORHAN YEGİN (Ankara) - He ruined all the plans.
TAHSİN OCAKLI (Rize) - You brought the biggest debt in the history of the Republic!
ORHAN YEGİN (Ankara) - Yes, he could not bring everything exactly and perfectly to the point he wanted because he was not the only one who was capable here.
VELİ AĞBABA (Malatya) - Friends, do not interrupt Orhan Bey, he is telling the truth. He challenged Sisi, he stands like a lion in front of Sisi.
ORHAN YEGİN (Ankara) - Ağbaba fought with America here, with France here, with Russia here, with the powerful countries of Europe here.
VELİ AĞBABA (Malatya) - He stands like a lion in front of the Saudi Prince; First he called him "murderer", then he greeted him at the airport with a bang.
ORHAN YEGİN (Ankara) - Brother, brother, look, being against the government is something else.
CHAIRMAN OF THE SESSION ORHAN ERDEM - Dear Ağbaba, please.
ORHAN YEGİN (Ankara) - You are in opposition to your government, you should remain in opposition.
VELİ AĞBABA (Malatya) - He shook hands with Herzog. Well done! We celebrate! Stable foreign policy.
ORHAN YEGİN (Ankara) - We understand that you remain opposed to your government, Tayyip Erdoğan, and the People's Alliance, but you speak hostilely towards your army because you will oppose him.
VELİ AĞBABA (Malatya) - What happened to Sisi, Sisi?
CAVİT ARI (Antalya) - You are the enemy of the army.
TAHSİN OCAKLI (Rize) - We are trying to protect the army from you.
ORHAN YEGİN (Ankara) - He told the army that we would oppose him, "He used chemical weapons." You stand behind the Fincan people who say:
VELİ AĞBABA (Malatya) - Mind your business, your business!
ORHAN YEGİN (Ankara) - Just because we would oppose him, "The army came in pit actions, used chemical weapons, and massacred its neighbors, the Kurds." You stand behind those who insult their army and use treasonous statements and encourage them.
VELİ AĞBABA (Malatya) - Who are you standing behind? Fez, fez.

"I wish Greece had won." You stand next to the one who says.
ORHAN YEGİN (Ankara) - Well, be aware of what situation you are in. Mr. Ağbaba, look, I know you as a person who loves his nation and his country, but the sentences you make always chill the hearts of those who are hostile to your nation and country.
VELİ AĞBABA (Malatya) - Of course, of course! Tell me one sentence.
ORHAN YEGİN (Ankara) - If you love God, leave these things
HEVAL BOZDAĞ (Ağrı) - Mr. President, we have listened to this speech before, this is the 3rd repetition.
ORHAN YEGİN (Ankara) - Friends, now, look, the multicultural structure of Anatolia and Mesopotamia has been ignored. Politics was done with a monist approach and a single sectarian approach. Brother, the only thing we say is this, we say: "Do not divide the state, the nation." We say "one state", "one flag", "one state, one nation". This is the only conceptualization we produce and the framework we use in which we use the term "one". Apart from that, Alevi or Sunni, short or long skirts, nose rings, earrings or no earrings. Oh, we haven't singled anyone out!
AYYÜCE TÜRKEŞ TAŞ (Adana) - He never left! The Republic has not been separated since its founding.
ORHAN YEGİN (Ankara) - We are a policy that has served to provide service to every part of this country, to every segment, to every individual, and to ensure that everyone in this country sees this state as their own state, as the state to take refuge in, as the state that will protect them, and to go to the army, school, hospital and university without any discrimination based on lifestyle, ethnicity or sect!
HÜSEYİN OLAN (Bitlis) - You were the one who marginalized us the most.
ORHAN YEGİN (Ankara) - You make divisive statements and accuse us of being separatist, you are doing a great shame.
And like tough people, we kept saying: "We might come suddenly one night." To whom do we use that expression? We use it against those who fire mortars here from beyond our border, and against those who attempt to kill our people in Kilis and Reyhanlı.
TAHSİN OCAKLI (Rize) - He comes from Syria every night, suddenly one night.
ORHAN YEGİN (Ankara) - We use this for those who want to perform surgery at the borders of the region. We, those who try to divide the maps of Iraq, those who try to establish statelets through organizations in Syria, those who try to become DAESH and establish a state, become YPG-DSG and say "We will establish a state." We say this to those who want to say this, to those who are hostile to this country.
VELİ AĞBABA (Malatya) - With whom are you collaborating?
ORHAN YEGİN (Ankara) - And we do not say this to be rude, we say this to warn them, we say it so that they do not do it, look, if you do it, we will have to come down on you, we say it so that they behave. "Don't do it, we might come suddenly one night." we say.
HÜSEYİN OLAN (Bitlis) - Didn't you say, "We will drop bombs from across the border?" Now you deny it.
ORHAN YEGİN (Ankara) - And when they do, we warn them again: "Look, we may come suddenly one night." we say. America then said, "You can't do it, if you do, I will declare war on you." he says. European Union: "If you do it, I will impose an embargo." he says, "We may come suddenly one night." we say.

We say to those who fall for their words and continue: "Brother, we are a state capable of using our power." we say. And yes, we are leaving suddenly one night. We become the Euphrates Shield, we become the Peace Spring, we go. Why do you feel uncomfortable about this?
VELİ AĞBABA (Malatya) - What did you do against those who martyred our 33 soldiers? You went and stood at the door.
ORHAN YEGİN (Ankara) - Who are you talking to serve here?
VELİ AĞBABA (Malatya) - What did you do against those who martyred our 33 soldiers? Tell me.
CAVİT ARI (Antalya) - He waited at the door in the main stance.
ORHAN YEGİN (Ankara) - Leave these things aside. My brother, stop being hostile to your state just because you think we will be hostile to the government.
VELİ AĞBABA (Malatya) - Come on from there! Does something like this happen?
CHAIRMAN OF THE SESSION ORHAN ERDEM - Dear Ağbaba.
ORHAN YEGİN (Ankara) - Your Land Forces, Air Forces,
Stop criticizing your Navy and army! Know where to stop, know where to stop!
VELİ AĞBABA (Malatya) - We do not stand ready against Morsi one day and Sisi the other day.
ORHAN YEGİN (Ankara) - Don't do such stupid things, friends. Now.
VELİ AĞBABA (Malatya) - We are not begging like cats to meet Esat.
ORHAN YEGİN (Ankara) - Those who do not know how to make peace should not get into fights. Türkiye knows how to make peace. They accused us in such a mild manner of acting together with remnants of DAESH and Al-Qaeda. Both DAESH and Al Qaeda in this region.
VELİ AĞBABA (Malatya) - Also with Al Nusra.
ORHAN YEGİN (Ankara) - If there is a country that has struggled with its remnants, the SDF, I don't know what else, and all kinds of dirty, hypocritical structures, it is Turkey; If there is a soldier who has fought, it is Türkiye's soldier, a Turkish soldier. No one told us under soft sentences: "Cooperate with DAESH." Don't say that, friends.
AYYÜCE TÜRKEŞ TAŞ (Adana) - Not yours, but that soldier of all of us.
ORHAN YEGİN (Ankara) - Now, friends, let me summarize the point I have reached.
ONUR DANDANMEZ (Hakkari) - Those who burn soldiers.
ORHAN YEGİN (Ankara) - Let me summarize it like this.
(The microphone was automatically turned off by the device)
ONUR DHUNMEZ (Hakkari) - Didn't those who burned our soldiers, those who burned the members of the army you call "our army", set up a coop for themselves in Hatay?
CHAIRMAN OF THE SESSION ORHAN ERDEM - Mr. Orhan, I promise you one minute, complete it.
ORHAN YEGİN (Ankara) - You are only dealing with us, we are dealing with everything, everything. You are turning everything into a material to attack us, but we are trying to protect, preserve and develop what is yours, what is ours, what is ours, our peace that you do not hesitate to disturb, everything we have in common; We are trying to protect our democracy, brotherhood, flag, borders and strengthen our indivisible integrity. You stand against everyone and everything, including our borders, our schools, our cross-border operations, our TCG ANATOLIA, our rights arising from international law, our Blue Homeland, those who reach out to us for our national interests, to attack Tayyip Erdoğan, the AK PARTY, the People's Alliance.

(The microphone was automatically turned off by the device)
ORHAN YEGİN (Ankara) - President, I am very divided, I ask you to give me a minute.
CHAIRMAN OF THE SESSION ORHAN ERDEM - Please, Mr. Orhan, finish because this is the procedure.
ORHAN YEGİN (Ankara) - IHA.
VELİ AĞBABA (Malatya) - Shake it, shake it abundantly, Orhan Yegin, shake it, you found the empty square.
ORHAN YEGİN (Ankara) - President, it is very short.
CHAIRMAN OF THE SESSION ORHAN ERDEM - Hello.
ORHAN YEGİN (Ankara) - Greeting.
CHAIRMAN OF THE SESSION ORHAN ERDEM - Please greet immediately, do not continue.
ORHAN YEGİN (Ankara) - You are attacking our UAVs, our tanks, everything and everyone.
CAVİT ARI (Antalya) - What happened to tank pallets, tank pallets?
ORHAN YEGİN (Ankara) - "We will touch it when it comes." you were saying. Look, the nation did not have the chance, you could not come, you are sitting in the same place, with the same numbers. Don't do this! Give up this politics, friends.
VELİ AĞBABA (Malatya) - Know your place, your place! We are the 1st party in the last election.
ORHAN YEGİN (Ankara) - Now, I said the other day, Ağbaba.
CHAIRMAN OF THE SESSION ORHAN ERDEM - Mr. Orhan, let's greet each other.
ORHAN YEGİN (Ankara) - I'm finishing.
VELİ AĞBABA (Malatya) - Know your place! We are the 1st party in the last election.
ORHAN YEGİN (Ankara) - What you know is not true, your intentions are not pleasant, your style is not decent, and your judgment is not fair. I said that you are not aware of whose interests you are playing into with this knowledge, intention, style and judgment, and I added that if you repent with a pure heart, it is hoped that God and the nation will forgive you. Today I am changing it, I am saying that repenting is not enough, if you repent with a pure heart and remain true to your repentance, hopefully God and the nation will forgive you.
Come on, be safe.
AYYÜCE TÜRKEŞ TAŞ (Adana) - God knows, do not make judgments in the name of God, God knows who to forgive.
VELİ AĞBABA (Malatya) - Repent a little. Look, I won't let the representative of Türkiye's 1st party be too hard on you.
HEVAL BOZDAĞ (Ağrı) - Mr. President, there is teasing.
CHAIRMAN OF THE SESSION ORHAN ERDEM - Mr. Ağbaba, your spokesperson will now take the floor.
Mr. Heval, as you know, as per the procedure, when Mr. Saruhan comes, we will give you your right to speak.
CHAIRMAN OF THE SESSION ORHAN ERDEM - Dear Rahmi Aşkın Türeli, please come.
AYYÜCE TÜRKEŞ TAŞ (Adana) - Who do you support by praising Ahmet Türk and calling Öcalan?
ORHAN YEGİN (Ankara) - Oh, Mr. Türkeş, don't do it.
AYYÜCE TÜRKEŞ TAŞ (Adana) - But it is.
ORHAN YEGİN (Ankara) - Don't go out either.
VELİ AĞBABA (Malatya) - Look, next week I will remind you of that group you are pointing your finger at.
CHAIRMAN OF THE SESSION ORHAN ERDEM - Please, friends, please.
AYYÜCE TÜRKEŞ TAŞ (Adana) - You will be fair, God is on the side of justice, you will be fair.
ORHAN YEGİN (Ankara) - My respect to you and your esteemed father.
AYYÜCE TÜRKEŞ TAŞ (Adana) - It is mandatory, it is mandatory. Nobody can call Öcalan.
CHAIRMAN OF THE SESSION ORHAN ERDEM - I give my word to Mr. Türeli.
VELİ AĞBABA (Malatya) - Mr. President, Mr. Yegin has been teasing and teasing a lot.
ORHAN YEGİN (Ankara) - What teasing? What did I lie about?
VELİ AĞBABA (Malatya) - It is as if it is not his own party that salutes Sisi.
CHAIRMAN OF THE SESSION ORHAN ERDEM - Mr. Türeli will take the floor, he will answer all of them.
VELİ AĞBABA (Malatya) - As if the crown prince was not the one who greeted him at the door after calling him a "murderer".

CHAIRMAN OF THE SESSION ORHAN ERDEM - Mr. Ağbaba, Mr. Türeli.
VELİ AĞBABA (Malatya) - As if he was not the one lying at Esat's door.
ORHAN YEGİN (Ankara) - My brother, there is neither eternal enmity nor eternal friendship in international relations.
VELİ AĞBABA (Malatya) - It seems like he is not the one saluting against the Russians who killed 33 of our soldiers.
ORHAN YEGİN (Ankara) - There is neither eternal enmity nor eternal friendship in international relations.
VELİ AĞBABA (Malatya) - Come on dear, come on!
CAVİT ARI (Antalya) - When you do it, friendship becomes enmity, right?
ORHAN YEGİN (Ankara) - There are interests, there are mutual interests, do you understand?
VELİ AĞBABA (Malatya) - What interest do you have? Morsi, Morsi, Morsi!
ORHAN YEGİN (Ankara) - We did not put all the negativity on the man we called "Gandi Kemal, Gandhi Kemal" for thirteen years and said "Come on Kemal, come on Kemal".
VELİ AĞBABA (Malatya) - Your hands are swollen from saying "Teacher, teacher" to Davutoğlu and applauding. You were calling Davutoğlu "sir, teacher" and running after him.
CHAIRMAN OF THE SESSION ORHAN ERDEM - Mr. Türeli, I am restarting your time.
Dear Ağbaba, Mr. Orhan Yegin.
Mr. Yegin, Mr. Ağbaba, please.
Mr. Türeli, I am starting it again.
AYYÜCE TÜRKEŞ TAŞ (Adana) - You made Fetullah Gülen a terrorist.
ORHAN YEGİN (Ankara) - Yes.
AYYÜCE TÜRKEŞ TAŞ (Adana) - Well, okay, but you applauded.
ORHAN YEGİN (Ankara) - He became a terrorist, so we treated him as a terrorist.
AYYÜCE TÜRKEŞ TAŞ (Adana) - You appointed him everywhere, handed over the army, and then declared him a "terrorist", you will be fair.
ORHAN YEGİN (Ankara) - Madam.
VELİ AĞBABA (Malatya) - Look, you will start negotiations again soon, be smart with Öcalan.
CHAIRMAN OF THE SESSION ORHAN ERDEM - Friends, let's stop talking to each other, please.
VELİ AĞBABA (Malatya) - You set the table with Öcalan again,
You have set the table with Öcalan, let's go.
CHAIRMAN OF THE SESSION ORHAN ERDEM - Dear Ağbaba. Mr. Ağbaba, your spokesperson answers.
Here you go, Mr. Türeli.
(Mutual exchanges between AK PARTY and CHP, İYİ Party MPs)
CHAIRMAN OF THE SESSION ORHAN ERDEM - Mr. Orhan, I have been making my promise many times. I'm starting it. Please.
ORHAN YEGİN (Ankara) - Dear Mr. President, Ağbaba keeps teasing and does not sit comfortably.
