ORHAN YEGİN (Ankara) - ...savunma sanayisinden teknolojiye bölgesinde lider, dünyada söz sahibi, sadece siyasal olarak değil, teknolojik olarak da, üretim olarak da, ihracat olarak da her açıdan...
(Mikrofon otomatik cihaz tarafından kapatıldı)
ORHAN YEGİN (Ankara) - ...haklı ve gerçekçi bir söz sahibi bir ülke inşa edelim. Sosyal güvenlik sisteminin aktüeryal dengesiyle, her şeyiyle ayakları yere basan, barışıyla, huzuruyla, kardeşliğiyle, ayakları yere basan bir ülke
inşa edelim ki ondan sonra Veli Ağbaba gibi ehlikeyif bir adam bile gelse ülke sekteye uğramasın.
(CHP sıralarından gülüşmeler)
records.englishTranslation:
ORHAN YEGİN (Ankara) - President, thank you very much.
First of all, I wish God's mercy to our late uncle Mehmet, father of our Planning and Budget Commission member and Osmaniye Deputy, Mr. Seydi Gülsoy.
God bless you. The father of our Deputy Seydi Gülsoy passed away, may God have mercy on him.
CHAIRMAN OF THE SESSION ORHAN ERDEM - The father of our Deputy Seydi Gülsoy passed away. We thank our representative for reminding us, may God have mercy on him.
ORHAN YEGİN (Ankara) - On this occasion, let us wish mercy on the past of all those present, may God grant them a place in heaven.
Dear President, you are here today, you have been president for years before. Of course, we heard the concepts that we are very familiar with in the Commission again, today, here. It was a repetition for you, maybe it was nostalgia. "Budget of the palace" "budget of war" "budget of one man" "Budget taken from the poor and given to the rich." "militarist budget" "There are no young people, no peasants, no women in this budget." You've heard concepts like this again. Friends in the opposition have also given you a little nostalgia in this sense.
Now, Mr. Ağbaba said today: "You are trying to take your legitimacy from Trump - my dear friend." He said:
VELİ AĞBABA (Malatya) - You are the boss.
ORHAN YEGİN (Ankara) - "You are looking for legitimacy under his knee." he said. I want to start from there.
VELİ AĞBABA (Malatya) - We are Trump's liars.
ORHAN YEGİN (Ankara) - Mr. Ağbaba, all the elections we participated in are obvious. We entered these elections together, all the elections we participated in are here. The losers are there, the results are here.
VELI AĞBABA (Malatya) - What does Tom Barrack say? "They talk and talk outside, but when they come to us, they become like cats, like cats!" I'm not saying. Tell Trump. You can't say anything to Trump, you talk to Veli Agbaba!
ORHAN YEGİN (Ankara) - Therefore, we have always received our legitimacy from our nation in every election we have participated in. You say "questionable choice" or something. Nowhere in the world would a person you describe as a "dictator" accept a method or a system that would renew an election with 0.5 percent. We are a President and a People's Alliance who could not reach a result with 49.5 percent in the first round, went to the second round, and came with 52 percent in the second round.
VELİ AĞBABA (Malatya) - Well, I am not talking about this issue of legitimacy, why are you answering me! Is this my point!
ORHAN YEGİN (Ankara) - Mr. Ocaklı said something like that today. He entered questionable elections.
VELİ AĞBABA (Malatya) - Trump's words, Trump's!
ORHAN YEGİN (Ankara) - Anyway, let's continue.
I want to make a suggestion.
VELİ AĞBABA (Malatya) - Instead of criticizing Tahsin Ocaklı, say it to Trump, tell it to Tom Barrack!
ORHAN YEGİN (Ankara) - For example, "Nas policy, Nas influence, how can these things not happen?" There were friends who said. Friends, the verse is the equivalent of the verse. If we are going to criticize each other, we should use the verse, the nas, and simplify this concept.
ALIYE TEAM ERSEVER (Ankara) - Oh, you took him out!
ORHAN YEGİN (Ankara) - Let me give you my advice, say what you say and do what you will; you know.

Do not underestimate the concept of "nas", make light of the nas, or vulgarize it in language.
VELİ AĞBABA (Malatya) - Did we say what?
ORHAN YEGİN (Ankara) - For example, we can criticize like this: Here, interest is the cause and inflation is the result.
VELİ AĞBABA (Malatya) - Mr. Orhan, you will decide how we will talk!
ORHAN YEGİN (Ankara) - Brother Brother, let me give you my advice, you do whatever you want. You know, cause and effect; There were also discussions on interest and inflation, you can go through them, but what is sacred is a sacred of this nation, a sacred of this faith. Therefore, Mr. President, "This is a requirement of Nass." But I said what I would say, those who take it will take it, those who don't take it will not take it. I gave very friendly advice. You are doing politics, these are the common values ​​of the nation, the concepts that express the belief of this nation. I think it would be better not to take these lightly, but you know what you are doing, I'm not saying anything.
Now, "Those who commit corruption and lawlessness are being protected." It was said. That's not the case with us either, Mr. Ocakli, let me go through your examples. Referring to us, "The Deputy Governor of the Central Bank committed corruption." you said. Was it protected, what happened? He was arrested.
TAHSİN OCAKLI (Rize) - I said he did it.
ORHAN YEGİN (Ankara) - There was a brigadier general who you said was smuggling people at the border with his official vehicle. What happened, was he taken care of? He was arrested. That's not the case with us, Mr. Ocaklı, there were mayors - we can count them as provinces or districts - who were AK PARTY mayors and were on the agenda for corruption. What happened, were they favored? He was arrested.
VELİ AĞBABA (Malatya) - Well, which one goes to prison?
ORHAN YEGİN (Ankara) - There are those who were sentenced to twelve years, there are those who were sentenced to eight years, there are those who were sentenced to seven years. Our mayors were arrested.
VELİ AĞBABA (Malatya) - Which trustee was appointed?
ORHAN YEGİN (Ankara) - What happened? Have the streets been roused? Were there demonstrations? What happened? Were cafes stoned? What happened, Mr. Baba? We don't have anything like that, we don't have that.
VELİ AĞBABA (Malatya) - Tell me, was any of your mayors taken into custody during the morning raid or was a trustee appointed?
ORHAN YEGİN (Ankara) - Well, I appeal to the conscience of the entire hall:
What happens when these things happen in CHP, these kinds of things, what happens, Mr. Ağbaba?
VELİ AĞBABA (Malatya) - You declared war on CHP. Let ours be tried the same way your President and Mayor are tried!
GAMZE TAŞCIER (Ankara) - He had a cook, his cook is in prison!
ÖMER FETHI GÜRER (Niğde) - Mr. Orhan, look what you have done, the money has the signature of the man in prison!
CHAIRMAN OF THE SESSION ORHAN ERDEM - Well, it turned into a conversation.
Mr. Orhan, continue.
ORHAN YEGİN (Ankara) - What happened, okay, what happened to that man? So, just because we appointed someone to a place, because we were instrumental in someone being appointed to a place, or because we exercised authority or appointed him, did we exempt him from inspection?
ÖMER FETHI GÜRER (Niğde) - We are currently carrying the money signed by this man, this is shameful enough!
ORHAN YEGİN (Ankara) - Did we not only exempt him from inspection, but also cover him up when we witnessed his corruption and wrongdoing?
VELİ AĞBABA (Malatya) - AK PARTY Bayrampaşa District Chairman, what happened?

Answer me!
AHMET VEHBİ BAKIRLIOĞLU (Manisa) - Why did you single out the Mayor of Kütahya in the file?
ORHAN YEGİN (Ankara) - Did we go out to the streets and demonstrate like you did? That's what I want to say.
VELİ AĞBABA (Malatya) - Separate law for Zeydan Karalar. Tell me about the money that came out of the house of AK PARTY Bayrampaşa District Chairman!
ORHAN YEGİN (Ankara) - Anyway, let's get back to the topic and come to another place.
(Challenging words and noise from CHP benches)
ÖMER FETHI GÜRER (Niğde) - The person whose signature was on money for the first time in the history of the Republic of Türkiye.
VELİ AĞBABA (Malatya) - Name the Erzurum Deputy!
ORHAN YEGİN (Ankara) - Human beings do; You will supervise, you will set the rules, you will supervise, "He is the man I appointed, he is my presidential candidate, he is my mayor." You won't say.
ÖMER FETHI GÜRER (Niğde) - But what has become of the country!
AHMET VEHBİ BAKIRLIOĞLU (Manisa) - He sells disinfectant to the Ministry, especially during the pandemic period.
ORHAN YEGİN (Ankara) - You will go after whoever has done wrong, whoever is involved in corruption, that is the issue, that is what I want to say.
VELİ AĞBABA (Malatya) - Let him be tried, let him be tried! The law applied to you is different, to the CHP; Will it work?
ORHAN YEGİN (Ankara) - President, I cannot continue.
CHAIRMAN OF THE SESSION ORHAN ERDEM - Mr. Orhan, please continue.
GAMZE TAŞCIER (Ankara) - It was your friend who said that he sold Ankara parcel by parcel!
VELİ AĞBABA (Malatya) - Was one of your mayors detained during the morning raid?
CHAIRMAN OF THE SESSION ORHAN ERDEM - Mr. Veli. Dear Veli Ağbaba. Please.
ORHAN YEGİN (Ankara) - Now, let's discuss the world's largest economy.
VELİ AĞBABA (Malatya) - Come to Ankara! You know your constituency very well, come, come to Ankara!
ORHAN YEGİN (Ankara) - OK, is it over? That's enough, okay, it's understood, your message is also understood.
VELİ AĞBABA (Malatya) - Come to Ankara!
ORHAN YEGİN (Ankara) - Now, we have been accused of saying that we are conducting the discussion with the figures given based on the world's largest economy. Now, this is a constant comparison, friends, that is, where a country ranks in the world economy rankings, what rank it comes to next year, how much it falls, how much it rises, is a concept that is discussed every year and followed by everyone, but there have been some discussions about its content, it is valuable, but this is a concept that has been underlined in all years, so this concept has been underlined in this budget as well. But what is the opposition doing, but Veli Ağbaba, what are you doing? While you are making your speech and talk, you go from whichever product suits your business and whichever data suits your business. Did the price of onions increase this year? This year, you divide the minimum wage by onions.
VELİ AĞBABA (Malatya) - What are you doing?
ORHAN YEGİN (Ankara) - Last year, lettuce peaked or peaked. You divide all the data into lettuce and curly.
VELİ AĞBABA (Malatya) - Are you criticizing, for God's sake? Criticize a sentence, criticize a sentence!
GAMZE TAŞCIER (Ankara) - You tell us where we rank in food inflation in the world!
ORHAN YEGİN (Ankara) - What did you do this year? You came from gold that broke records one after another, you did your calculations.
VELİ AĞBABA (Malatya) - You are a smarter man than I expected!

You come over onion, come over tomato!
ORHAN YEGİN (Ankara) - We come from the data discussed every year, you come from whatever data suits you in any year.
TAHSİN OCAKLI (Rize) - Orhan Deputy, tell me about food inflation.
VELİ AĞBABA (Malatya) - You come from tomatoes, say I came from gold.
ORHAN YEGİN (Ankara) - Well, I'm not saying that what he says is a lie, I'm saying that he comes from the data that suits him.
VELİ AĞBABA (Malatya) - Oh.
ORHAN YEGİN (Ankara) - Now, every year we ask, "What is the rank of the Turkish economy, where did our exports come every year, what was our current account deficit every year?" We go through the same concepts every year, but you take whatever is highest in the market every year and work on it, okay? I want to say it.
VELİ AĞBABA (Malatya) - Well, calculate from the lowest, and say: "There has been no decrease in the purchasing power of the minimum wage compared to tomatoes." Say, tell me one.
ORHAN YEGİN (Ankara) - "Not enough share is allocated for social aid." said friends today, "Social spending is not improving." he said, "What is social assistance?" he said and described it as "Free education, health, roads, providing these services equally to everyone without any conditions." he said. There is no problem with this in Türkiye. In Türkiye, all services produced by the state are distributed equally to all, without any discrimination, without discrimination of region, without discrimination of sect.
TAHSİN OCAKLI (Rize) - Not given.
ORHAN YEGİN (Ankara) - Therefore, there is no problem here.
VELİ AĞBABA (Malatya) - Do you believe this?
ORHAN YEGİN (Ankara) - Veli Ağbaba, before the AK PARTY came to power, the share of social aid in the budget was 0.04, that is, approximately half a point.
(Challenging words and noise from CHP benches)
ORHAN YEGİN (Ankara) - But today, the share of social aid in our budget is approximately 5 percent.
VELİ AĞBABA (Malatya) - 5 million families are hungry, and thanks to you, they cannot live without social assistance! Are you bragging about this, are you bragging about poverty!
ALIYE TEAM ERSEVER (Ankara) - What a shame, what a shame!
ORHAN YEGİN (Ankara) - Anyway, I do not intend to speak for too long, I will say a few things and retire, Mr. Ağbaba, if you allow.
The whole story you tell, all the data you give, all the bowls you draw in your tables, are all data from the last three years, let's be honest, four years. What you talk about with pleasure and unfortunately some of them are partially true
All the issues you are approaching are data from the last few years. Friends, we say "There is an extraordinary economy." We do not paint a rosy picture.
TAHSİN OCAKLI (Rize) - Why, 25 kuruş became 25 TL!
ORHAN YEGİN (Ankara) - We are also aware of the problems experienced by retirees.
GAMZE TAŞCIER (Ankara) - Who is responsible?
ALIYE TIMİSİ ERSEVER (Ankara) - But how did we get to this point?
ORHAN YEGİN (Ankara) - We are aware of how difficult it is to make ends meet on minimum wage. We are aware of how abnormally rising rents are and how much of the burden of life falls on the working, wage-earning and fixed-income segments, and we do not deny these.
VELİ AĞBABA (Malatya) - Friends, don't talk nonsense, Orhan Yegin is telling the truth (!) Are you surprised, what have you done!

ALIYE TEAM ERSEVER (Ankara) - So what are you doing?
VELİ AĞBABA (Malatya) - Friends, don't talk nonsense, Orhan Yegin is telling the truth(!)
ORHAN YEGİN (Ankara) - La ilahe illallah!
VELİ AĞBABA (Malatya) - In between, in between!
ORHAN YEGİN (Ankara) - We are also aware of the weight of the burden on the nation's shoulders, arising from the general state of the economy.
VELİ AĞBABA (Malatya) - Who broke it, was it broken during the single party period?
ORHAN YEGİN (Ankara) - We are aware of the problems that arise periodically, we do not reject them.
AHMET VEHBİ BAKIRLIOĞLU (Manisa) - Now these are chronic, chronic!
ORHAN YEGİN (Ankara) - We experienced drought, we have problems in agricultural production.
VELİ AĞBABA (Malatya) - It's frost, frost!
ORHAN YEGİN (Ankara) - We lived in the frost.
VELİ AĞBABA (Malatya) - Don lobby! Interest lobby! Superior mind!
ALIYE TIMİSİ ERSEVER (Ankara) - Link everything to the earthquake!
VELİ AĞBABA (Malatya) - Now we have found something new: Frost lobby, frost lobby!
YAŞAR KIRKPINAR (İzmir) - Oh, you too, interest rate lobby!
ORHAN YEGİN (Ankara) - We are also aware that the gap in income distribution that we closed in seventeen, eighteen years, during our twenty-odd years of power, has turned a little more against and behind those eighteen years in the last three, last four years.
VELİ AĞBABA (Malatya) - Let's say seven, seven, seven years.
ORHAN YEGİN (Ankara) - As you exemplified today.
VELİ AĞBABA (Malatya) - Let's say seven years!
AHMET VEHBİ BAKIRLIOĞLU (Manisa) - Beginning 2014.
ORHAN YEGİN (Ankara) - Oh, my friend.
VELİ AĞBABA (Malatya) - Let's say seven years, let's find the middle.
ORHAN YEGİN (Ankara) - La ilahe illallah! Wait a minute!
VELİ AĞBABA (Malatya) - Seven years. 2018.
ORHAN YEGİN (Ankara) - So you object to everything. We are also aware of this: "A civil servant could buy a house with his salary, can he today?" you said. That's right, we are aware of this too, let me even say something further: Let it be high level.
VELİ AĞBABA (Malatya) - I mean high level bureaucrats!
ORHAN YEGİN (Ankara) - Well, let alone a senior civil servant, if there are 2 people working in a house, even if they both earn minimum wage, we are aware that we are far away from a period that we built today, Mr. Ağbaba.
SADULLAH KISACIK (Adana) - He is talking about the Ali Babacan period.
ORHAN YEGİN (Ankara) - But while we are experiencing all this, we have not encountered problems arbitrarily where we stand.
VELİ AĞBABA (Malatya) - Why did this happen?
ORHAN YEGİN (Ankara) - Why did this happen, Mr. Ağbaba?
VELİ AĞBABA (Malatya) - From the frost, from the frost!
ORHAN YEGİN (Ankara) - In other words, we can throw everything into this, from the pandemic to the Ukrainian war, the earthquake we experienced after that, and the impact of the elections we have experienced consecutively.
VELİ AĞBABA (Malatya) - EYT, EYT. EYT did it!
ORHAN YEGİN (Ankara) - Dear Ağbaba, you can include all of them in this.
VELİ AĞBABA (Malatya) - Those retirees, they have no place to sleep(!

)
ORHAN YEGİN (Ankara) - In the final analysis, what I want to say is this: We are not the people who ignore these problems, the groups formed by those people, the alliance formed by those people, or the government or cabinet formed by those people here today; We are aware of all these problems, but we are also aware of what Türkiye can do, and we are trying to put forward that we are trying to bring something better to this country, as the staff that has seen and experienced these last three, four years, that is, not the last three years in our twenty-one, twenty-two, twenty-three-year story, but those seventeen, eighteen, twenty years before that; This is our effort.
VELİ AĞBABA (Malatya) - Mr. Orhan, while bringing these issues to the agenda, are we talking about the budget for 2025-26, maybe that's why we are talking about these?
ORHAN YEGİN (Ankara) - Therefore, we are not blind to the problems of the nation.
VELİ AĞBABA (Malatya) - We are not going to talk about the 2007 budget!
ORHAN YEGİN (Ankara) - We are not deaf to the nation's problems and the nation's cry; we hear it, we see it, we even experience it within ourselves, all together. Maybe you, as you are, may have friends in your group who also experience these problems, but we are struggling to create opportunities and opportunities that can overcome them, Mr. Ağbaba.
TAHSİN OCAKLI (Rize) - But you had many opportunities.
ORHAN YEGİN (Ankara) - We do not hide behind excuses, Mr. Ağbaba.
VELİ AĞBABA (Malatya) - He will cure you!
ORHAN YEGİN (Ankara) - "They did not give credit, I will cut off the water." "If they didn't do this, I will shut down social assistance." No, I don't know, "They don't give me the opportunity to do this." We do not hide behind excuses. No, "They collapsed on my SSI debt." I don't know, "They landed on my property." We don't say.
VELİ AĞBABA (Malatya) - Look, what CHP municipalities did, come.
ORHAN YEGİN (Ankara) - We also pay our debt.
CAVİT ARI (Antalya) - It is the AK PARTY municipalities that did this!
ORHAN YEGİN (Ankara) - We pay the salaries, we also build schools and roads.
CAVİT ARI (Antalya) - You are the ones who made the debt and got it cut off from us! Be ashamed!
ORHAN YEGİN (Ankara) - We are trying to do everything, Mr. Ağbaba, we are trying to do it all, okay?
VELİ AĞBABA (Malatya) - Go to Mansur Yavaş for a cup of tea and see what he does to tradesmen and retirees!
ORHAN YEGİN (Ankara) - We do not hide behind excuses and disappear like you.
CAVİT ARI (Antalya) - You are doing it!
VELİ AĞBABA (Malatya) - Drink Mansur Yavaş's tea, Mansur Yavaş's.
CHAIRMAN OF THE SESSION ORHAN ERDEM - Please friends. Mr. Orhan, please complete your speech.
YAŞAR KIRKPINAR (İzmir) - People remained without water for seventy-two hours!
CAVİT ARI (Antalya) - You incurred the debt, now you are deducting it from us!
ORHAN YEGİN (Ankara) - Now, friend "Taxes are collected, but they are spent on other places, not on schools, roads, health, social aid." he says.
YAŞAR KIRKPINAR (İzmir) - You are defending Mansur Yavaş!
CAVİT ARI (Antalya) - Will we defend you?
YAŞAR KIRKPINAR (İzmir) - Garbage, pits, mud, what are you defending?
CAVİT ARI (Antalya) - How do you know!
NİLGÜN ÖK (Denizli) - Pavements when it snows.
YAŞAR KIRKPINAR (İzmir) - At least don't defend the municipalities! We know! We are alive.

CAVİT ARI (Antalya) - You ruined the country!
CHAIRMAN OF THE SESSION ORHAN ERDEM - Mr. Kırkpınar, please.
VELİ AĞBABA (Malatya) - Drink your tea, your tea; Social assistance, let him tell you what he does.
YAŞAR KIRKPINAR (İzmir) - We live, look at İzmir, garbage, potholes and mud! They are all your municipalities!
CHAIRMAN OF THE SESSION ORHAN ERDEM - Friends, let Mr. Orhan complete his speech. Please.
VELİ AĞBABA (Malatya) - Orhan Yegin, drink Mansur Yavaş's tea and see the social aid.
YAŞAR KIRKPINAR (İzmir) - Profit, corruption, lawlessness, injustice.
CHAIRMAN OF THE SESSION ORHAN ERDEM - Mr. Orhan, continue.
Mr. Kırkpınar, please.
CAVİT ARI (Antalya) - You ruined the country, look at yourself!
ORHAN YEGİN (Ankara) - Now, friends who cannot stop praising the municipalities that cannot collect their garbage are the defenders of the municipalities that spend the taxes they collect and the shares from the state in concert expenses.
CAVİT ARI (Antalya) - We defend the concerts, do you have anything to say? We defend concerts!
ORHAN YEGİN (Ankara) - .biz "Taxes are collected, but they are spent on other places, not on schools, roads, health or social aid." he says.
CAVİT ARI (Antalya) - They should announce the budget of the Culture Road Festival.
ORHAN YEGİN (Ankara) - Another one.
CAVİT ARI (Antalya) - We defend concerts.
ORHAN YEGİN (Ankara) - Another one.
CAVİT ARI (Antalya) - Citizens see artists thanks to us, what's the big deal?
YAŞAR KIRKPINAR (İzmir) - Everything is clear.
AHMET VEHBİ BAKIRLIOĞLU (Manisa) - What is clear?
YAŞAR KIRKPINAR (İzmir) - You can see, the budget of the Culture Road Festival is clear and everything is explained.
ORHAN YEGİN (Ankara) - Another one.
CAVİT ARI (Antalya) - Let's explain and see. The Minister could not explain it here. The Minister could not explain for an hour. Come on explain!
ORHAN YEGİN (Ankara) - Another one is "Build a nursery instead of a university." he says.
VELİ AĞBABA (Malatya) - Is the nursery enough?
CAVİT ARI (Antalya) - Inform the Minister of Tourism so that he can come and explain.
YAŞAR KIRKPINAR (İzmir) - But you account for the concerts you didn't do. You are doing an imaginary concert!
ORHAN YEGİN (Ankara) - I say "Nursery is enough." I'm not saying. "Instead of building a university, build a nursery." he says, preferring one over the other.
CAVİT ARI (Antalya) - Let the Minister of Tourism come out and explain, tell me. Let him come and explain.
YAŞAR KIRKPINAR (İzmir) - They are open, there is nothing hidden.
AHMET VEHBİ BAKIRLIOĞLU (Manisa) - "They explain." something else "Explained." Anything else. He couldn't explain it last year. This year it happened in 30 provinces, let's see how he explains it.
YAŞAR KIRKPINAR (İzmir) - Explains, explains.
CAVİT ARI (Antalya) - Then why couldn't he explain it last year? He couldn't explain it last year, brother, he couldn't explain it here last year.
YAŞAR KIRKPINAR (İzmir) - Explains.
CAVİT ARI (Antalya) - Tell him to announce it this year.
YAŞAR KIRKPINAR (İzmir) - Even if he explains it, you will find something else.
AHMET VEHBİ BAKIRLIOĞLU (Manisa) - Well, why should we find it? "Let him explain." We already say.
ORHAN YEGİN (Ankara) - But our dear member of parliament.
CHAIRMAN OF THE SESSION ORHAN ERDEM - Mr. Orhan, please continue.
Mr. Arı, wait a minute, you have also spoken, let the friends finish their speeches.
ORHAN YEGİN (Ankara) - Now, someone says, "Taxes are collected, but they are spent on other places, not on schools, roads, or health."

" says, while another says, "Instead of building a university, build a nursery."
VELİ AĞBABA (Malatya) - Why are you answering these? The Vice President will answer these.
ORHAN YEGİN (Ankara) - .but a respected member of parliament also quoted a poem and said, "You are a nation's child who missed the bus." It's nice to add. Here, all our effort, the bus, train, plane, whatever you name that was hijacked in the last century.
AHMET VEHBİ BAKIRLIOĞLU (Manisa) - If you don't say "century" or something like that. What do you disagree with this century and the republic?
ORHAN YEGİN (Ankara) - This is all our effort to catch up with the era, even the missed era - I'm going further - and even get ahead of it.
Investment.
CAVİT ARI (Antalya) - You are a government that sells its institutions. You are a government that sold all the structures established during the nation's most difficult times.
ORHAN YEGİN (Ankara) - Investment.
AHMET VEHBİ BAKIRLIOĞLU (Manisa) - What is it that you do not like with this republic?
ORHAN YEGİN (Ankara) - Oh, investment.
AHMET VEHBİ BAKIRLIOĞLU (Manisa) - What is it, for God's sake, tell me!
ORHAN YEGİN (Ankara) - What does it have to do with it?
AHMET VEHBİ BAKIRLIOĞLU (Manisa) - You say "century", you are referring to the establishment of the republic
ORHAN YEGİN (Ankara) - Now, "You are the child of a nation that missed the bus." Based on the analogy, all our efforts are to catch up and prevent the bus, train, plane, era that was missed in the last century. When it comes to investment, production, employment, export; When I say read, think, apply, conclude; When we say one nation, one homeland, one flag, one state.
VELİ AĞBABA (Malatya) - You forgot about him by now.
AHMET VEHBİ BAKIRLIOĞLU (Manisa) - You were there in the twenty-five years of the century.
ORHAN YEGİN (Ankara) - When we say Türkiye without terrorism; When you say Togg, SİHA, TÜRKSAT, high-speed train, education, city hospitals.
VELİ AĞBABA (Malatya) - Mr. Orhan, you forgot Rabia, Rabia. Rabia left, Sisi came.
ORHAN YEGİN (Ankara) - Population growth rate means at least 3 children.
VELİ AĞBABA (Malatya) - What 3 children! People can't get married.
ORHAN YEGİN (Ankara) - While trying to support and grow science, art, cooperatives, technology, academia and rural development; Speaking of future professions, artificial intelligence, reliable and safe housing, food, agriculture, public garden, green transformation; Speaking of renewable energy, Gabar, drilling ships, hydrocarbons; Well, while emphasizing all of these, "Instead of doing that, do this." We don't say that, friends. "We have to do that, we have to do that, too." We say that we do not measure or care about development and progress under one heading; "We must develop altogether with all its elements, we must develop altogether with all its people." we say.
AHMET VEHBİ BAKIRLIOĞLU (Manisa) - Mr. Orhan, I looked at your speeches last year, you are doing the same thing.
ORHAN YEGİN (Ankara) - That's what we say, okay?
AHMET VEHBİ BAKIRLIOĞLU (Manisa) - You say the same things. You said "gabar" last time, you say "transformation", everything, everything.
ORHAN YEGİN (Ankara) - Yes, we do not discriminate. Gabar represents oil there. Gabar also represents enrichment from the Southeast there.
AHMET VEHBİ BAKIRLIOĞLU (Manisa) - Look, I'm telling you something. So what you said. Look at your speech last year, you say the same thing as you did last year.

ORHAN YEGİN (Ankara) - Therefore, the summary of the matter comes to this, friends: All our efforts, all our efforts. We have a strong leader, an experienced leader, a leader and a staff that the nation believes in, and this nation has achieved stability for more than twenty years and continues to do so. All our efforts are to catch up with this era with this stability.
CAVİT ARI (Antalya) - Bring the ballot box, see employment.
ORHAN YEGİN (Ankara) - A leader in its region, from the defense industry to technology, with a say in the world, not only politically, but also technologically, in terms of production and exports, in every aspect.
(The microphone was automatically turned off by the device)
ORHAN YEGİN (Ankara) - Let's build a country that has a fair and realistic say. A down-to-earth country with the actuarial balance of the social security system, peace, tranquility and brotherhood in everything.
Let's build it so that even if a happy man like Veli Ağbaba comes after that, the country will not be disrupted.
(Laughter from CHP benches)

records.originalTurkish:
ORHAN YEGİN (Ankara) - Başkanım, çok teşekkür ederim.
Öncelikle Plan ve Bütçe Komisyonu üyemiz Osmaniye Milletvekilimiz Sayın Seydi Gülsoy Ağabey'imizin babası rahmetli Mehmet amcamıza Allah'tan rahmet diliyorum, mekânı
cennet olsun. Seydi Gülsoy Vekilimizin babası rahmetli oldu, Allah rahmet eylesin.
OTURUM BAŞKANI ORHAN ERDEM - Seydi Gülsoy Vekilimizin babası rahmetli olmuştu. Vekilimiz hatırlattığı için teşekkür ediyoruz, Allah rahmet eylesin.
ORHAN YEGİN (Ankara) - Bu vesileyle, bütün hazırunun, hepsinin geçmişlerine rahmet dileyelim, Cenab-ı Allah mekânlarını cennet eylesin.
Değerli Başkanım, bugün buradasınız, daha önce yıllarca başkanlık da yaptınız. Tabii, Komisyonda kulağımızın çok aşina olduğu kavramları yeniden, bugün, burada duyduk. Sizin için yine bir tekrar oldu, nostalji de olmuş olabilir. "Sarayın bütçesi" "savaşın bütçesi" "tek adam bütçesi" "Fakirden alıp zengine verilen bütçe." "militarist bütçe" "Bu bütçe de genç yok, köylü yok, kadın yok." gibi kavramları yine duydunuz. Muhalefetteki arkadaşlar size bu anlamda küçük bir nostalji de yaşatmış oldular.
Şimdi, Sayın Ağbaba bugün dedi ki: "Meşruiyetinizi -sevgili dostum- Trump'tan almaya çalışıyorsunuz." diye bir ifade kullandı.
VELİ AĞBABA (Malatya) - Patronunuz sizin.
ORHAN YEGİN (Ankara) - "Onun dizinin dibinde meşruiyet arıyorsunuz." dedi. Oradan başlamak istiyorum ben.
VELİ AĞBABA (Malatya) - Trump'ın yalancısıyız biz.
ORHAN YEGİN (Ankara) - Sayın Ağbaba, girdiğimiz bütün seçimler ortada, Hep beraber girdik bu seçimlere, girdiğimiz bütün seçimler burada. Mağlup olanlar orada, sonuçlar da burada...
VELİ AĞBABA (Malatya) - Tom Barrack ne diyor? "Dışarıda konuşup laf atarlar, yanımıza geldiklerinde kedi gibi olurlar, kedi gibi!" Ben demiyorum. Trump'a söyle. Trump'a laf söyleyemiyorsun, Veli Ağbaba'ya laf söylüyorsun!
ORHAN YEGİN (Ankara) - Dolayısıyla, biz girdiğimiz her seçimde meşruiyetimizi her zaman milletimizden almışız. "Şaibeli seçim" falan diyorsunuz. Dünyanın hiçbir yerinde "diktatör" diye nitelendirdiğiniz bir kişi 0,5'le bir seçimi yeniden yenileyecek bir matematiği de bir düzeni de asla kabul etmez. Biz ilk girdiğimiz turda yüzde 49,5'la neticeye varamamış, ikinci tura gitmiş, ikinci turda da yüzde 52 küsurla gelmiş bir Cumhurbaşkanı ve bir Cumhur İttifakı'yız.
VELİ AĞBABA (Malatya) - Ya, bu meşruiyet meselesini ben söylemiyorum ki sen bana niye cevap veriyorsun! Benim lafım mı bu!
ORHAN YEGİN (Ankara) - Sayın Ocaklı bugün öyle bir şey söyledi de... Şaibeli seçimlere girdi...
VELİ AĞBABA (Malatya) - Trump'ın lafı, Trump'ın!
ORHAN YEGİN (Ankara) - Neyse devam edelim.
Bir öneride bulunmak istiyorum...
VELİ AĞBABA (Malatya) - Sen Tahsin Ocaklı'ya laf söyleyeceğine Trump'a söyle, Tom Barrack'a söyle!
ORHAN YEGİN (Ankara) - Mesela "Nas politikası, nas etkisi, bu işler nasla olmaz." diyen arkadaşlar oldu. Arkadaşlar, nas, ayetin karşılığı. Bir eleştiri yapacaksak birbirimize, ayet üzerinden, nas üzerinden, bu kavramı basitleştirerek...
ALİYE TİMİSİ ERSEVER (Ankara) - Ya, onu siz çıkardınız!
ORHAN YEGİN (Ankara) - Ben tavsiyemde bulunayım, siz yine diyeceğinizi deyin, yapacağınızı yapın; siz bilirsiniz. "nas" kavramını hafife alarak, nassı hafifleştirerek, dilde bayağılaştırarak yapmayın.
VELİ AĞBABA (Malatya) - Nassı biz mi söyledik?
ORHAN YEGİN (Ankara) - Şöyle eleştiri yapabiliriz mesela: İşte, faiz sebeptir enflasyon sonuç...
VELİ AĞBABA (Malatya) - Orhan Bey, nasıl konuşacağımıza da mı sen karar vereceksin!
ORHAN YEGİN (Ankara) - Veli ağabey, ben tavsiyemi yapayım, sen yine ne yaparsan yap. Hani sebep, sonuç; faiz, enflasyon tartışmaları da vardı, onlar üzerinden de gidebilirsiniz ama nas, bu milletin bir kutsalı, bu inancın bir kutsalı. Dolayısıyla Sayın Cumhurbaşkanı "Nassın da bu bir gereğidir." diye bir temellendirilmesini güçlendirilmiştir ama ben söyleyeceğimi söyledim, üzerine alan alır, almayan almaz. Ben çok dostane bir tavsiyede bulundum. Siyaset yapıyorsunuz, milletin ortak değerleri bunlar, bu milletin inancını ifade eden kavramlar. Bence bunları hafife almamak daha doğru olur ama siz yine ne yapıyorsanız onu siz bilirsiniz, bir şey demiyorum.
Şimdi "Yolsuzluk yapanlar, kanunsuzluk yapanlar kollanıyor." denildi. Biz de öyle olmuyor Sayın Ocak'lı, sizin örnekler üzerinden gideyim. Bize atfen "Merkez Bankası Başkan Yardımcısı yolsuzluk yaptı." dediniz. Korundu mu, ne oldu? Tutuklandı.
TAHSİN OCAKLI (Rize) - Ben yaptığını söyledim.
ORHAN YEGİN (Ankara) - Makam aracıyla sınırda insan kaçakçılığı yaptığını söylediğiniz bir tuğgeneral vardı. Ne oldu, kollandı mı? Tutuklandı. Biz de öyle olmuyor Sayın Ocaklı, AK PARTİ'li belediye başkanı olup yolsuzlukla gündem olan belediye başkanları -il, ilçe sayabiliriz de bunları- vardı, ne oldu bunlar, kayrıldı mı? Tutuklandı.
VELİ AĞBABA (Malatya) - Ya, hangisi cezaevine...
ORHAN YEGİN (Ankara) - On iki yıl ceza alan var, sekiz yıl ceza alan var, yedi yıl ceza alan var. Bizim belediye başkanlarımız tutuklandı.
VELİ AĞBABA (Malatya) - Hangisine kayyum atandı?
ORHAN YEGİN (Ankara) - Ne oldu? Sokaklar ayağa mı kaldırıldı? Nümayişler mi oldu? Ne oldu? Kafeler mi taşlandı? Ne oldu Sayın Ağbaba? Bizde öyle bir şey yok, bizde öyle yok.
VELİ AĞBABA (Malatya) - Söylesene bir belediye başkanınız sabah baskınıyla göz altına alındı mı, kayyum atandı mı?
ORHAN YEGİN (Ankara) - Peki, bütün salonun vicdanına sesleniyorum:
Bunlar CHP'de olduğu zaman ne oluyor, bu tarz işler, ne oluyor, ne oluyor Sayın Ağbaba?
VELİ AĞBABA (Malatya) - Siz CHP'ye savaş açmışsınız. Bırakın, senin Cumhurbaşkanın, belediye başkanın nasıl yargılanıyorsa bizimki de öyle yargılansın!
GAMZE TAŞCIER (Ankara) - Aşçısı vardı, aşçısı, hapishanede!
ÖMER FETHİ GÜRER (Niğde) - Orhan Bey, bak, ne hâle düşürdünüz, parada cezaevindeki adamın imzası var!
OTURUM BAŞKANI ORHAN ERDEM - Ya, karşılıklı konuşmaya döndü.
Orhan Bey, devam edin.
ORHAN YEGİN (Ankara) - Ne oldu o da, tamam, ne oldu o adam? Yani biz birisini bir yere atadık diye, birisinin bir yere atanmasına vesile olduk diye veya yetki kullandık, atadık diye onu denetimden muaf mı tuttuk?
ÖMER FETHİ GÜRER (Niğde) - Şu anda bu adamın imzaladığı parayı taşıyoruz, bu ayıp yeterli!
ORHAN YEGİN (Ankara) - Denetimden muaf tutmakla kalmayıp yolsuzluğuna, yanlışına şahit olduğumuzda onun biz orada üstünü örttük mü?
VELİ AĞBABA (Malatya) - AK PARTİ Bayrampaşa İlçe Başkanı ne oldu öyle? Cevap versene!
AHMET VEHBİ BAKIRLIOĞLU (Manisa) - Kütahya Belediye Başkanını niye ayırdınız peki dosyada?
ORHAN YEGİN (Ankara) - Sizin yaptığınız gibi sokaklara çıkıp nümayiş mi yaptık? Söylemek istediğim bu.
VELİ AĞBABA (Malatya) - Zeydan Karalar'a ayrı hukuk... AK PARTİ Bayrampaşa İlçe Başkanının evinden çıkan paraları söylesene!
ORHAN YEGİN (Ankara) - Neyse, dönelim konuya, başka bir yere gelelim.
(CHP sıralarından laf atmalar, gürültüler)
ÖMER FETHİ GÜRER (Niğde) - Türkiye Cumhuriyeti tarihinde ilk defa paranın üstünde imzası olan kişi...
VELİ AĞBABA (Malatya) - Erzurum Milletvekilini söylesene!
ORHAN YEGİN (Ankara) - İnsanoğlu yapar; denetleyeceksin, kurallarını koyacaksın, denetlemeni yapacaksın, "Benim atadığım adamdır, benim Cumhurbaşkanı adayımdır, benim belediye başkanımdır." demeyeceksin.
ÖMER FETHİ GÜRER (Niğde) - Ama ne hâle gelmiş memleket ya!
AHMET VEHBİ BAKIRLIOĞLU (Manisa) - Bakanlığına dezenfektan satıyor, üstelik pandemi döneminde...
ORHAN YEGİN (Ankara) - Kim yanlış yapmışsa, kim yolsuzluğa bulaşmışsa üstüne gideceksin, mesele bu, söylemek istediğim bu.
VELİ AĞBABA (Malatya) - Yargılansın, yargılansın! Sana yapılan hukuk farklı, CHP'ye farklı; olacak iş mi?
ORHAN YEGİN (Ankara) - Başkanım, devam edemiyorum.
OTURUM BAŞKANI ORHAN ERDEM - Orhan Bey, lütfen devam edin.
GAMZE TAŞCIER (Ankara) - Ankara'yı parsel parsel sattığını söyleyen sizin arkadaşınızdı!
VELİ AĞBABA (Malatya) - Senin bir belediye başkanın gözaltına alındı mı sabah baskınında?
OTURUM BAŞKANI ORHAN ERDEM - Veli Bey... Sayın Veli Ağbaba... Lütfen...
ORHAN YEGİN (Ankara) - Şimdi, tartışmaya dünyanın kaçıncı büyük ekonomisi olduğumuz üzerinden...
VELİ AĞBABA (Malatya) - Ankara'ya gel! Çok iyi biliyorsun seçim bölgeni, gel, Ankara'ya gel!
ORHAN YEGİN (Ankara) - Tamam, bitti mi? Yeter, tamam, anlaşıldı, mesajın da anlaşıldı.
VELİ AĞBABA (Malatya) - Ankara'ya gel!
ORHAN YEGİN (Ankara) - Şimdi, tartışmayı dünyanın kaçıncı büyük ekonomisi olduğumuz üzerinden verilen rakamlarla yürütüyoruz gibi bir suçlamaya muhatap olduk. Şimdi, bu sürekli yapılan bir kıyas arkadaşlar yani bir ülkenin dünya ekonomileri sıralamasında kaçıncı sırada olduğu, seneye kaçıncı sıraya geldiği, kaça düştüğü, kaça çıktığı her sene tartışılan, herkes tarafından izlenen bir kavram ama bunun içerikleri üzerinden bazı tartışmalar oldu, kıymetlidir ama bu tüm yıllarda altı çizilen bir kavramdır, o yüzden bu bütçede de bu kavramın altı çizildi. Ama muhalefet ne yapıyor ama Veli Ağbaba sen ne yapıyorsun? Konuşmanı ve konuşmanızı yaparken hangi ürün işinize, hangi veri işinize geliyorsa oradan gidiyorsunuz. Bu sene soğanın mı fiyatı yükselmiş, bu sene asgari ücreti soğana bölüyorsunuz.
VELİ AĞBABA (Malatya) - Sen ne yapıyorsun?
ORHAN YEGİN (Ankara) - Geçen sene marul, kıvırcık mı pik yapmış, tavan yapmış, bütün verileri marula ve kıvırcığa bölüyorsunuz.
VELİ AĞBABA (Malatya) - Sen eleştiriyor musun Allah aşkına? Bir cümle eleştir, bir cümle eleştirsene!
GAMZE TAŞCIER (Ankara) - Gıda enflasyonunda kaçıncıyız dünyada, siz söyleyin!
ORHAN YEGİN (Ankara) - Bu sene ne yaptın? Üst üste rekorlar kıran altın üzerinden geldin, hesabını yaptın.
VELİ AĞBABA (Malatya) - Sen tahmin ettiğimden daha akıllı bir adamsın! Sen soğan üzerinden gel, domates üzerinden gel!
ORHAN YEGİN (Ankara) - Biz her sene konuşulan veriler üzerinden geliyoruz, siz hangi sene hangi veri işinize gelirse oradan geliyorsunuz.
TAHSİN OCAKLI (Rize) - Orhan Vekilim, gıda enflasyonunu bir söyle.
VELİ AĞBABA (Malatya) - Domatesten gel sen de, ben altından geldim, de ki...
ORHAN YEGİN (Ankara) - Ya, şöyle, söylediği yalan demiyorum, işine gelen veri üzerinden geliyor diyorum.
VELİ AĞBABA (Malatya) - Haa...
ORHAN YEGİN (Ankara) - Şimdi, biz her sene "Türkiye ekonomisi kaçıncı sırada, her sene ihracatımız nereye geldi, her sene cari açığımız ne oldu?" diye her sene aynı kavramlar üzerinden gidiyoruz ama siz her sene pazarda en yüksek ne varsa onu alıp onun üzerinden geliyorsunuz, tamam mı? Onu söylemek istiyorum.
VELİ AĞBABA (Malatya) - Ya, sen de en düşüğünden hesapla, de ki: "Domatese göre asgari ücretin alım gücünde düşme olmamıştır." de, bir tane söyle.
ORHAN YEGİN (Ankara) - "Sosyal yardımlara yeterli pay ayrılmıyor." dedi bugün arkadaşlar, "Sosyal harcamalar iyileşmiyor." dedi, "Sosyal yardım nedir?" dedi, tarif etti "Ücretsiz eğitimdir, sağlıktır, yoldur, şartsız herkese bu hizmetleri eşit sunmaktır." dedi. Türkiye'de bununla ilgili hiç bir problem yok, Türkiye'de devletin ürettiği bütün hizmetler hiç bir ayrıma tabi tutulmaksızın, bölge ayrımına tabi tutulmaksızın, mezhep ayrımına tabi tutulmaksızın hepsine eşit şekilde dağıtılmaktadır.
TAHSİN OCAKLI (Rize) - Verilmiyor.
ORHAN YEGİN (Ankara) - Dolayısıyla burada bir sorun yok.
VELİ AĞBABA (Malatya) - Sen buna inanıyor musun?
ORHAN YEGİN (Ankara) - Veli Ağbaba, sosyal yardımın AK PARTİ iktidar olmadan önce bütçedeki payı 0,04 yani yaklaşık yarım idi, yaklaşık yarım puan idi.
(CHP sıralarından laf atmalar, gürültüler)
ORHAN YEGİN (Ankara) - Ama bugün sosyal yardımın bizim bütçemizden aldığı pay yaklaşık yüzde 5.
VELİ AĞBABA (Malatya) - 5 milyon aile aç, sayenizde sosyal yardım almadan yaşayamıyor! Bununla mı övünüyorsun, fakirlikle mi övünüyorsun!
ALİYE TİMİSİ ERSEVER (Ankara) - Yazık, yazık!
ORHAN YEGİN (Ankara) - Neyse, çok uzun konuşma niyetinde değilim, birkaç bir şey söyleyip çekileceğim Sayın Ağbaba, müsaade edersen.
Anlattığınız bütün hikâye, verdiğiniz bütün veriler, tablolarınızda çizdiğiniz bütün çanaklar, hepsi son üç yılın, hadi, sizden yana konuşalım, dört yılın verisi. Üzerinde keyifle bahsettiğiniz ve maalesef bazılarında doğruya kısmen
yaklaştığınız hususların hepsi son birkaç yılın verisi. Arkadaşlar, biz "Olağanüstü bir ekonomi var." diye pembe bir tablo çizmiyoruz.
TAHSİN OCAKLI (Rize) - Niye, 25 kuruş 25 TL oldu!
ORHAN YEGİN (Ankara) - Biz de emeklinin yaşadığı sorunların farkındayız.
GAMZE TAŞCIER (Ankara) - Sorumlusu kim?
ALİYE TİMİSİ ERSEVER (Ankara) - İyi de nasıl bu noktaya geldik?
ORHAN YEGİN (Ankara) - Biz de asgari ücretle geçim etmenin ne kadar zor olduğunun farkındayız. Biz de kiraların ne kadar anormal bir şekilde yükseldiğinin, çalışan, ücretli kesimin, sabit gelirli kesimlerin omzuna hayatın yükünün ne kadar bindiğinin farkındayız, biz bunları inkâr etmiyoruz.
VELİ AĞBABA (Malatya) - Arkadaşlar, laf atmayın, Orhan Yegin gerçekleri söylüyor(!) Şaştın mı ne yaptın sen!
ALİYE TİMİSİ ERSEVER (Ankara) - Ne yapıyorsunuz peki?
VELİ AĞBABA (Malatya) - Arkadaşlar, laf atmayın, Orhan Yegin gerçekleri söylüyor(!)
ORHAN YEGİN (Ankara) - La ilahe illallah!
VELİ AĞBABA (Malatya) - Arada, arada yani!
ORHAN YEGİN (Ankara) - Biz de ekonominin genel durumundan kaynaklanan, milletin omuzlarında olan yükün ağırlığının da farkındayız...
VELİ AĞBABA (Malatya) - Kim bozdu, tek parti döneminde mi bozuldu?

records.englishTranslation:
ORHAN YEGİN (Ankara) - President, thank you very much.
First of all, I wish God's mercy to our late uncle Mehmet, father of our Planning and Budget Commission member and Osmaniye Deputy, Mr. Seydi Gülsoy.
God bless you. The father of our Deputy Seydi Gülsoy passed away, may God have mercy on him.
CHAIRMAN OF THE SESSION ORHAN ERDEM - The father of our Deputy Seydi Gülsoy passed away. We thank our representative for reminding us, may God have mercy on him.
ORHAN YEGİN (Ankara) - On this occasion, let us wish mercy on the past of all those present, may God grant them a place in heaven.
Dear President, you are here today, you have been president for years before. Of course, we heard the concepts that we are very familiar with in the Commission again, today, here. It was a repetition for you, maybe it was nostalgia. "Budget of the palace" "budget of war" "budget of one man" "Budget taken from the poor and given to the rich." "militarist budget" "There are no young people, no peasants, no women in this budget." You've heard concepts like this again. Friends in the opposition have also given you a little nostalgia in this sense.
Now, Mr. Ağbaba said today: "You are trying to take your legitimacy from Trump - my dear friend." He said:
VELİ AĞBABA (Malatya) - You are the boss.
ORHAN YEGİN (Ankara) - "You are looking for legitimacy under his knee." he said. I want to start from there.
VELİ AĞBABA (Malatya) - We are Trump's liars.
ORHAN YEGİN (Ankara) - Mr. Ağbaba, all the elections we participated in are obvious. We entered these elections together, all the elections we participated in are here. The losers are there, the results are here.
VELI AĞBABA (Malatya) - What does Tom Barrack say? "They talk and talk outside, but when they come to us, they become like cats, like cats!" I'm not saying. Tell Trump. You can't say anything to Trump, you talk to Veli Agbaba!
ORHAN YEGİN (Ankara) - Therefore, we have always received our legitimacy from our nation in every election we have participated in. You say "questionable choice" or something. Nowhere in the world would a person you describe as a "dictator" accept a method or a system that would renew an election with 0.5 percent. We are a President and a People's Alliance who could not reach a result with 49.5 percent in the first round, went to the second round, and came with 52 percent in the second round.
VELİ AĞBABA (Malatya) - Well, I am not talking about this issue of legitimacy, why are you answering me! Is this my point!
ORHAN YEGİN (Ankara) - Mr. Ocaklı said something like that today. He entered questionable elections.
VELİ AĞBABA (Malatya) - Trump's words, Trump's!
ORHAN YEGİN (Ankara) - Anyway, let's continue.
I want to make a suggestion.
VELİ AĞBABA (Malatya) - Instead of criticizing Tahsin Ocaklı, say it to Trump, tell it to Tom Barrack!
ORHAN YEGİN (Ankara) - For example, "Nas policy, Nas influence, how can these things not happen?" There were friends who said. Friends, the verse is the equivalent of the verse. If we are going to criticize each other, we should use the verse, the nas, and simplify this concept.
ALIYE TEAM ERSEVER (Ankara) - Oh, you took him out!
ORHAN YEGİN (Ankara) - Let me give you my advice, say what you say and do what you will; you know.

Do not underestimate the concept of "nas", make light of the nas, or vulgarize it in language.
VELİ AĞBABA (Malatya) - Did we say what?
ORHAN YEGİN (Ankara) - For example, we can criticize like this: Here, interest is the cause and inflation is the result.
VELİ AĞBABA (Malatya) - Mr. Orhan, you will decide how we will talk!
ORHAN YEGİN (Ankara) - Brother Brother, let me give you my advice, you do whatever you want. You know, cause and effect; There were also discussions on interest and inflation, you can go through them, but what is sacred is a sacred of this nation, a sacred of this faith. Therefore, Mr. President, "This is a requirement of Nass." But I said what I would say, those who take it will take it, those who don't take it will not take it. I gave very friendly advice. You are doing politics, these are the common values ​​of the nation, the concepts that express the belief of this nation. I think it would be better not to take these lightly, but you know what you are doing, I'm not saying anything.
Now, "Those who commit corruption and lawlessness are being protected." It was said. That's not the case with us either, Mr. Ocakli, let me go through your examples. Referring to us, "The Deputy Governor of the Central Bank committed corruption." you said. Was it protected, what happened? He was arrested.
TAHSİN OCAKLI (Rize) - I said he did it.
ORHAN YEGİN (Ankara) - There was a brigadier general who you said was smuggling people at the border with his official vehicle. What happened, was he taken care of? He was arrested. That's not the case with us, Mr. Ocaklı, there were mayors - we can count them as provinces or districts - who were AK PARTY mayors and were on the agenda for corruption. What happened, were they favored? He was arrested.
VELİ AĞBABA (Malatya) - Well, which one goes to prison?
ORHAN YEGİN (Ankara) - There are those who were sentenced to twelve years, there are those who were sentenced to eight years, there are those who were sentenced to seven years. Our mayors were arrested.
VELİ AĞBABA (Malatya) - Which trustee was appointed?
ORHAN YEGİN (Ankara) - What happened? Have the streets been roused? Were there demonstrations? What happened? Were cafes stoned? What happened, Mr. Baba? We don't have anything like that, we don't have that.
VELİ AĞBABA (Malatya) - Tell me, was any of your mayors taken into custody during the morning raid or was a trustee appointed?
ORHAN YEGİN (Ankara) - Well, I appeal to the conscience of the entire hall:
What happens when these things happen in CHP, these kinds of things, what happens, Mr. Ağbaba?
VELİ AĞBABA (Malatya) - You declared war on CHP. Let ours be tried the same way your President and Mayor are tried!
GAMZE TAŞCIER (Ankara) - He had a cook, his cook is in prison!
ÖMER FETHI GÜRER (Niğde) - Mr. Orhan, look what you have done, the money has the signature of the man in prison!
CHAIRMAN OF THE SESSION ORHAN ERDEM - Well, it turned into a conversation.
Mr. Orhan, continue.
ORHAN YEGİN (Ankara) - What happened, okay, what happened to that man? So, just because we appointed someone to a place, because we were instrumental in someone being appointed to a place, or because we exercised authority or appointed him, did we exempt him from inspection?
ÖMER FETHI GÜRER (Niğde) - We are currently carrying the money signed by this man, this is shameful enough!
ORHAN YEGİN (Ankara) - Did we not only exempt him from inspection, but also cover him up when we witnessed his corruption and wrongdoing?
VELİ AĞBABA (Malatya) - AK PARTY Bayrampaşa District Chairman, what happened?

Answer me!
AHMET VEHBİ BAKIRLIOĞLU (Manisa) - Why did you single out the Mayor of Kütahya in the file?
ORHAN YEGİN (Ankara) - Did we go out to the streets and demonstrate like you did? That's what I want to say.
VELİ AĞBABA (Malatya) - Separate law for Zeydan Karalar. Tell me about the money that came out of the house of AK PARTY Bayrampaşa District Chairman!
ORHAN YEGİN (Ankara) - Anyway, let's get back to the topic and come to another place.
(Challenging words and noise from CHP benches)
ÖMER FETHI GÜRER (Niğde) - The person whose signature was on money for the first time in the history of the Republic of Türkiye.
VELİ AĞBABA (Malatya) - Name the Erzurum Deputy!
ORHAN YEGİN (Ankara) - Human beings do; You will supervise, you will set the rules, you will supervise, "He is the man I appointed, he is my presidential candidate, he is my mayor." You won't say.
ÖMER FETHI GÜRER (Niğde) - But what has become of the country!
AHMET VEHBİ BAKIRLIOĞLU (Manisa) - He sells disinfectant to the Ministry, especially during the pandemic period.
ORHAN YEGİN (Ankara) - You will go after whoever has done wrong, whoever is involved in corruption, that is the issue, that is what I want to say.
VELİ AĞBABA (Malatya) - Let him be tried, let him be tried! The law applied to you is different, to the CHP; Will it work?
ORHAN YEGİN (Ankara) - President, I cannot continue.
CHAIRMAN OF THE SESSION ORHAN ERDEM - Mr. Orhan, please continue.
GAMZE TAŞCIER (Ankara) - It was your friend who said that he sold Ankara parcel by parcel!
VELİ AĞBABA (Malatya) - Was one of your mayors detained during the morning raid?
CHAIRMAN OF THE SESSION ORHAN ERDEM - Mr. Veli. Dear Veli Ağbaba. Please.
ORHAN YEGİN (Ankara) - Now, let's discuss the world's largest economy.
VELİ AĞBABA (Malatya) - Come to Ankara! You know your constituency very well, come, come to Ankara!
ORHAN YEGİN (Ankara) - OK, is it over? That's enough, okay, it's understood, your message is also understood.
VELİ AĞBABA (Malatya) - Come to Ankara!
ORHAN YEGİN (Ankara) - Now, we have been accused of saying that we are conducting the discussion with the figures given based on the world's largest economy. Now, this is a constant comparison, friends, that is, where a country ranks in the world economy rankings, what rank it comes to next year, how much it falls, how much it rises, is a concept that is discussed every year and followed by everyone, but there have been some discussions about its content, it is valuable, but this is a concept that has been underlined in all years, so this concept has been underlined in this budget as well. But what is the opposition doing, but Veli Ağbaba, what are you doing? While you are making your speech and talk, you go from whichever product suits your business and whichever data suits your business. Did the price of onions increase this year? This year, you divide the minimum wage by onions.
VELİ AĞBABA (Malatya) - What are you doing?
ORHAN YEGİN (Ankara) - Last year, lettuce peaked or peaked. You divide all the data into lettuce and curly.
VELİ AĞBABA (Malatya) - Are you criticizing, for God's sake? Criticize a sentence, criticize a sentence!
GAMZE TAŞCIER (Ankara) - You tell us where we rank in food inflation in the world!
ORHAN YEGİN (Ankara) - What did you do this year? You came from gold that broke records one after another, you did your calculations.
VELİ AĞBABA (Malatya) - You are a smarter man than I expected!

You come over onion, come over tomato!
ORHAN YEGİN (Ankara) - We come from the data discussed every year, you come from whatever data suits you in any year.
TAHSİN OCAKLI (Rize) - Orhan Deputy, tell me about food inflation.
VELİ AĞBABA (Malatya) - You come from tomatoes, say I came from gold.
ORHAN YEGİN (Ankara) - Well, I'm not saying that what he says is a lie, I'm saying that he comes from the data that suits him.
VELİ AĞBABA (Malatya) - Oh.
ORHAN YEGİN (Ankara) - Now, every year we ask, "What is the rank of the Turkish economy, where did our exports come every year, what was our current account deficit every year?" We go through the same concepts every year, but you take whatever is highest in the market every year and work on it, okay? I want to say it.
VELİ AĞBABA (Malatya) - Well, calculate from the lowest, and say: "There has been no decrease in the purchasing power of the minimum wage compared to tomatoes." Say, tell me one.
ORHAN YEGİN (Ankara) - "Not enough share is allocated for social aid." said friends today, "Social spending is not improving." he said, "What is social assistance?" he said and described it as "Free education, health, roads, providing these services equally to everyone without any conditions." he said. There is no problem with this in Türkiye. In Türkiye, all services produced by the state are distributed equally to all, without any discrimination, without discrimination of region, without discrimination of sect.
TAHSİN OCAKLI (Rize) - Not given.
ORHAN YEGİN (Ankara) - Therefore, there is no problem here.
VELİ AĞBABA (Malatya) - Do you believe this?
ORHAN YEGİN (Ankara) - Veli Ağbaba, before the AK PARTY came to power, the share of social aid in the budget was 0.04, that is, approximately half a point.
(Challenging words and noise from CHP benches)
ORHAN YEGİN (Ankara) - But today, the share of social aid in our budget is approximately 5 percent.
VELİ AĞBABA (Malatya) - 5 million families are hungry, and thanks to you, they cannot live without social assistance! Are you bragging about this, are you bragging about poverty!
ALIYE TEAM ERSEVER (Ankara) - What a shame, what a shame!
ORHAN YEGİN (Ankara) - Anyway, I do not intend to speak for too long, I will say a few things and retire, Mr. Ağbaba, if you allow.
The whole story you tell, all the data you give, all the bowls you draw in your tables, are all data from the last three years, let's be honest, four years. What you talk about with pleasure and unfortunately some of them are partially true
All the issues you are approaching are data from the last few years. Friends, we say "There is an extraordinary economy." We do not paint a rosy picture.
TAHSİN OCAKLI (Rize) - Why, 25 kuruş became 25 TL!
ORHAN YEGİN (Ankara) - We are also aware of the problems experienced by retirees.
GAMZE TAŞCIER (Ankara) - Who is responsible?
ALIYE TIMİSİ ERSEVER (Ankara) - But how did we get to this point?
ORHAN YEGİN (Ankara) - We are aware of how difficult it is to make ends meet on minimum wage. We are aware of how abnormally rising rents are and how much of the burden of life falls on the working, wage-earning and fixed-income segments, and we do not deny these.
VELİ AĞBABA (Malatya) - Friends, don't talk nonsense, Orhan Yegin is telling the truth (!) Are you surprised, what have you done!

ALIYE TEAM ERSEVER (Ankara) - So what are you doing?
VELİ AĞBABA (Malatya) - Friends, don't talk nonsense, Orhan Yegin is telling the truth(!)
ORHAN YEGİN (Ankara) - La ilahe illallah!
VELİ AĞBABA (Malatya) - In between, in between!
ORHAN YEGİN (Ankara) - We are also aware of the weight of the burden on the nation's shoulders, arising from the general state of the economy.
VELİ AĞBABA (Malatya) - Who broke it, was it broken during the single party period?
ORHAN YEGİN (Ankara) - We are aware of the problems that arise periodically, we do not reject them.
AHMET VEHBİ BAKIRLIOĞLU (Manisa) - Now these are chronic, chronic!
ORHAN YEGİN (Ankara) - We experienced drought, we have problems in agricultural production.
VELİ AĞBABA (Malatya) - It's frost, frost!
ORHAN YEGİN (Ankara) - We lived in the frost.
VELİ AĞBABA (Malatya) - Don lobby! Interest lobby! Superior mind!
ALIYE TIMİSİ ERSEVER (Ankara) - Link everything to the earthquake!
VELİ AĞBABA (Malatya) - Now we have found something new: Frost lobby, frost lobby!
YAŞAR KIRKPINAR (İzmir) - Oh, you too, interest rate lobby!
ORHAN YEGİN (Ankara) - We are also aware that the gap in income distribution that we closed in seventeen, eighteen years, during our twenty-odd years of power, has turned a little more against and behind those eighteen years in the last three, last four years.
VELİ AĞBABA (Malatya) - Let's say seven, seven, seven years.
ORHAN YEGİN (Ankara) - As you exemplified today.
VELİ AĞBABA (Malatya) - Let's say seven years!
AHMET VEHBİ BAKIRLIOĞLU (Manisa) - Beginning 2014.
ORHAN YEGİN (Ankara) - Oh, my friend.
VELİ AĞBABA (Malatya) - Let's say seven years, let's find the middle.
ORHAN YEGİN (Ankara) - La ilahe illallah! Wait a minute!
VELİ AĞBABA (Malatya) - Seven years. 2018.
ORHAN YEGİN (Ankara) - So you object to everything. We are also aware of this: "A civil servant could buy a house with his salary, can he today?" you said. That's right, we are aware of this too, let me even say something further: Let it be high level.
VELİ AĞBABA (Malatya) - I mean high level bureaucrats!
ORHAN YEGİN (Ankara) - Well, let alone a senior civil servant, if there are 2 people working in a house, even if they both earn minimum wage, we are aware that we are far away from a period that we built today, Mr. Ağbaba.
SADULLAH KISACIK (Adana) - He is talking about the Ali Babacan period.
ORHAN YEGİN (Ankara) - But while we are experiencing all this, we have not encountered problems arbitrarily where we stand.
VELİ AĞBABA (Malatya) - Why did this happen?
ORHAN YEGİN (Ankara) - Why did this happen, Mr. Ağbaba?
VELİ AĞBABA (Malatya) - From the frost, from the frost!
ORHAN YEGİN (Ankara) - In other words, we can throw everything into this, from the pandemic to the Ukrainian war, the earthquake we experienced after that, and the impact of the elections we have experienced consecutively.
VELİ AĞBABA (Malatya) - EYT, EYT. EYT did it!
ORHAN YEGİN (Ankara) - Dear Ağbaba, you can include all of them in this.
VELİ AĞBABA (Malatya) - Those retirees, they have no place to sleep(!

)
ORHAN YEGİN (Ankara) - In the final analysis, what I want to say is this: We are not the people who ignore these problems, the groups formed by those people, the alliance formed by those people, or the government or cabinet formed by those people here today; We are aware of all these problems, but we are also aware of what Türkiye can do, and we are trying to put forward that we are trying to bring something better to this country, as the staff that has seen and experienced these last three, four years, that is, not the last three years in our twenty-one, twenty-two, twenty-three-year story, but those seventeen, eighteen, twenty years before that; This is our effort.
VELİ AĞBABA (Malatya) - Mr. Orhan, while bringing these issues to the agenda, are we talking about the budget for 2025-26, maybe that's why we are talking about these?
ORHAN YEGİN (Ankara) - Therefore, we are not blind to the problems of the nation.
VELİ AĞBABA (Malatya) - We are not going to talk about the 2007 budget!
ORHAN YEGİN (Ankara) - We are not deaf to the nation's problems and the nation's cry; we hear it, we see it, we even experience it within ourselves, all together. Maybe you, as you are, may have friends in your group who also experience these problems, but we are struggling to create opportunities and opportunities that can overcome them, Mr. Ağbaba.
TAHSİN OCAKLI (Rize) - But you had many opportunities.
ORHAN YEGİN (Ankara) - We do not hide behind excuses, Mr. Ağbaba.
VELİ AĞBABA (Malatya) - He will cure you!
ORHAN YEGİN (Ankara) - "They did not give credit, I will cut off the water." "If they didn't do this, I will shut down social assistance." No, I don't know, "They don't give me the opportunity to do this." We do not hide behind excuses. No, "They collapsed on my SSI debt." I don't know, "They landed on my property." We don't say.
VELİ AĞBABA (Malatya) - Look, what CHP municipalities did, come.
ORHAN YEGİN (Ankara) - We also pay our debt.
CAVİT ARI (Antalya) - It is the AK PARTY municipalities that did this!
ORHAN YEGİN (Ankara) - We pay the salaries, we also build schools and roads.
CAVİT ARI (Antalya) - You are the ones who made the debt and got it cut off from us! Be ashamed!
ORHAN YEGİN (Ankara) - We are trying to do everything, Mr. Ağbaba, we are trying to do it all, okay?
VELİ AĞBABA (Malatya) - Go to Mansur Yavaş for a cup of tea and see what he does to tradesmen and retirees!
ORHAN YEGİN (Ankara) - We do not hide behind excuses and disappear like you.
CAVİT ARI (Antalya) - You are doing it!
VELİ AĞBABA (Malatya) - Drink Mansur Yavaş's tea, Mansur Yavaş's.
CHAIRMAN OF THE SESSION ORHAN ERDEM - Please friends. Mr. Orhan, please complete your speech.
YAŞAR KIRKPINAR (İzmir) - People remained without water for seventy-two hours!
CAVİT ARI (Antalya) - You incurred the debt, now you are deducting it from us!
ORHAN YEGİN (Ankara) - Now, friend "Taxes are collected, but they are spent on other places, not on schools, roads, health, social aid." he says.
YAŞAR KIRKPINAR (İzmir) - You are defending Mansur Yavaş!
CAVİT ARI (Antalya) - Will we defend you?
YAŞAR KIRKPINAR (İzmir) - Garbage, pits, mud, what are you defending?
CAVİT ARI (Antalya) - How do you know!
NİLGÜN ÖK (Denizli) - Pavements when it snows.
YAŞAR KIRKPINAR (İzmir) - At least don't defend the municipalities! We know! We are alive.

CAVİT ARI (Antalya) - You ruined the country!
CHAIRMAN OF THE SESSION ORHAN ERDEM - Mr. Kırkpınar, please.
VELİ AĞBABA (Malatya) - Drink your tea, your tea; Social assistance, let him tell you what he does.
YAŞAR KIRKPINAR (İzmir) - We live, look at İzmir, garbage, potholes and mud! They are all your municipalities!
CHAIRMAN OF THE SESSION ORHAN ERDEM - Friends, let Mr. Orhan complete his speech. Please.
VELİ AĞBABA (Malatya) - Orhan Yegin, drink Mansur Yavaş's tea and see the social aid.
YAŞAR KIRKPINAR (İzmir) - Profit, corruption, lawlessness, injustice.
CHAIRMAN OF THE SESSION ORHAN ERDEM - Mr. Orhan, continue.
Mr. Kırkpınar, please.
CAVİT ARI (Antalya) - You ruined the country, look at yourself!
ORHAN YEGİN (Ankara) - Now, friends who cannot stop praising the municipalities that cannot collect their garbage are the defenders of the municipalities that spend the taxes they collect and the shares from the state in concert expenses.
CAVİT ARI (Antalya) - We defend the concerts, do you have anything to say? We defend concerts!
ORHAN YEGİN (Ankara) - .biz "Taxes are collected, but they are spent on other places, not on schools, roads, health or social aid." he says.
CAVİT ARI (Antalya) - They should announce the budget of the Culture Road Festival.
ORHAN YEGİN (Ankara) - Another one.
CAVİT ARI (Antalya) - We defend concerts.
ORHAN YEGİN (Ankara) - Another one.
CAVİT ARI (Antalya) - Citizens see artists thanks to us, what's the big deal?
YAŞAR KIRKPINAR (İzmir) - Everything is clear.
AHMET VEHBİ BAKIRLIOĞLU (Manisa) - What is clear?
YAŞAR KIRKPINAR (İzmir) - You can see, the budget of the Culture Road Festival is clear and everything is explained.
ORHAN YEGİN (Ankara) - Another one.
CAVİT ARI (Antalya) - Let's explain and see. The Minister could not explain it here. The Minister could not explain for an hour. Come on explain!
ORHAN YEGİN (Ankara) - Another one is "Build a nursery instead of a university." he says.
VELİ AĞBABA (Malatya) - Is the nursery enough?
CAVİT ARI (Antalya) - Inform the Minister of Tourism so that he can come and explain.
YAŞAR KIRKPINAR (İzmir) - But you account for the concerts you didn't do. You are doing an imaginary concert!
ORHAN YEGİN (Ankara) - I say "Nursery is enough." I'm not saying. "Instead of building a university, build a nursery." he says, preferring one over the other.
CAVİT ARI (Antalya) - Let the Minister of Tourism come out and explain, tell me. Let him come and explain.
YAŞAR KIRKPINAR (İzmir) - They are open, there is nothing hidden.
AHMET VEHBİ BAKIRLIOĞLU (Manisa) - "They explain." something else "Explained." Anything else. He couldn't explain it last year. This year it happened in 30 provinces, let's see how he explains it.
YAŞAR KIRKPINAR (İzmir) - Explains, explains.
CAVİT ARI (Antalya) - Then why couldn't he explain it last year? He couldn't explain it last year, brother, he couldn't explain it here last year.
YAŞAR KIRKPINAR (İzmir) - Explains.
CAVİT ARI (Antalya) - Tell him to announce it this year.
YAŞAR KIRKPINAR (İzmir) - Even if he explains it, you will find something else.
AHMET VEHBİ BAKIRLIOĞLU (Manisa) - Well, why should we find it? "Let him explain." We already say.
ORHAN YEGİN (Ankara) - But our dear member of parliament.
CHAIRMAN OF THE SESSION ORHAN ERDEM - Mr. Orhan, please continue.
Mr. Arı, wait a minute, you have also spoken, let the friends finish their speeches.
ORHAN YEGİN (Ankara) - Now, someone says, "Taxes are collected, but they are spent on other places, not on schools, roads, or health."

" says, while another says, "Instead of building a university, build a nursery."
VELİ AĞBABA (Malatya) - Why are you answering these? The Vice President will answer these.
ORHAN YEGİN (Ankara) - .but a respected member of parliament also quoted a poem and said, "You are a nation's child who missed the bus." It's nice to add. Here, all our effort, the bus, train, plane, whatever you name that was hijacked in the last century.
AHMET VEHBİ BAKIRLIOĞLU (Manisa) - If you don't say "century" or something like that. What do you disagree with this century and the republic?
ORHAN YEGİN (Ankara) - This is all our effort to catch up with the era, even the missed era - I'm going further - and even get ahead of it.
Investment.
CAVİT ARI (Antalya) - You are a government that sells its institutions. You are a government that sold all the structures established during the nation's most difficult times.
ORHAN YEGİN (Ankara) - Investment.
AHMET VEHBİ BAKIRLIOĞLU (Manisa) - What is it that you do not like with this republic?
ORHAN YEGİN (Ankara) - Oh, investment.
AHMET VEHBİ BAKIRLIOĞLU (Manisa) - What is it, for God's sake, tell me!
ORHAN YEGİN (Ankara) - What does it have to do with it?
AHMET VEHBİ BAKIRLIOĞLU (Manisa) - You say "century", you are referring to the establishment of the republic
ORHAN YEGİN (Ankara) - Now, "You are the child of a nation that missed the bus." Based on the analogy, all our efforts are to catch up and prevent the bus, train, plane, era that was missed in the last century. When it comes to investment, production, employment, export; When I say read, think, apply, conclude; When we say one nation, one homeland, one flag, one state.
VELİ AĞBABA (Malatya) - You forgot about him by now.
AHMET VEHBİ BAKIRLIOĞLU (Manisa) - You were there in the twenty-five years of the century.
ORHAN YEGİN (Ankara) - When we say Türkiye without terrorism; When you say Togg, SİHA, TÜRKSAT, high-speed train, education, city hospitals.
VELİ AĞBABA (Malatya) - Mr. Orhan, you forgot Rabia, Rabia. Rabia left, Sisi came.
ORHAN YEGİN (Ankara) - Population growth rate means at least 3 children.
VELİ AĞBABA (Malatya) - What 3 children! People can't get married.
ORHAN YEGİN (Ankara) - While trying to support and grow science, art, cooperatives, technology, academia and rural development; Speaking of future professions, artificial intelligence, reliable and safe housing, food, agriculture, public garden, green transformation; Speaking of renewable energy, Gabar, drilling ships, hydrocarbons; Well, while emphasizing all of these, "Instead of doing that, do this." We don't say that, friends. "We have to do that, we have to do that, too." We say that we do not measure or care about development and progress under one heading; "We must develop altogether with all its elements, we must develop altogether with all its people." we say.
AHMET VEHBİ BAKIRLIOĞLU (Manisa) - Mr. Orhan, I looked at your speeches last year, you are doing the same thing.
ORHAN YEGİN (Ankara) - That's what we say, okay?
AHMET VEHBİ BAKIRLIOĞLU (Manisa) - You say the same things. You said "gabar" last time, you say "transformation", everything, everything.
ORHAN YEGİN (Ankara) - Yes, we do not discriminate. Gabar represents oil there. Gabar also represents enrichment from the Southeast there.
AHMET VEHBİ BAKIRLIOĞLU (Manisa) - Look, I'm telling you something. So what you said. Look at your speech last year, you say the same thing as you did last year.

ORHAN YEGİN (Ankara) - Therefore, the summary of the matter comes to this, friends: All our efforts, all our efforts. We have a strong leader, an experienced leader, a leader and a staff that the nation believes in, and this nation has achieved stability for more than twenty years and continues to do so. All our efforts are to catch up with this era with this stability.
CAVİT ARI (Antalya) - Bring the ballot box, see employment.
ORHAN YEGİN (Ankara) - A leader in its region, from the defense industry to technology, with a say in the world, not only politically, but also technologically, in terms of production and exports, in every aspect.
(The microphone was automatically turned off by the device)
ORHAN YEGİN (Ankara) - Let's build a country that has a fair and realistic say. A down-to-earth country with the actuarial balance of the social security system, peace, tranquility and brotherhood in everything.
Let's build it so that even if a happy man like Veli Ağbaba comes after that, the country will not be disrupted.
(Laughter from CHP benches)

records.originalTurkish:
ORHAN YEGİN (Ankara) - Teşekkür ederim.
Sayın Bakanımızı, salonda bulunan herkesi ben de saygı ve hürmetle selamlıyorum.
Ayinesi iştir kişinin, lafa bakılmaz. "Biz iktidarın yirmi üç yılda ne yaptığına değil, ne söylediğine bakıyoruz." diyerek konuşmasına başlayan bir hatip olmuştu. Allah'a sonsuz şükürler olsun, bugün yine AK PARTİ'nin iktidara gelişinin seneidevriyesi olan bir günde, yirmi üç yılı nihayete erdirmiş bir zamanın sonunda; yirmi yılı çok iyi bir şekilde, çok güzel bir şekilde, her anlamda Türkiye'yi yükselterek gelmiş...
VELİ AĞBABA (Malatya) - Bak, dikkatli konuş, akşama televizyonlara çıkarsın.
ORHAN YEGİN (Ankara) - ...bütün bölgesel farklılıkları giderme iddiasını ortaya koymuş; İstanbul'da, Ankara'da ne varsa Diyarbakır'da, Hakkâri'de Urfa'da da o olsun gayretini ortaya koymuş...
ÖMER FETHİ GÜRER (Niğde) - Niğde'yi unutmuş ama.
ORHAN YEGİN (Ankara) - ...vesayetle, askerî vesayet, hukuk vesayeti, yargı vesayeti ne varsa, bütün vesayet odaklarıyla mücadele etmiş...
CAVİT ARI (Antalya) - Diye diye ülkeye her türlü vesayeti getirdiniz.
ORHAN YEGİN (Ankara) - ...ve neticesinde, bugün hakkımızı arama konusunda, müteşebbis ruhumuzu hayata geçirme konusunda, çocuklarımızın eğitiminden tutun da teknolojik gelişmelere kadar birçok konuda hepimizin eşit imkânlara kavuştuğu ve gelişmelerde hepimizin payı olduğunu hissettiğimiz; rengiyle, teniyle, mezhebiyle, bütün farklılıklarıyla ülkenin ürettiği bütün kaynaklarda hepimizin ortaklık duygusunu güçlü bir şekilde hissettiğimiz, hepimize ait, hepimizi kuşatan bir devlet inşa etmek -sonsuz şükürler olsun- nasip oldu bizlere.
Son iki üç yılda ekonomide, evet, biraz hassasiyet var, biraz stres var, sıkıntı var; bunu kabul ediyoruz, konuştuk daha önce de ama inşallah bunu da aşmak için büyük bir gayret ortaya koyuyoruz. Yakaladığımız yirmi üç yıllık istikrarı, inşallah, yine bu süreçte ortaya koyacağımız çaba ve adımlarla çok daha güzel bir noktaya taşıyarak, milletimizin teveccühüyle, yine
Cumhur İttifakı'yla beraber yolumuza devam edeceğimizi düşünüyoruz.
Başkanımız da bahsetti, bir hatip "KAAN çöp oldu." dedi, ben de üzülerek oradan başlamak istiyorum. Bu tarz cümleleri kurmak "bütün hepimize ait olan gurur" ifadesini kullandım; hepimizin paydaşı olduğumuz, ortağı olduğumuz, hepimizi mutlu edecek şeyler üzerinde bence böyle alaycı ifadelerle, küçük düşürücü ifadelerle konuşmamak lazım. Sonuçta, siyaset yapıyoruz, hepimizin bugün konuştuğu cümleler yarın bir şekilde önümüze konuluyor. Belki bazı arkadaşlar buna rağmen her türlü şeyi konuşmaya devam ediyorlar ama yine de siyasetçinin bugün konuştuğunun hesabı yarın karşısına çıkıyor. TOGG için de aynı alaycı üslupla bizim karşılaştığımız konuşmalar oldu, ALTAY tankıyla ilgili aynı alaycı üslupla konuşan arkadaşlarımız oldu. Geçelim başka konuya, işte, aranan doğal gazla ilgili "Arayın, arayın; bulursunuz!" diye alaycı ifadeler kullanan arkadaşlar oldu. Petrolle ilgili aynı alaycılık oldu, bunlar doğru şeyler değil, bunlar bu ülkenin birikimleri, bunlar bu ülkenin değerleri; bunlarla alay etmek yahut da bunların süreciyle ilgili alay edici bahaneleri cımbızlarla çekip onları bahane hâline dönüştürüp bunları küçük düşürmek hiçbirimize yaramaz. Siyasetçiyiz hepimiz, dediğim gibi, yarın öbür gün bu söylediklerimizden mahcup oluruz. Gerçi bakıyorum, bazı arkadaşlar hiç mahcup olmuyorlar ama olsun, ben yine de uyarımı yapmış olayım.
Şimdi, ülkemizdeki gelişmenin ve ilerlemenin yeterli olmadığı iddiası olduğu, hatta bunu desteklemek için Güney Kore örnekleri verildi. Doğrudur, veri doğrudur, o veri üzerinden kıyasladığımız zaman elbette bir farklılık ortaya çıkabilir ama biz oturup böyle tezimizi güçlendirmek için nerede en güzel veri var onu alalım, Türkiye'dekini dünyanın herhangi bir yerindeki en iyi veriyle kıyaslayalım diye hep en iyileri ararsak bu Türkiye'ye haksızlık olur. Herhangi bir konuda Amerika ilerideyse onun verisini, herhangi bir konuda Güney Kore ilerideyse onun verisini, başka bir konuda Çin ilerdeyse onun verisini alıp "E, hani Türkiye ne yapmış ki?" demek, belki sadece o setler üzerinden doğru bir okuma olabilir ama eğer bir ülkeyi kıyas edeceksek önce kendisiyle kıyas etmemiz lazım; dün neydi, bugün ne? Geçen sene, beş sene önce neydi bir veride, bugün ne duruma geldi, ona bakmak lazım. Aynı zamanda, bununla beraber onun kıyaslandığı, sınıflandırıldığı ülkeler kategorisinden bakmak lazım. Gelişmemiş mi, az gelişmiş mi, gelişmekte olan ülke mi; kategorisine bakıp kıyaslamak lazım veya onlarda da verilere ulaşamıyorsak en azından kafamızı şöyle kaldırıp bir komşulara bakmak lazım yani aynı coğrafyadayız, coğrafyamızdaki komşularımızın herhangi bir konuda, parametrede durumu ne ki biz bugün ondan daha gerideyiz diye bunu yapmak lazım. Arkadaşlar, ülkemize haksızlık etmemek lazım, özetle söylemek istediğim şey bu.
Şimdi, "Mısır'da 10 dolara üretilen bir ürün burada 15 dolara üretiliyorsa bunun açıklamasını yapıp hesabını vermeniz lazım." dediler bugün. Ne istiyorsunuz arkadaşlar? Asgari ücret Türkiye'de 130 dolara mı insin istiyorsunuz, neyin peşindesiniz?
YÜKSEL SELÇUK TÜRKOĞLU (Bursa) - Alım gücü artsın istiyoruz.
ORHAN YEGİN (Ankara) - Mısır'a niye gidiyor Türkiye'de veya dünyanın başka yerlerindeki tekstilciler, niçin gidiyorlar?
LÜTFÜ TÜRKKAN (Kocaeli) - 130 dolar değil Mısır'da, asgari ücret 130 dolar değil.
ORHAN YEGİN (Ankara) - Siz yatırımcısınız, 7 bin Mısır SAR'ı kaç dolar ediyor? Ki tarihinin en yüksek seviyesinde 7 binle. Allah aşkına bırakın bunları! Bakın, asgari ücret Mısır'da 130 dolar, ortalama ücret 170 dolar.
CAVİT ARI (Antalya) - Bu zamana kadar Mısır mı vardı? Sayenizde oldu.
ORHAN YEGİN (Ankara) - Bizde bugün asgari ücret 530 dolar, ortalama ücret 1.750-1.800 dolar. Dolayısıyla siz burada neyi savunuyorsunuz arkadaşlar, neyi savunuyorsunuz? Bunu anlamakta zorlanıyorum.
LÜTFÜ TÜRKKAN (Kocaeli) - Orhan Bey, Türkiye ilk 20'de bile yok 2050'de.
ORHAN YEGİN (Ankara) - 2050'yi ben bilmiyorum ama bugünkü verilere göre biz 14-15'lerdeyiz.
AHMET VEHBİ BAKIRLIOĞLU (Manisa) - Türkiye, dünyadaki büyük markaların fason üretim yeri oldu.
BAŞKAN MEHMET MUŞ - Değerli arkadaşlar, sırayla, hepinize söz vereceğim.
ORHAN YEGİN (Ankara) - Şimdi, bölgesel gelişmişlikteki farklılıklardan yakınıldı. "Markalar Marmara'ya, Akdeniz'e yayılmış; Doğu'ya ve Güneydoğu'ya getiremediniz Sayın Bakan." diye bize, Bakana birtakım ithamlar oldu. Özel sektörün de ülke sathına yayılması gerektiği ve bunu beceremediğimiz söylendi ve buradan Hükûmetimiz eleştirildi.
Arkadaşlar, bölgesel teşvik planlamaları bunun için yapıldı; 1'inci bölge, 2'nci, 3'üncü, 4'üncü, 5'inci, 6'ncı bölge; bu planlamalar yapılırken bir endeks oluşturuldu ve bu endekse göre daha az gelişen yerlere giden yatırımcıya daha yüksek oranlarda, daha yüksek miktarlarda, çok daha kıymetli teşvikler verildi ki oraya gitsin, orada üretim yapsınlar ama sadece bu olmuyor. Bizim, bugün
terörsüz Türkiye sürecini çok önemli görmemizin temel nedenlerinden bir tanesi de budur. Yani bu itirazı yapan arkadaş, kendi şehrinden, kendi bölgesinden hareketle bu itirazı ortaya koydu ama terörün olduğu yere yatırımcıyı götürmek o kadar zor bir şey ki istediğiniz kadar teşvik verin, istediğiniz kadar ona, bütün yaptığı yatırıma, bütün yaptığı maliyete siz devlet olarak katlanın, can güvenliğinin olmadığını düşündüğü yerde insanlar yatırım yapmaktan çekiniyorlar, sizin verdiğiniz o bölge teşvikleri de yeterli olmuyor işte. Dolayısıyla biz devlet olarak her şeyle mücadele etmek zorundayız yani yatırımı artıracak teşvikleri de planlamak zorundayız, terörü bitirecek unsurları da ortaya çıkarmak durumundayız, eğitimi de artırmak zorundayız, nitelikli eleman, nitelikli insan, iş gücü, düşünce, fikir, teknolojik yatırımları da yapmak zorundayız, hastaneyi de, okulu da... Bütün unsurlarımızla beraber kalkınmak ve bütün bölgelerimizi kalkındırmak durumundayız ve bütün çabamız da zaten bu; ki bugün Sayın Bakan konuşmasında bahsetti; şimdi, 1'inci bölgede olan firmalar da 4, 5, 6'ncı bölgelere yatırımlarını götürdükleri, taşıdıkları zaman bu bölgelerdeki teşviklerden yararlanabileceği konusunda bilgiyi bize verdi ve bu şekilde de sanayinin yığılmış olduğu illerden Anadolu'ya dolayısıyla üretimin, dolayısıyla istihdamın bu şekilde yayılmasını da sağlamaya çalışıyoruz yani teşvikleri bu şekilde açıkladık, böyle kalacak değil, dinamik bir süreç, o dinamik süreç dün onu gerektiriyordu, bugün sıkıştığımız noktalar neler bunları görüp, izlemelerini yapıp, bunların verimliliğini denetleyip ona göre yeni fazlar oluşur diyor; bunu ben çok kıymetli buluyorum.
Şimdi, bir şeyi fark ettim; ya, bir türkü tutturulmuş: Üretim yok, üretim yok, üretemiyoruz, üretim mahvoldu, üretim şöyle oldu, üretim böyle oldu. Bu, bir türküye dönüşmüş artık, tarımsal üretim bitti, tarımda ithalatçı ülke olduk, sanayide şöyle olduk, üretim yok falan, sürekli bunlar söylenip duruyor.
AYYÜCE TÜRKEŞ TAŞ (Adana) - Adana'da portakal 58 lira...
ORHAN YEGİN (Ankara) - Arkadaşlar, üretim yok da sanayide üretim yok da sanayi üretim endeksi... Bak, yirmi yıl önceyle kıyaslamıyorum, 3 Kasım seçimlerinden sonraki gün ile bugünü kıyaslamıyorum. Bakan Bey konuşmasında verdi bugün, hepiniz dinlediniz. Pandemi öncesi döneme göre Almanya'da, o övdüğünüz Avrupa ülkelerinde yüzde 14,7; İtalya'da yüzde 6,9; Fransa'da 3,3; İspanya'da yüzde 0,5 seyrederken...
SANAYİ VE TEKNOLOJİ BAKANI MEHMET FATİH KACIR - Aşağıda...
ORHAN YEGİN (Ankara) - Aşağıda seyrederken üstelik, Türkiye'de arkadaşlar bu yüzde 30'un üzerinde yükselmiş.
AHMET VEHBİ BAKIRLIOĞLU (Manisa) - Yok böyle bir şey.
ORHAN YEGİN (Ankara) - Bir türkü tutturmuşuz: "Üretim yok, samanı bile dışarıdan ithal ediyoruz."
VELİ AĞBABA (Malatya) - Ya, o rakamlara baksana...
YAŞAR KIRKPINAR (İzmir) - Rakamlara bakıyor işte.
SEDA KÂYA ÖSEN (İzmir) - Böyle bir rakam yok.
AHMET VEHBİ BAKIRLIOĞLU (Manisa) - Yüzde 7; yüzde 30 rakamı yok.
ORHAN YEGİN (Ankara) - Ya, biz yıllardır tarımda cari fazla veren bir ülkeyiz, yıllardır "Tarımda mahvolduk, çöktük." diyorsunuz, bugün sanayide diyorsunuz; bunlar doğru şeyler değil. Peki, ülkede üretim yok...

Buyurun Sayın Yegin.
