Şimdi, bir de sürekli Ankara-Suriye ilişkisinde "Türkiye'nin Kürtlerle...", "Türkiye'nin Kürtlerle şöyle...", "Türkiye'nin..." Kardeşim, bizim Kürtlerle bir meselemiz yok. Türkiye'nin Kürtlerle de hiçbir etnik aidiyetle de meselesi yok, hiçbir mezhep mensubiyetiyle de meselesi yok, hiçbir meselemiz yok bizim. Bizim meselemiz düşmanlık edenle, bizim meselemiz mezhebini kullanıp silahı eline alanla, bizim meselemiz etnik kökenini, dinini, inancını, akrabalığımızı, ilişkimizi, kardeşliğimizi, her neyse, bunu bahane edip, eline silahı alıp bölgeyi karıştırmaya çalışanla.
(Mikrofon otomatik cihaz tarafından kapatıldı)
OTURUM BAŞKANI ORHAN ERDEM - Orhan Bey, lütfen tamamlayalım.
ORHAN YEGİN (Ankara) - Bizim meselemiz ülkemize meydan okuyanla; geleceğimizi, hepimizin geleceğini -kimseyi ayırt etmeden söylüyorum- tehdit altına almaya çalışanlarla ve bunlarla mücadelemiz sürecek kardeşim, sonuna kadar sürecek Allah'ın izniyle.
Teşekkür ederim.
records.englishTranslation:
ORHAN YEGİN (Ankara) - President, thank you.
I greet our esteemed Minister, all our guests and esteemed members of parliament here with respect and respect.
Thank God Almighty, as the AK PARTY government for twenty-three years, we have been blessed to take every issue in Türkiye much further than the day we came to power, both infrastructure works, human resources works, cultural and political steps that will ensure that the society is more together and more integrated, and with all of them, we have also grown our brotherhood and taken our country much further than the point we took it. We have taken steps and achieved very serious developments in both the military and defense fields in these twenty-three years. Here, of course, the technologies put forward in the defense industry and the progress made in this regard are extremely important, but our army, our military, does not only gain and increase its power with the progress it has made in the defense industry, but also the attitude it displays, its attitude towards maintaining stability even though some people in its region constantly use the concepts of conflict and war, its power within NATO, its role and responsibility in different crisis geographies of the world and its attitude in fulfilling this, its example to the world, its own attitude, even when carrying out its own cross-border operations.
At a time when even the people among us are attacking themselves, "Not even a civilian should have a nosebleed." With the risks it took and the operations it carried out in this way, our army has demonstrated a much greater success with its morality, culture, knowledge, the way it reflects its power in line with its goals in the field, its style of preserving peace and tranquility, its technology, and recently, especially with July 15, by eliminating different cliques and solidarity within it, and today, as it did yesterday, it stands behind us, behind our nation, as one of our favorite institutions. Its contribution to regional peace, its military training with countries such as Libya, Azerbaijan, Syria and Somalia, the escort and protection it provided to our ships, its duties in KFOR or IFOR in Kosovo within NATO, its military training and cooperation agreements with 92 countries, from Bosnia and Herzegovina, are one of the best data showing us that our army and this attitude we have demonstrated have moved to a much better place in the world.
Of course, we said that our defense industry is important. Our friends may have mentioned the products that emerged in their speeches, I will not repeat them, but I would like to tell you this: Dear Minister, while talking about export figures here, the effect of the success we have demonstrated in the defense industry in Türkiye's share of global exports, which was 0.55 in 2002, from 0.5 in 2002 to almost 1.1 today, and the value per kilogram of the product Türkiye exports, which is also an export value that we proudly say, is compared to the impact of the success we have achieved in the defense industry. We must proudly say that the developments in our defense industry played a big role in our increase from 50 cents per kilogram in 2002 to over 1.5 dollars today.

Of course, while we are saying this, friends in the opposition say, "The point our defense industry has reached is undoubtedly pleasing." They started saying alhamdulillah. They used to make fun of it, "If you do it, we'll see, it doesn't exist!" "You can only make his kite, that's the only way you can do it." As the friends who criticized every intention and initiative in every job we intended to do, the friends who made fun of us that day, started to see the products today, the deliveries and the executions in the fields today, they said, "It is undoubtedly pleasing." They started to say, but "This very important and strategic area should not be used as an area for favoritism and enrichment." Unfortunately, they added a very ugly sentence.
ÖZGÜR CEYLAN (Çanakkale) - That's exactly how they used it.
ORHAN YEGİN (Ankara) - "Son-in-law and father-in-law traveling from country to country to sell UAVs and SIHAs." It is not the right attitude.
ÖZGÜR CEYLAN (Çanakkale) - The sales strategy is completely wrong.
ORHAN YEGİN (Ankara) - This is from where you stand on this issue.
ÖZGÜR CEYLAN (Çanakkale) - I say the parliament should inspect it, why do you object to this? Don't you want the parliament to check?
ORHAN YEGİN (Ankara) - As a person who reads even an issue that makes your country proud, it is actually a sign of how you read other issues.
ÖZGÜR CEYLAN (Çanakkale) - We say that the Ministry of National Defense, the Ministry of Internal Affairs and the Ministry of Foreign Affairs should inspect it, are you angry about this? Don't want to audit? Let them do whatever they want, shall we?
ORHAN YEGİN (Ankara) - Our esteemed President, anyone who produces in this country and wants to sell it abroad, any production that this country can be proud of.
ÖZGÜR CEYLAN (Çanakkale) - There is absolutely no equal opportunity.
ORHAN YEGİN (Ankara) - Dear Minister, he is a leader who takes all the values ​​​​that this country produces, takes them to the world, introduces them and strives to develop them further, regardless of whether they are CHP members or members of another party, whether they voted for us or not, whether they are Alevis or Sunnis, whether they are Kurds, Zazas or Circassians, whom he constantly underlines someone and tries to explain as if there is a problem there.
ÖZGÜR CEYLAN (Çanakkale) - There is no equality in the defense industry, equal opportunities are not offered.
ORHAN YEGİN (Ankara) - Our President is a leader who took Togg as a gift to the heads of state in the countries he visited, on behalf of Türkiye.
ÖZGÜR CEYLAN (Çanakkale) - There is no equality in the defense industry, we want it to be inspected, we want a strategic sales plan to be put forward.
ORHAN YEGİN (Ankara) - Is that also the son-in-law-father-in-law relationship? Isn't it a shame? Do these expressions fit? Do these expressions match? These expressions do not suit you.
ÖZGÜR CEYLAN (Çanakkale) - Can you buy F-35 without parliamentary approval? Do they give F-35? They don't even provide F-16 without parliamentary approval.
CHAIRMAN OF THE SESSION ORHAN ERDEM - Dear Deputy, you have spoken, please.
ÖZGÜR CEYLAN (Çanakkale) - Well, me.
ORHAN YEGİN (Ankara) - Now they continue their speech, "'We are Mustafa Kemal's soldiers.' "You are liquidating the lieutenants who said, and keeping Atatürk's enemies within the Armed Forces." they say. Friends, we covered this topic here last year too.

Nobody said, "We are Mustafa Kemal's soldiers." He was not dismissed from the army because of this.
CAVİT ARI (Antalya) - What was it cut with?
ORHAN YEGİN (Ankara) - The army.
ÖZGÜR CEYLAN (Çanakkale) - That's exactly what happened.
ORHAN YEGİN (Ankara) - This has been talked about, it has been talked about many times, discipline is the basis of the army.
CAVİT ARI (Antalya) - Does discipline happen when it comes to you?
ORHAN YEGİN (Ankara) - Friends did this despite being warned many times.
SEYİT TORUN (Army) - Did you do the same things to those who took off their badges?
ORHAN YEGİN (Ankara) - They did this, and it was considered as indiscipline.
SEYİT TORUN (Army) - Did you do the same thing to those who took off their badges?
ORHAN YEGİN (Ankara) - .and as a result they received a disciplinary penalty.
SEYİT TORUN (Army) - Did you impose that discipline on those who issued the badge?
ORHAN YEGİN (Ankara) - You do this.
ÖZGÜR CEYLAN (Çanakkale) - Those who did not wear badges returned.
ORHAN YEGİN (Ankara) - You can do this very cheaply.
MINISTER OF NATIONAL DEFENSE YAŞAR GÜLER - We did it, we did it.
ORHAN YEGİN (Ankara) - By making it a very cheap political material.
MINISTER OF NATIONAL DEFENSE YAŞAR GÜLER - We did it to them too.
SEYİT TORUN (Ordu) - If he did it, there is no problem.
ORHAN YEGİN (Ankara) - A great name like Atatürk,
By making the love for Atatürk, which has settled in the hearts of every individual of this country and this nation, a material for your own cheap politics, you say, "'We are Atatürk's soldiers.' "You expelled them because they said so, you cut ties with the army, you send the children and fill the army with Ataturk's enemies instead, you recruit them." they say. None of this makes any sense. Then someone comes along and says.
MURAT ÇAN (Samsun) - Let's ask the Minister, why did they cut it? Let's ask, let him tell us.
MINISTER OF NATIONAL DEFENSE YAŞAR GÜLER - Dear Deputy, we explained this at great length here last year.
ORHAN YEGİN (Ankara) - We talked about it many times, what a shame!
MINISTER OF NATIONAL DEFENSE YAŞAR GÜLER - None of our lieutenants who were fired last year were told, "We are Atatürk's representatives, we are Atatürk's soldiers." Not a single question was asked because he said, one. Two, "Why did you draw your sword?" No questions were asked, "Why did you throw something?" No question was asked.
MURAT ÇAN (Samsun) - Then you threw it away for nothing.
CAVİT ARI (Antalya) - Why did you throw it then?
MURAT ÇAN (Samsun) - This is exactly what we are talking about, Mr. Minister.
ÖZGÜR CEYLAN (Çanakkale) - Why were their superiors fired?
MINISTER OF NATIONAL DEFENSE YAŞAR GÜLER - I am coming there now. Excuse me, I'm not finished. Why was he kicked out? As soon as this ceremony is over, look, as soon as the ceremony is over, all the families have entered the ceremony area to hug and kiss their children. While we were in this situation, our first lieutenant came to the microphone and said, "Families, please leave the ceremony area." Does he have such a right? The families and children there.
CAVİT ARI (Antalya) - Is it a sufficient crime to be expelled, Mr. Minister?
YAŞAR KIRKPINAR (İzmir) - Wait a minute, listen!
ORHAN YEGİN (Ankara) - Will you decide that?
MINISTER OF NATIONAL DEFENSE YAŞAR GÜLER - How? It's a big crime to commit. You say, well, considering these things, our fight against terrorism will last forty-five years, or if something else happens, it will last fifty-five years.

That's it, does he have the right to call a lieutenant from his mother, father and children who have been waiting there for five years? Is it there or not, sir, I ask you.
MURAT ÇAN (Samsun) - Is there no commander there to intervene in this?
CAVİT ARI (Antalya) - Was he expelled for this reason or was he expelled for this reason?
CHAIRMAN OF THE SESSION ORHAN ERDEM - Dear Minister.
MURAT ÇAN (Samsun) - What kind of commander are you?
CAVİT ARI (Antalya) - Throwing away a trained person for this reason.
ÖZGÜR CEYLAN (Çanakkale) - Is this why terrorism does not end, just because we support Ataturkists?
MINISTER OF NATIONAL DEFENSE YAŞAR GÜLER - Now, friends, look, my dear deputies, please, please. You are now in this situation.
NİLGÜN ÖK (Denizli) - You perceive it as it suits you.
MURAT ÇAN (Samsun) - The essence of the issue is "We are Mustafa Kemal's soldiers.", do not stray around this.
MINISTER OF NATIONAL DEFENSE YAŞAR GÜLER - It is not, no, my friend, I'm telling you!
ORHAN YEGİN (Ankara) - Oh, stop this cheap politics!
CAVİT ARI (Antalya) - We do not believe it.
ÖZGÜR CEYLAN (Çanakkale) - What does it have to do with terrorism and its not ending?
CHAIRMAN OF THE SESSION ORHAN ERDEM - Dear Minister, while speaking, "We do not believe." He says, and then we ask the same question.
ORHAN YEGİN (Ankara) - Stop doing politics behind Atatürk.
MURAT ÇAN (Samsun) - What happened? Isn't the answer there enough?
ORHAN YEGİN (Ankara) - Stop repeating Atatürk's name over and over again.
MURAT ÇAN (Samsun) - What's happening to you? Did the answer seem inadequate to you?
ORHAN YEGİN (Ankara) - Give up, brother.
MINISTER OF NATIONAL DEFENSE YAŞAR GÜLER - Would you allow?
CHAIRMAN OF THE SESSION ORHAN ERDEM - Dear Minister, please finish.
MINISTER OF NATIONAL DEFENSE YAŞAR GÜLER - Dear MPs, we see that you have expelled 77 people from the Republican People's Party.
MURAT ÇAN (Samsun) - What does that have to do with this?
YAŞAR KIRKPINAR (İzmir) - Wait a minute, listen!
MINISTER OF NATIONAL DEFENSE YAŞAR GÜLER - Wait a minute, it's irrelevant, that's what I'll say.
MURAT ÇAN (Samsun) - Do not join the Republican People's Party when you are in trouble. Come to the Republican People's Party, not when you are stuck, come, all of you.
MINISTER OF NATIONAL DEFENSE YAŞAR GÜLER - No, no, wait a minute, but you are not allowing me, I will talk, I will talk.
SEYİT TORUN (Army) - We are the political party, you are the army. The Turkish Armed Forces is neutral and pro-Ataturk.
CHAIRMAN OF THE SESSION ORHAN ERDEM - Dear Minister, we will give it at the end anyway. Unfortunately, there is such a method where both the question is asked and the answer is interfered with. Unfortunately this is not nice.
YAŞAR KIRKPINAR (İzmir) - What a shame, you are being rude.
MURAT ÇAN (Samsun) - Shame on you.
YAŞAR KIRKPINAR (İzmir) - You are asking questions and not listening at the same time.
CHAIRMAN OF THE SESSION ORHAN ERDEM - Mr. Orhan, here are your last two minutes.
ORHAN YEGİN (Ankara) - President, two minutes? Thanks.
Well, every year the gentlemen get disturbed in Anıtkabir, our President comes, he visits Anıtkabir, and when he leaves there, the people who came there to visit, the people came there, when they see the gentleman, when they see the President of the country, they show their affection.
MURAT ÇAN (Samsun) - You are the one who is disturbed by Anıtkabir, your Chairman.

CAVİT ARI (Antalya) - They are a superimposed continent, they are all the youth branches of your party.
SEYİT TORUN (Ordu) - That's the grave.
MURAT ÇAN (Samsun) - Who received the report, who? Who received a report as disturbed?
ORHAN YEGİN (Ankara) - Well, look, I have something to say, you are disturbed by this, I understand your discomfort.
AYYÜCE TÜRKEŞ TAŞ (Adana) - It's a grave, a grave!
ORHAN YEGİN (Ankara) - I understand that you are disturbed by this, but I turned to the Minister and said, "Something like this happens in Anıtkabir every year. How can you not prevent this? Who are you comparing with Atatürk, what are you trying to do?" We never accept such an ugly epithet, an ugly accusation, or an unfair and inappropriate statement.
EYLEM ERTUĞ ERTUĞRUL (Zonguldak) - Aren't there any rules there? Doesn't Anıtkabir have any rules?
SEYİT TORUN (Ordu) - You don't respect the grave either, to the grave!
ORHAN YEGİN (Ankara) - And we invite you, friends, to think healthy and act healthy.
VELİ AĞBABA (Malatya) - You can say this without shame, without shame! You bring the youth branches, you say it without shame.
CAVİT ARI (Antalya) - They are all superimposed continents there.
ORHAN YEGİN (Ankara) - We have many things to talk about, our minutes are gone.
CAVİT ARI (Antalya) - He is not an ordinary citizen.
ORHAN YEGİN (Ankara) - Now, in the Minister's speech, they talked about the contradictions regarding Syria. Dear Minister, Syria.
CAVİT ARI (Antalya) - You keep them ready there.
VELİ AĞBABA (Malatya) - Are you holding a rally there!
ORHAN YEGİN (Ankara) - Shout, brother, shout.
VELİ AĞBABA (Malatya) - If you are going to hold a rally, do it somewhere else.
YAŞAR KIRKPINAR (İzmir) - Why, did it bother you?
VELİ AĞBABA (Malatya) - And you defend these things shamelessly! You bring the youth branches of the AK Party and hold a rally.
CAVİT ARI (Antalya) - Superimposed continents, they are all there, okay!
EYLEM ERTUĞ ERTUĞRUL (Zonguldak) - That is the grave, go and hold your rally outside.
ORHAN YEGİN (Ankara) - President, how will we talk under these conditions?
CHAIRMAN OF THE SESSION ORHAN ERDEM - Mr. Ağbaba, friends, before he finishes his speech,
Let's allow it.
ORHAN YEGİN (Ankara) - Dear Minister, regarding Syria, "I would like to remind you once again that we will not allow any terrorist organization, especially PKK, PYD/YPG, DSG, to take root in the region and operate under different names." he said and recently said, "We expect the integration process between Syria and the SDF to be completed, we expect these negotiations to come to an end." he said. Here they come and talk about the Minister's speech containing contradictions regarding Syria and that it reminds of old habits. There should be speeches encouraging unity in Syria, what are we doing? What does the Minister say here in his speech? "We expect the integration and talks between Syria and the SDF to conclude safely." he says. Now it is said: "There is no need for the military." Why is there no need? "If there is negotiation and diplomacy, this is enough to solve the problems, there is no need for military." Brother, we are in favor of negotiation and diplomacy, but where that is not enough, then there is a need for soldiers and those soldiers will be there.

That's why there are issues in life, in the universe, and in many parts of the world that cannot be solved through diplomacy and negotiation; Everything was a bed of roses, these things were solved by sitting down and talking. At that time, no country in the world would need an army or soldiers. We should not make such speeches with Pollyanna sentences.
MURAT ÇAN (Samsun) - You solve it by letter.
ORHAN YEGİN (Ankara) - Türkiye.
(The microphone was automatically turned off by the device)
ORHAN YEGİN (Ankara) - Chairman, I am very interrupted, I would like to ask for a minute.
CHAIRMAN OF THE SESSION ORHAN ERDEM - I interrupted it and gave it to him.
ORHAN YEGİN (Ankara) - Half a minute.
CHAIRMAN OF THE SESSION ORHAN ERDEM - Please, I promise to greet you.
ORHAN YEGİN (Ankara) - OK.
Now, there is also the constant Ankara-Syria relationship: "Türkiye with the Kurds.", "Türkiye with the Kurds this way.", "Türkiye with the Kurds." Brother, we have no problem with the Kurds. Türkiye has no problem with the Kurds, nor with any ethnic affiliation, nor with any sectarian affiliation, we have no problem whatsoever. Our issue is with those who are hostile, our issue is with those who use their sect and take up the gun, our issue is with those who use their ethnic origin, religion, belief, kinship, relationship, brotherhood, whatever as an excuse, take the gun in their hand and try to disrupt the region.
(The microphone was automatically turned off by the device)
CHAIRMAN OF THE SESSION ORHAN ERDEM - Mr. Orhan, please let's finish.
ORHAN YEGİN (Ankara) - Our issue is with those who challenge our country; Our fight against those who try to threaten our future, the future of all of us - I say this without distinguishing anyone - will continue, brother, until the end, God willing.
Thank you.

records.originalTurkish:
ORHAN YEGİN (Ankara) - Başkanım, teşekkür ederim.
Sayın Bakanımızı, burada bulunan bütün misafirlerimizi ve kıymetli milletvekillerini ben de saygı ve hürmetle selamlıyorum.
Cenab-ı Allah'a sonsuz şükürler olsun, yirmi üç yıldır AK PARTİ iktidarları olarak Türkiye'de her meseleyi iktidara geldiğimiz günden çok daha ötesine taşıyacak hem altyapı çalışmaları hem insan kaynağı çalışmaları hem toplumun daha bir arada, daha bütünleşik bir şekilde olmasını sağlayacak kültürel adımlar, siyasi adımlar, hepsiyle beraber kardeşliğimizi de büyüterek memleketimizi aldığımız noktadan çok daha ilerilere taşımak çok şükür bizlere nasip oldu. Askerî alanda da, savunma alanında da gerçekten bu yirmi üç yılda çok ciddi gelişmelere adım attık, imza attık. Burada elbette savunma sanayisinde ortaya konulan teknolojiler, bu konuda alınan mesafe son derece önemlidir ama bizim ordumuz, bizim askerimiz sadece savunma sanayisinde almış olduğu mesafeyle gücünü elde eden ve artıran değil ortaya koyduğu tavır, bölgesinde birilerinin çatışma, savaş kavramlarını sürekli kullansa da istikrarı korumaya dönük tutumu, NATO içerisindeki gücü, dünyanın farklı kriz coğrafyalarında üstlendiği rol, sorumluluk ve bunu yerine getirirkenki tutumu, dünyaya örnekliği, kendi sınır ötesi operasyonlarını yaparken bile maalesef kendi
içimizdeki insanların dahi kendisine saldırdığı bir dönemde "Bir sivilin dahi burnu kanamasın." diye aldığı riskler ve bu şekilde yaptığı operasyonlarla ordumuz hem sahadaki operasyonlarını icra ederkenki ahlakıyla, kültürüyle, birikimiyle, gücünü sahaya amaçları doğrultusunda yansıtma biçimiyle, barışı ve huzuru koruyan tarzıyla, hem teknolojisiyle hem de son dönemde özellikle 15 Temmuzla beraber içerisindeki farklı klikleri, farklı dayanışmaları içerisinden atarak çok daha büyük bir başarıyı ortaya koydu ve dün olduğu gibi bugün de göz bebeği kurumlarımızdan bir tanesi olarak arkamızda, milletimizin arkasında duruyor. Bölgesel barışa katkısı, Libya, Azerbaycan, Suriye, Somali gibi ülkelerle yaptığı askerî eğitimler, gemilerimize sağlamış olduğu refakat ve korumalar, NATO içerisinde Kosova'da KFOR'da veya IFOR'da aldığı görevler, Bosna Hersek'ten tutalım da 92 ülkeyle askerî eğitim ve iş birliği anlaşmaları bu bizim ordumuzun, bizim ortaya koyduğumuz bu tutumun dünyada çok daha iyi bir yere doğru taşındığını bizlere gösteren en iyi verilerden bir tanesi.
Tabii, savunma sanayimiz önemli dedik. Arkadaşlarımız belki konuşmalarında ortaya çıkan ürünlerden de bahsetti, ben onların tekrarına girmeyeyim ama şunu size söylemek isterim: Sayın Bakanım, burada ihracat rakamlarını konuşurken küresel ihracattan Türkiye'nin aldığı payın 2002 yılında 0,55 iken, 0,5 iken bugün 1'in üzerine çıkarak neredeyse 1,1'e gelmesinde savunma sanayisinde ortaya koyduğumuz başarının etkisi ve yine gururla söylediğimiz bir ihracat değerimiz olan, Türkiye'nin ihraç ettiği ürünün kilogram başına değerinin ne olduğu kıyasında 2002'de 50 sentten bugün kilogramını 1,5 doların üzerinden çıkarmamızda da savunma sanayimizde yaşanan gelişmelerin büyük bir payı olduğunu iftiharla söylemek lazım.
Tabii, biz bunu söylerken muhalefetteki arkadaşlar "Savunma sanayimizin gelmiş olduğu nokta şüphesiz ki sevindirici." demeye başladılar elhamdülillah. Eskiden dalga geçiyorlardı, "Yaparsınız da görürüz, o yok ki!" "Siz ancak onun uçurtmasını yaparsınız, siz ancak böyle yaparsınız." diye yapmaya niyetlendiğimiz her işte yapılan her niyeti, girişimi kötüleyen arkadaşlar, o gün dalga geçen arkadaşlar bugün ürünleri görmeye başladıkça, bugün teslimatları ve sahalarda icraları görmeye başladıkça "Şüphesiz sevindirici." demeye başladılar ama "Bu çok önemli ve stratejik alan yandaş kayırma ve zenginleştirme alanı olarak kullanılmamalıdır." diyerek maalesef çok da çirkin bir cümle üzerine eklediler.
ÖZGÜR CEYLAN (Çanakkale) - Aynen öyle, aynen öyle kullandılar.
ORHAN YEGİN (Ankara) - "Damat-kayınpeder ülke ülke gezerek İHA ve SİHA satmak..." doğru bir tutum değildir.
ÖZGÜR CEYLAN (Çanakkale) - Satış stratejisi tamamen yanlış.
ORHAN YEGİN (Ankara) - Bu sizin olduğunuz yerden bu meseleyi...
ÖZGÜR CEYLAN (Çanakkale) - Meclis denetlesin diyorum, siz buna niye itiraz ediyorsunuz? Meclisin denetlemesini istemiyor musunuz?
ORHAN YEGİN (Ankara) - ...memleketinizi gururlandıran bir meseleyi dahi böyle okuyan bir insan olarak sizin başka meseleleri de nasıl okuduğunuza ilişkin aslında bir işaret.
ÖZGÜR CEYLAN (Çanakkale) - Millî Savunma Bakanlığı, İçişleri Bakanlığı, Dışişleri Bakanlığı denetlesin diyoruz, buna mı kızıyorsunuz? Denetlemek istemiyor musunuz? Bırakalım, ne isterlerse yapsınlar mı?
ORHAN YEGİN (Ankara) - Sayın Cumhurbaşkanımız bu ülkede üretim yapan ve bunu dışarıya satmak isteyen, bu ülkenin gururlanabileceği herhangi bir üretimi...
ÖZGÜR CEYLAN (Çanakkale) - Kesinlikle fırsat eşitliği yok.
ORHAN YEGİN (Ankara) - ...Sayın Bakanım, ister CHP'li olsun ister başka bir partili olsun ister bize oy vermiş ister vermemiş olsun ister Alevi olsun ister Sünni olsun ister birilerinin altını sürekli çizip sanki orada bir problem varmış gibi anlatmaya çalıştığı Kürt olsun, Zaza olsun, Çerkez olsun hiçbir ayrıma tabi tutmaksızın bu memleketin ürettiği ne değer varsa onun hepsini alıp dünyaya götüren, tanıtan ve daha da inkişaf etsin diye uğraşan bir liderdir.
ÖZGÜR CEYLAN (Çanakkale) - Savunma sanayisinde eşitlik yok, eşit imkânlar sunulmuyor.
ORHAN YEGİN (Ankara) - Cumhurbaşkanımız Togg'u da alıp gittiği ülkelerde devlet başkanlarına Türkiye adına hediye eden bir liderdir.
ÖZGÜR CEYLAN (Çanakkale) - Savunma sanayisinde eşitlik yok, denetlenmesini istiyoruz, stratejik bir satış planının ortaya konulmasını istiyoruz.
ORHAN YEGİN (Ankara) - O da mı damat-kayınpeder ilişkisi? Ayıp değil mi ya! Yakışıyor mu bu ifadeler? Yakışıyor mu bir ifadeler? Bu ifadeler size yakışmıyor.
ÖZGÜR CEYLAN (Çanakkale) - F-35'i alabiliyor musunuz meclis onayı olmadan? Veriyorlar mı F-35'i? F-16'yı bile meclis onayı olmadan vermiyorlar.
OTURUM BAŞKANI ORHAN ERDEM - Sayın Vekilim, siz konuştunuz, lütfen...
ÖZGÜR CEYLAN (Çanakkale) - E, bana...
ORHAN YEGİN (Ankara) - Şimdi devam ediyorlar konuşmalarında, "'Mustafa Kemal'in askerleriyiz.' diyen teğmenleri tasfiye edip Atatürk düşmanlarını Silahlı Kuvvetler bünyesinde tutuyorsunuz." diyorlar. Arkadaşlar, geçen sene de bu konuyu burada işledik. Kimsenin "Mustafa Kemal'in askerleriyiz." diye orduyla ilişiği kesilmedi.
CAVİT ARI (Antalya) - Neyle kesildi?
ORHAN YEGİN (Ankara) - Ordunun...
ÖZGÜR CEYLAN (Çanakkale) - Aynen öyle oldu.
ORHAN YEGİN (Ankara) - Bu konuşuldu, defalarca konuşuldu, ordunun temelinde disiplin var.
CAVİT ARI (Antalya) - Ya, disiplin size gelince mi oluyor?
ORHAN YEGİN (Ankara) - Arkadaşlar, defalarca uyarılmalarına rağmen bunu icra etmişler.
SEYİT TORUN (Ordu) - Aynı şeyleri rozeti çıkaranlara yaptınız mı?
ORHAN YEGİN (Ankara) - Bunu icra etmişler, bu da bir disiplinsizlik olarak değerlendirilmiş...
SEYİT TORUN (Ordu) - Aynı şeyi rozeti çıkaranlara yaptınız mı?
ORHAN YEGİN (Ankara) - ...ve neticesinde bir disiplin cezası almışlar.
SEYİT TORUN (Ordu) - O disiplini rozeti çıkaranlara yaptınız mı?
ORHAN YEGİN (Ankara) - Siz bunu...
ÖZGÜR CEYLAN (Çanakkale) - Rozet takmayanlar geri döndü.
ORHAN YEGİN (Ankara) - Siz bunu çok ucuz bir şekilde...
MİLLÎ SAVUNMA BAKANI YAŞAR GÜLER - Yaptık, yaptık...
ORHAN YEGİN (Ankara) - ...çok ucuz bir siyaset malzemesi yaparak...
MİLLÎ SAVUNMA BAKANI YAŞAR GÜLER - ...onlara da yaptık.
SEYİT TORUN (Ordu) - Yaptıysa sorun yok.
ORHAN YEGİN (Ankara) - ...Atatürk gibi büyük bir ismi,
Atatürk'e muhabbet gibi bu memleketin, bu milletin her bir ferdinin gönlünde yerleşmiş bir muhabbeti kendi ucuz siyasetinizin malzemesi yaparak "'Atatürk'ün askerleriyiz.' dediler diye ihraç ettiniz, orduyla ilişiğini kestiniz, çocukları gönderip yerine Atatürk düşmanlarını orduya dolduruyorsunuz, onları kadroya alıyorsunuz." diyorlar. Bunların hiçbirinin bir anlamı yok. Sonra, birisi çıkıp diyor ki...
MURAT ÇAN (Samsun) - Soralım Bakana, niye kesmişler? Soralım, anlatsın bize.
MİLLÎ SAVUNMA BAKANI YAŞAR GÜLER - Sayın Vekilim, bunu, geçen sene burada çok uzun uzadıya hepsini anlattık.
ORHAN YEGİN (Ankara) - Defalarca konuştuk ya, ayıp ya!
MİLLÎ SAVUNMA BAKANI YAŞAR GÜLER - Geçen sene atılan teğmenlerimizin hiçbirisine "Biz Atatürk'ün temsilcileriyiz, Atatürk'ün askerleriyiz." dediği için tek bir soru dahi sorulmadı, bir. İki, "Neden kılıç çektiniz?" diye hiçbir soru sorulmadı, "Neden bilmem neyi fırlattınız?" diye soru sorulmadı.
MURAT ÇAN (Samsun) - O zaman boştan yere attınız demek ki.
CAVİT ARI (Antalya) - Niye attınız o zaman?
MURAT ÇAN (Samsun) - Tam da anlattığımız şey budur Sayın Bakan.
ÖZGÜR CEYLAN (Çanakkale) - Amirleri niye atıldı?
MİLLÎ SAVUNMA BAKANI YAŞAR GÜLER - Şimdi geliyorum oraya. Müsaade edin, ben bitirmedim. Neden atıldı? Bu tören bittiği anda, bakın, tören bittiği anda bütün aileler orada kendi çocuklarıyla sarılıp öpüşmek için tören alanına girmiş durumda. Bu vaziyetteyken, 1'inci olan kız teğmenimiz geliyor mikrofonun başına "Aileler, lütfen tören alanını terk edin." Böyle bir hakkı var mı? Oradaki ailelerin ve çocukların...
CAVİT ARI (Antalya) - Atılması için yeterli bir suç mu Sayın Bakan?
YAŞAR KIRKPINAR (İzmir) - Bir dakika, bir dinle ya!
ORHAN YEGİN (Ankara) - Sen mi karar vereceksin ona ya!
MİLLÎ SAVUNMA BAKANI YAŞAR GÜLER - Nasıl? Atılması için büyük suç. Siz, işte, böyle bunlar düşünüldüğü için bizim terörle mücadele kırk beş sene sürer, bilmem ne, başka bir olay da olursa elli beş sene sürer. İşte, bu, oradaki bir teğmeni orada beş yıldır bekleyen annesinin, babasının, çocuklarının yanından çağırma hakkı var mı? Var mı, yok mu efendim, size soruyorum.
MURAT ÇAN (Samsun) - Orada buna müdahale edecek komutan yok mu?
CAVİT ARI (Antalya) - Bu nedenle mi atıldı ya, bu nedenle mi atıldı?
OTURUM BAŞKANI ORHAN ERDEM - Sayın Bakanım...
MURAT ÇAN (Samsun) - Nasıl komutansınız siz?
CAVİT ARI (Antalya) - Yetişmiş bir insanı bu nedenle atmak size...
ÖZGÜR CEYLAN (Çanakkale) - Terör bundan dolayı mı bitmiyor yani sırf bu yüzden mi, Atatürkçülere sahip çıkıyoruz diye mi bitmiyor terör?
MİLLÎ SAVUNMA BAKANI YAŞAR GÜLER - Şimdi, arkadaşlar, bakın, sayın vekillerim, lütfen, lütfen... Siz şimdi bu olaya...
NİLGÜN ÖK (Denizli) - İşinize geldiği gibi algılıyorsunuz.
MURAT ÇAN (Samsun) - Konunun özü "Mustafa Kemal'in askerleriyiz."dir, bunun kenarında dolaşmayın.
MİLLÎ SAVUNMA BAKANI YAŞAR GÜLER - Değildir, hayır, arkadaşım, ben size söylüyorum ya!
ORHAN YEGİN (Ankara) - Ya, bırakın bu ucuz siyaseti!
CAVİT ARI (Antalya) - İnanmıyoruz.
ÖZGÜR CEYLAN (Çanakkale) - Terörle, bitmemesiyle ne alakası var?
OTURUM BAŞKANI ORHAN ERDEM - Sayın Bakanım, konuşurken "İnanmıyoruz." diyor, bizde böyle soruyu sorar ondan sonra...
ORHAN YEGİN (Ankara) - Atatürk'ün arkasına geçip siyaset yapmaktan vazgeçin.
MURAT ÇAN (Samsun) - Ne oldu, yetmiyor mu oranın cevabı?
ORHAN YEGİN (Ankara) - Atatürk'ün ismini ağzınızda ikide bir çevirip durmaktan vazgeçin.
MURAT ÇAN (Samsun) - Sana ne oluyor? Oranın cevabı yetersiz mi geldi sana?
ORHAN YEGİN (Ankara) - Vazgeçin kardeşim.
MİLLÎ SAVUNMA BAKANI YAŞAR GÜLER - Müsaade eder misiniz?
OTURUM BAŞKANI ORHAN ERDEM - Sayın Bakanım, bitirirseniz lütfen...
MİLLÎ SAVUNMA BAKANI YAŞAR GÜLER - Değerli vekillerim, bakıyoruz, Cumhuriyet Halk Partisinde 77 insanı atmışsınız, parti...
MURAT ÇAN (Samsun) - Bununla onun ne alakası var ya?
YAŞAR KIRKPINAR (İzmir) - Bir dakika, dinle bir ya!
MİLLÎ SAVUNMA BAKANI YAŞAR GÜLER - Dur, bir dakika, alakası yok, ben de onu söyleyeceğim.
MURAT ÇAN (Samsun) - Sıkışınca Cumhuriyet Halk Partisinin içine girmeyin. Gelin Cumhuriyet Halk Partisine, sıkışınca değil, gelin, hepiniz gelin.
MİLLÎ SAVUNMA BAKANI YAŞAR GÜLER - Hayır, hayır, bir dakika ama müsaade etmiyorsunuz, konuşacağım ya, konuşacağım.
SEYİT TORUN (Ordu) - Biz siyasi partiyiz, siz ordu. TSK tarafsızdır, Atatürkçüdür.
OTURUM BAŞKANI ORHAN ERDEM - Sayın Bakanım, en son zaten vereceğiz. Bir de ne yazık ki böyle bir usul var hem soru soruluyor hem cevaba da müdahale ediliyor. Ne yazık ki bu hoş değil.
YAŞAR KIRKPINAR (İzmir) - Ayıp ya, ayıp ediyorsun.
MURAT ÇAN (Samsun) - Sana ayıp.
YAŞAR KIRKPINAR (İzmir) - Hem soru soruyorsun hem dinlemiyorsun ya.
OTURUM BAŞKANI ORHAN ERDEM - Orhan Bey, son iki dakikanız buyurun.
ORHAN YEGİN (Ankara) - Başkanım, iki dakika mı? Eyvallah.
Peki, her sene Anıtkabir'de beyefendiler rahatsız oluyorlar, Cumhurbaşkanımız geliyor, Anıtkabir ziyareti yapılıyor, oradan çıkarken de oraya ziyarete gelmiş halk, halk gelmiş oraya, beyefendiyi görünce, ülkenin Cumhurbaşkanını görünce muhabbetini gösteriyor.
MURAT ÇAN (Samsun) - Anıtkabir'den rahatsız olan sizsiniz, Genel Başkanınız.
CAVİT ARI (Antalya) - Bindirilmiş kıta onlar, hepsi partinizin gençlik kolları.
SEYİT TORUN (Ordu) - Mezar orası.
MURAT ÇAN (Samsun) - Kim rapor aldı, kim? Rahatsız olarak kim rapor aldı?
ORHAN YEGİN (Ankara) - Ya, bak, bir şey söyleyeceğim, bundan rahatsız oluyorsunuz, bundan rahatsız olmanızı anlarım.
AYYÜCE TÜRKEŞ TAŞ (Adana) - Mezar ya orası, mezar!
ORHAN YEGİN (Ankara) - Bundan rahatsız olmanızı anlarım ama dönüp Sayın Bakana "Her sene Anıtkabir'de böyle bir şey oluyor. Bunu nasıl engellemezsiniz? Siz Atatürk'le kimi kıyaslıyorsunuz, yapmaya çalıştığınız nedir?" gibi çirkin bir yakıştırmayı, çirkin bir suçlamayı, haksız ve yersiz bir ifadeyi asla kabul etmiyoruz.
EYLEM ERTUĞ ERTUĞRUL (Zonguldak) - Oranın kuralı yok mu? Anıtkabir'in kuralı yok mu?
SEYİT TORUN (Ordu) - Mezara da saygınız yok, mezara!
ORHAN YEGİN (Ankara) - Ve sizi arkadaşlar, sıhhatli düşünmeye, sıhhatli davranmaya davet ediyoruz.
VELİ AĞBABA (Malatya) - Utanmadan bunu söyleyebiliyorsun, utanmadan ya! Gençlik kollarını getiriyorsunuz, utanmadan söylüyorsunuz.
CAVİT ARI (Antalya) - Onların hepsi bindirilmiş kıta orada.
ORHAN YEGİN (Ankara) - Birçok şey var konuşacağımız, dakikalarımız gitti.
CAVİT ARI (Antalya) - Sıradan gelen vatandaş değil.
ORHAN YEGİN (Ankara) - Şimdi, Sayın Bakanın konuşmasında Suriye'yle ilgili çelişkilerden bahsettiler. Sayın Bakan, Suriye...
CAVİT ARI (Antalya) - Hazır kıta tutuyorsunuz onları orada.
VELİ AĞBABA (Malatya) - Miting mi yapıyorsunuz orada!
ORHAN YEGİN (Ankara) - Bağırın kardeşim, bağır.
VELİ AĞBABA (Malatya) - Git miting yapacaksan yap başka yerde.
YAŞAR KIRKPINAR (İzmir) - Niye, zorunuza mı gitti?
VELİ AĞBABA (Malatya) - Utanmadan bir de bunları savunuyorsun ya! AK PARTİ'nin gençlik kollarını getiriyorsun, miting yapıyorsun.
CAVİT ARI (Antalya) - Bindirilmiş kıtalar onların hepsi orada, tamam mı!
EYLEM ERTUĞ ERTUĞRUL (Zonguldak) - Orası kabir, git mitingini yap dışarıda.
ORHAN YEGİN (Ankara) - Başkanım, bu şartlarda nasıl konuşacağız?
OTURUM BAŞKANI ORHAN ERDEM - Sayın Ağbaba, arkadaşlar, konuşmasını bitirmesine
müsaade edelim.
ORHAN YEGİN (Ankara) - Sayın Bakan, Suriye'yle ilgili "Başta PKK, PYD/YPG, DSG olmak üzere hiçbir terör örgütünün bölgede kök salmasına ve farklı adlar altında faaliyet göstermesine izin vermeyeceğimizi bir kez daha hatırlatmak isterim." demiş ve yakın zamanda da "Suriye ile SDG arasında entegrasyon sürecinin de tamamlanmasını bekliyoruz, bu görüşmelerin nihayete ermesini bekliyoruz." demiş. Burada gelip Bakanın konuşmasının Suriye'yle ilişkili çelişki içerdiğinden ve bunun eski alışkanlıkları anımsattığından bahsediyorlar. Suriye'de birliği teşvik edici konuşmalar yapılmalıymış, ne yapıyoruz biz? Ne diyor burada Sayın Bakan, konuşmasında? "Suriye ile SDG arasındaki entegrasyonun, görüşmelerinin selametli bir şekilde nihayete ermesini bekliyoruz." diyor. Şimdi deniliyor ki: "Askere gerek yok." Niye gerek yok? "Müzakere ve diplomasi olursa sorunların çözümünde bu yeterlidir, askere gerek yok." Kardeşim, biz müzakereden ve diplomasiden yanayız ama onun yeterli olmadığı yerde de o zaman da askere ihtiyaç vardır ve o asker orada olacaktır. O yüzden, diplomasiyle ve müzakereyle çözülemeyen meseleler var hayatta, kâinatta, dünyanın birçok yerinde; böyle her şey güllük gülistanlıkmış, oturup konuşmayla bu işler çözülüyormuş... O zaman, dünyada hiçbir ülkenin orduya, askere ihtiyacı olmazdı, böyle Pollyanna cümlelerle bu tarz konuşmaları yapmamak lazım.
MURAT ÇAN (Samsun) - Mektupla çözüyorsunuz, mektupla...
ORHAN YEGİN (Ankara) - Türkiye...
(Mikrofon otomatik cihaz tarafından kapatıldı)
ORHAN YEGİN (Ankara) - Başkanım, çok kesildi, bir dakika rica edeceğim.
OTURUM BAŞKANI ORHAN ERDEM - Onu arada kestim ve vermiştim.
ORHAN YEGİN (Ankara) - Yarım dakika...
OTURUM BAŞKANI ORHAN ERDEM - Lütfen, selamlama için söz veriyorum.
ORHAN YEGİN (Ankara) - Tamam.
Şimdi, bir de sürekli Ankara-Suriye ilişkisinde "Türkiye'nin Kürtlerle...", "Türkiye'nin Kürtlerle şöyle...", "Türkiye'nin..." Kardeşim, bizim Kürtlerle bir meselemiz yok. Türkiye'nin Kürtlerle de hiçbir etnik aidiyetle de meselesi yok, hiçbir mezhep mensubiyetiyle de meselesi yok, hiçbir meselemiz yok bizim. Bizim meselemiz düşmanlık edenle, bizim meselemiz mezhebini kullanıp silahı eline alanla, bizim meselemiz etnik kökenini, dinini, inancını, akrabalığımızı, ilişkimizi, kardeşliğimizi, her neyse, bunu bahane edip, eline silahı alıp bölgeyi karıştırmaya çalışanla.
(Mikrofon otomatik cihaz tarafından kapatıldı)
OTURUM BAŞKANI ORHAN ERDEM - Orhan Bey, lütfen tamamlayalım.
ORHAN YEGİN (Ankara) - Bizim meselemiz ülkemize meydan okuyanla; geleceğimizi, hepimizin geleceğini -kimseyi ayırt etmeden söylüyorum- tehdit altına almaya çalışanlarla ve bunlarla mücadelemiz sürecek kardeşim, sonuna kadar sürecek Allah'ın izniyle.
Teşekkür ederim.
records.englishTranslation:
ORHAN YEGİN (Ankara) - President, thank you.
I greet our esteemed Minister, all our guests and esteemed members of parliament here with respect and respect.
Thank God Almighty, as the AK PARTY government for twenty-three years, we have been blessed to take every issue in Türkiye much further than the day we came to power, both infrastructure works, human resources works, cultural and political steps that will ensure that the society is more together and more integrated, and with all of them, we have also grown our brotherhood and taken our country much further than the point we took it. We have taken steps and achieved very serious developments in both the military and defense fields in these twenty-three years. Here, of course, the technologies put forward in the defense industry and the progress made in this regard are extremely important, but our army, our military, does not only gain and increase its power with the progress it has made in the defense industry, but also the attitude it displays, its attitude towards maintaining stability even though some people in its region constantly use the concepts of conflict and war, its power within NATO, its role and responsibility in different crisis geographies of the world and its attitude in fulfilling this, its example to the world, its own attitude, even when carrying out its own cross-border operations.
At a time when even the people among us are attacking themselves, "Not even a civilian should have a nosebleed." With the risks it took and the operations it carried out in this way, our army has demonstrated a much greater success with its morality, culture, knowledge, the way it reflects its power in line with its goals in the field, its style of preserving peace and tranquility, its technology, and recently, especially with July 15, by eliminating different cliques and solidarity within it, and today, as it did yesterday, it stands behind us, behind our nation, as one of our favorite institutions. Its contribution to regional peace, its military training with countries such as Libya, Azerbaijan, Syria and Somalia, the escort and protection it provided to our ships, its duties in KFOR or IFOR in Kosovo within NATO, its military training and cooperation agreements with 92 countries, from Bosnia and Herzegovina, are one of the best data showing us that our army and this attitude we have demonstrated have moved to a much better place in the world.
Of course, we said that our defense industry is important. Our friends may have mentioned the products that emerged in their speeches, I will not repeat them, but I would like to tell you this: Dear Minister, while talking about export figures here, the effect of the success we have demonstrated in the defense industry in Türkiye's share of global exports, which was 0.55 in 2002, from 0.5 in 2002 to almost 1.1 today, and the value per kilogram of the product Türkiye exports, which is also an export value that we proudly say, is compared to the impact of the success we have achieved in the defense industry. We must proudly say that the developments in our defense industry played a big role in our increase from 50 cents per kilogram in 2002 to over 1.5 dollars today.

Of course, while we are saying this, friends in the opposition say, "The point our defense industry has reached is undoubtedly pleasing." They started saying alhamdulillah. They used to make fun of it, "If you do it, we'll see, it doesn't exist!" "You can only make his kite, that's the only way you can do it." As the friends who criticized every intention and initiative in every job we intended to do, the friends who made fun of us that day, started to see the products today, the deliveries and the executions in the fields today, they said, "It is undoubtedly pleasing." They started to say, but "This very important and strategic area should not be used as an area for favoritism and enrichment." Unfortunately, they added a very ugly sentence.
ÖZGÜR CEYLAN (Çanakkale) - That's exactly how they used it.
ORHAN YEGİN (Ankara) - "Son-in-law and father-in-law traveling from country to country to sell UAVs and SIHAs." It is not the right attitude.
ÖZGÜR CEYLAN (Çanakkale) - The sales strategy is completely wrong.
ORHAN YEGİN (Ankara) - This is from where you stand on this issue.
ÖZGÜR CEYLAN (Çanakkale) - I say the parliament should inspect it, why do you object to this? Don't you want the parliament to check?
ORHAN YEGİN (Ankara) - As a person who reads even an issue that makes your country proud, it is actually a sign of how you read other issues.
ÖZGÜR CEYLAN (Çanakkale) - We say that the Ministry of National Defense, the Ministry of Internal Affairs and the Ministry of Foreign Affairs should inspect it, are you angry about this? Don't want to audit? Let them do whatever they want, shall we?
ORHAN YEGİN (Ankara) - Our esteemed President, anyone who produces in this country and wants to sell it abroad, any production that this country can be proud of.
ÖZGÜR CEYLAN (Çanakkale) - There is absolutely no equal opportunity.
ORHAN YEGİN (Ankara) - Dear Minister, he is a leader who takes all the values ​​​​that this country produces, takes them to the world, introduces them and strives to develop them further, regardless of whether they are CHP members or members of another party, whether they voted for us or not, whether they are Alevis or Sunnis, whether they are Kurds, Zazas or Circassians, whom he constantly underlines someone and tries to explain as if there is a problem there.
ÖZGÜR CEYLAN (Çanakkale) - There is no equality in the defense industry, equal opportunities are not offered.
ORHAN YEGİN (Ankara) - Our President is a leader who took Togg as a gift to the heads of state in the countries he visited, on behalf of Türkiye.
ÖZGÜR CEYLAN (Çanakkale) - There is no equality in the defense industry, we want it to be inspected, we want a strategic sales plan to be put forward.
ORHAN YEGİN (Ankara) - Is that also the son-in-law-father-in-law relationship? Isn't it a shame? Do these expressions fit? Do these expressions match? These expressions do not suit you.
ÖZGÜR CEYLAN (Çanakkale) - Can you buy F-35 without parliamentary approval? Do they give F-35? They don't even provide F-16 without parliamentary approval.
CHAIRMAN OF THE SESSION ORHAN ERDEM - Dear Deputy, you have spoken, please.
ÖZGÜR CEYLAN (Çanakkale) - Well, me.
ORHAN YEGİN (Ankara) - Now they continue their speech, "'We are Mustafa Kemal's soldiers.' "You are liquidating the lieutenants who said, and keeping Atatürk's enemies within the Armed Forces." they say. Friends, we covered this topic here last year too.

Nobody said, "We are Mustafa Kemal's soldiers." He was not dismissed from the army because of this.
CAVİT ARI (Antalya) - What was it cut with?
ORHAN YEGİN (Ankara) - The army.
ÖZGÜR CEYLAN (Çanakkale) - That's exactly what happened.
ORHAN YEGİN (Ankara) - This has been talked about, it has been talked about many times, discipline is the basis of the army.
CAVİT ARI (Antalya) - Does discipline happen when it comes to you?
ORHAN YEGİN (Ankara) - Friends did this despite being warned many times.
SEYİT TORUN (Army) - Did you do the same things to those who took off their badges?
ORHAN YEGİN (Ankara) - They did this, and it was considered as indiscipline.
SEYİT TORUN (Army) - Did you do the same thing to those who took off their badges?
ORHAN YEGİN (Ankara) - .and as a result they received a disciplinary penalty.
SEYİT TORUN (Army) - Did you impose that discipline on those who issued the badge?
ORHAN YEGİN (Ankara) - You do this.
ÖZGÜR CEYLAN (Çanakkale) - Those who did not wear badges returned.
ORHAN YEGİN (Ankara) - You can do this very cheaply.
MINISTER OF NATIONAL DEFENSE YAŞAR GÜLER - We did it, we did it.
ORHAN YEGİN (Ankara) - By making it a very cheap political material.
MINISTER OF NATIONAL DEFENSE YAŞAR GÜLER - We did it to them too.
SEYİT TORUN (Ordu) - If he did it, there is no problem.
ORHAN YEGİN (Ankara) - A great name like Atatürk,
By making the love for Atatürk, which has settled in the hearts of every individual of this country and this nation, a material for your own cheap politics, you say, "'We are Atatürk's soldiers.' "You expelled them because they said so, you cut ties with the army, you send the children and fill the army with Ataturk's enemies instead, you recruit them." they say. None of this makes any sense. Then someone comes along and says.
MURAT ÇAN (Samsun) - Let's ask the Minister, why did they cut it? Let's ask, let him tell us.
MINISTER OF NATIONAL DEFENSE YAŞAR GÜLER - Dear Deputy, we explained this at great length here last year.
ORHAN YEGİN (Ankara) - We talked about it many times, what a shame!
MINISTER OF NATIONAL DEFENSE YAŞAR GÜLER - None of our lieutenants who were fired last year were told, "We are Atatürk's representatives, we are Atatürk's soldiers." Not a single question was asked because he said, one. Two, "Why did you draw your sword?" No questions were asked, "Why did you throw something?" No question was asked.
MURAT ÇAN (Samsun) - Then you threw it away for nothing.
CAVİT ARI (Antalya) - Why did you throw it then?
MURAT ÇAN (Samsun) - This is exactly what we are talking about, Mr. Minister.
ÖZGÜR CEYLAN (Çanakkale) - Why were their superiors fired?
MINISTER OF NATIONAL DEFENSE YAŞAR GÜLER - I am coming there now. Excuse me, I'm not finished. Why was he kicked out? As soon as this ceremony is over, look, as soon as the ceremony is over, all the families have entered the ceremony area to hug and kiss their children. While we were in this situation, our first lieutenant came to the microphone and said, "Families, please leave the ceremony area." Does he have such a right? The families and children there.
CAVİT ARI (Antalya) - Is it a sufficient crime to be expelled, Mr. Minister?
YAŞAR KIRKPINAR (İzmir) - Wait a minute, listen!
ORHAN YEGİN (Ankara) - Will you decide that?
MINISTER OF NATIONAL DEFENSE YAŞAR GÜLER - How? It's a big crime to commit. You say, well, considering these things, our fight against terrorism will last forty-five years, or if something else happens, it will last fifty-five years.

That's it, does he have the right to call a lieutenant from his mother, father and children who have been waiting there for five years? Is it there or not, sir, I ask you.
MURAT ÇAN (Samsun) - Is there no commander there to intervene in this?
CAVİT ARI (Antalya) - Was he expelled for this reason or was he expelled for this reason?
CHAIRMAN OF THE SESSION ORHAN ERDEM - Dear Minister.
MURAT ÇAN (Samsun) - What kind of commander are you?
CAVİT ARI (Antalya) - Throwing away a trained person for this reason.
ÖZGÜR CEYLAN (Çanakkale) - Is this why terrorism does not end, just because we support Ataturkists?
MINISTER OF NATIONAL DEFENSE YAŞAR GÜLER - Now, friends, look, my dear deputies, please, please. You are now in this situation.
NİLGÜN ÖK (Denizli) - You perceive it as it suits you.
MURAT ÇAN (Samsun) - The essence of the issue is "We are Mustafa Kemal's soldiers.", do not stray around this.
MINISTER OF NATIONAL DEFENSE YAŞAR GÜLER - It is not, no, my friend, I'm telling you!
ORHAN YEGİN (Ankara) - Oh, stop this cheap politics!
CAVİT ARI (Antalya) - We do not believe it.
ÖZGÜR CEYLAN (Çanakkale) - What does it have to do with terrorism and its not ending?
CHAIRMAN OF THE SESSION ORHAN ERDEM - Dear Minister, while speaking, "We do not believe." He says, and then we ask the same question.
ORHAN YEGİN (Ankara) - Stop doing politics behind Atatürk.
MURAT ÇAN (Samsun) - What happened? Isn't the answer there enough?
ORHAN YEGİN (Ankara) - Stop repeating Atatürk's name over and over again.
MURAT ÇAN (Samsun) - What's happening to you? Did the answer seem inadequate to you?
ORHAN YEGİN (Ankara) - Give up, brother.
MINISTER OF NATIONAL DEFENSE YAŞAR GÜLER - Would you allow?
CHAIRMAN OF THE SESSION ORHAN ERDEM - Dear Minister, please finish.
MINISTER OF NATIONAL DEFENSE YAŞAR GÜLER - Dear MPs, we see that you have expelled 77 people from the Republican People's Party.
MURAT ÇAN (Samsun) - What does that have to do with this?
YAŞAR KIRKPINAR (İzmir) - Wait a minute, listen!
MINISTER OF NATIONAL DEFENSE YAŞAR GÜLER - Wait a minute, it's irrelevant, that's what I'll say.
MURAT ÇAN (Samsun) - Do not join the Republican People's Party when you are in trouble. Come to the Republican People's Party, not when you are stuck, come, all of you.
MINISTER OF NATIONAL DEFENSE YAŞAR GÜLER - No, no, wait a minute, but you are not allowing me, I will talk, I will talk.
SEYİT TORUN (Army) - We are the political party, you are the army. The Turkish Armed Forces is neutral and pro-Ataturk.
CHAIRMAN OF THE SESSION ORHAN ERDEM - Dear Minister, we will give it at the end anyway. Unfortunately, there is such a method where both the question is asked and the answer is interfered with. Unfortunately this is not nice.
YAŞAR KIRKPINAR (İzmir) - What a shame, you are being rude.
MURAT ÇAN (Samsun) - Shame on you.
YAŞAR KIRKPINAR (İzmir) - You are asking questions and not listening at the same time.
CHAIRMAN OF THE SESSION ORHAN ERDEM - Mr. Orhan, here are your last two minutes.
ORHAN YEGİN (Ankara) - President, two minutes? Thanks.
Well, every year the gentlemen get disturbed in Anıtkabir, our President comes, he visits Anıtkabir, and when he leaves there, the people who came there to visit, the people came there, when they see the gentleman, when they see the President of the country, they show their affection.
MURAT ÇAN (Samsun) - You are the one who is disturbed by Anıtkabir, your Chairman.

CAVİT ARI (Antalya) - They are a superimposed continent, they are all the youth branches of your party.
SEYİT TORUN (Ordu) - That's the grave.
MURAT ÇAN (Samsun) - Who received the report, who? Who received a report as disturbed?
ORHAN YEGİN (Ankara) - Well, look, I have something to say, you are disturbed by this, I understand your discomfort.
AYYÜCE TÜRKEŞ TAŞ (Adana) - It's a grave, a grave!
ORHAN YEGİN (Ankara) - I understand that you are disturbed by this, but I turned to the Minister and said, "Something like this happens in Anıtkabir every year. How can you not prevent this? Who are you comparing with Atatürk, what are you trying to do?" We never accept such an ugly epithet, an ugly accusation, or an unfair and inappropriate statement.
EYLEM ERTUĞ ERTUĞRUL (Zonguldak) - Aren't there any rules there? Doesn't Anıtkabir have any rules?
SEYİT TORUN (Ordu) - You don't respect the grave either, to the grave!
ORHAN YEGİN (Ankara) - And we invite you, friends, to think healthy and act healthy.
VELİ AĞBABA (Malatya) - You can say this without shame, without shame! You bring the youth branches, you say it without shame.
CAVİT ARI (Antalya) - They are all superimposed continents there.
ORHAN YEGİN (Ankara) - We have many things to talk about, our minutes are gone.
CAVİT ARI (Antalya) - He is not an ordinary citizen.
ORHAN YEGİN (Ankara) - Now, in the Minister's speech, they talked about the contradictions regarding Syria. Dear Minister, Syria.
CAVİT ARI (Antalya) - You keep them ready there.
VELİ AĞBABA (Malatya) - Are you holding a rally there!
ORHAN YEGİN (Ankara) - Shout, brother, shout.
VELİ AĞBABA (Malatya) - If you are going to hold a rally, do it somewhere else.
YAŞAR KIRKPINAR (İzmir) - Why, did it bother you?
VELİ AĞBABA (Malatya) - And you defend these things shamelessly! You bring the youth branches of the AK Party and hold a rally.
CAVİT ARI (Antalya) - Superimposed continents, they are all there, okay!
EYLEM ERTUĞ ERTUĞRUL (Zonguldak) - That is the grave, go and hold your rally outside.
ORHAN YEGİN (Ankara) - President, how will we talk under these conditions?
CHAIRMAN OF THE SESSION ORHAN ERDEM - Mr. Ağbaba, friends, before he finishes his speech,
Let's allow it.
ORHAN YEGİN (Ankara) - Dear Minister, regarding Syria, "I would like to remind you once again that we will not allow any terrorist organization, especially PKK, PYD/YPG, DSG, to take root in the region and operate under different names." he said and recently said, "We expect the integration process between Syria and the SDF to be completed, we expect these negotiations to come to an end." he said. Here they come and talk about the Minister's speech containing contradictions regarding Syria and that it reminds of old habits. There should be speeches encouraging unity in Syria, what are we doing? What does the Minister say here in his speech? "We expect the integration and talks between Syria and the SDF to conclude safely." he says. Now it is said: "There is no need for the military." Why is there no need? "If there is negotiation and diplomacy, this is enough to solve the problems, there is no need for military." Brother, we are in favor of negotiation and diplomacy, but where that is not enough, then there is a need for soldiers and those soldiers will be there.

That's why there are issues in life, in the universe, and in many parts of the world that cannot be solved through diplomacy and negotiation; Everything was a bed of roses, these things were solved by sitting down and talking. At that time, no country in the world would need an army or soldiers. We should not make such speeches with Pollyanna sentences.
MURAT ÇAN (Samsun) - You solve it by letter.
ORHAN YEGİN (Ankara) - Türkiye.
(The microphone was automatically turned off by the device)
ORHAN YEGİN (Ankara) - Chairman, I am very interrupted, I would like to ask for a minute.
CHAIRMAN OF THE SESSION ORHAN ERDEM - I interrupted it and gave it to him.
ORHAN YEGİN (Ankara) - Half a minute.
CHAIRMAN OF THE SESSION ORHAN ERDEM - Please, I promise to greet you.
ORHAN YEGİN (Ankara) - OK.
Now, there is also the constant Ankara-Syria relationship: "Türkiye with the Kurds.", "Türkiye with the Kurds this way.", "Türkiye with the Kurds." Brother, we have no problem with the Kurds. Türkiye has no problem with the Kurds, nor with any ethnic affiliation, nor with any sectarian affiliation, we have no problem whatsoever. Our issue is with those who are hostile, our issue is with those who use their sect and take up the gun, our issue is with those who use their ethnic origin, religion, belief, kinship, relationship, brotherhood, whatever as an excuse, take the gun in their hand and try to disrupt the region.
(The microphone was automatically turned off by the device)
CHAIRMAN OF THE SESSION ORHAN ERDEM - Mr. Orhan, please let's finish.
ORHAN YEGİN (Ankara) - Our issue is with those who challenge our country; Our fight against those who try to threaten our future, the future of all of us - I say this without distinguishing anyone - will continue, brother, until the end, God willing.
Thank you.

records.originalTurkish:
ORHAN YEGİN (Ankara) - Başkanım, teşekkür ederim.
Sayın Bakanımızı, burada bulunan bütün misafirlerimizi ve bütün milletvekillerini, herkesi saygıyla selamlıyorum.
"İnsan aklı ile vicdanı arasında sefer ederek kendini bulur." diye çok güzel, sevdiğim bir söz var.
AYYÜCE TÜRKEŞ TAŞ (Adana) - Felsefi bir cümle.
ORHAN YEGİN (Ankara) - Gıpta ve haset arasında gidip geliyor bizim muhalefet. Arkadaşlar, "Haset eden mahrum kalır." demişler, haset etmeyin. Biz milletimize yirmi üç yıldır sayısız eser, sayısız imkân kazandırdık ve sunduk.
YÜKSEL TAŞKIN (İzmir) - Sen kendini dev aynasında görüyorsun.
AYŞE SİBEL YANIKÖMEROĞLU (İstanbul) - Bravo!
ORHAN YEGİN (Ankara) - Bunca eser, bunca hizmetle mutlu olup memnuniyet duyan herkese aittir, milletin her bir ferdinin eseridir. Bir noksan varsa ki vardır, o bize aittir, o eksikliklerin hepsini tamamlamaya azim ve gayret de boynumuzun borcudur.
"Kıymetini bilen insanlara zaafı vardır milletin." derler. Murat Kurum Bakanımız da tıpkı liderini örnek alarak yaptığı işlerle milletinin kıymetini bildiği için bugün milletinin muhabbetine mazhar olmuş, dolayısıyla hem Konyalı olmuş hem Ankaralı olmuş hem Hataylı olmuş hem Osmaniyeli olmuş hem İstanbullu hem İzmirli hem Elâzığlı olmuş yani memlekette hemşehri olarak sayılmayan bir yer bırakmamış bir adamdır.
(Uğultular)
SEDA KÂYA ÖSEN (İzmir) - Maşallah, maşallah!
TAHSİN OCAKLI (Rize) - Bir Rizeli olmamış.
ORHAN YEGİN (Ankara) - Allah razı olsun, bütün ekibiyle beraber yapmıştır bunu.
SEDA KÂYA ÖSEN (İzmir) - Divan edebiyatı yapıyorsun.
ORHAN YEGİN (Ankara) - Bakanlıklarından önceki bakanların da elbette bu sürece büyük katkısı vardır, bu AK PARTİ'nin yirmi üç yıllık hikâyesidir.
SEDA KÂYA ÖSEN (İzmir) - Yıkama, yağlama...
ORHAN YEGİN (Ankara) - Son dönemde Cumhur İttifakı'yla beraber attığı imzanın da... O Bakanlıkta kumandanın başında Sayın Bakanımız vardır. Biz kendisine çok teşekkür ediyoruz.
Ben zaman zaman bu toplantılarda TOKİ istatistikleri veriyorum, TOKİ her yıl... İstatistik eskiyecek diye endişe ediyorum ama bakıyorum her yıl yeni bir istatistik ekliyor maşallah.
CAVİT ARI (Antalya) - Doğru yere yapılan her şeyi destekleriz, yanlış yere yapıyorsunuz.
ORHAN YEGİN (Ankara) - TOKİ'nin kırk yıllık ömrü var, yirmi üç yılı AK PARTİ döneminde, on dokuz yılı AK PARTİ öncesinde, yarı yarıya diyelim. Arkadaşlar, AK PARTİ'den önceki yarı ömründe ürettiği konut sayısı 43.415; AK PARTİ'yle geçen yarı ömründe ürettiği konut sayısı 1 milyon 750 bin. Bugün günde 550 tane konut üretiyor. Günde 550 ürettiğini kendi ömründen önce, AK PARTİ'den önceki dönemde yapılan konuta böldüğümüz zaman, arkadaşlar, o yirmi yılı AK PARTİ sadece seksen günde tamamlayabiliyor. Yılda 2.200 konut üreten irade bugün bir seferde 3.500 şantiyede, arkadaşlar, günde 76 bin konut üretir hâle gelmiş.
CAVİT ARI (Antalya) - Kaç tane anlayamadım, 76 bin mi?
ORHAN YEGİN (Ankara) - Bu rakamları aklınıza iyi kazıyın, AK PARTİ'nin ne olduğunu, Cumhur İttifakı'nın ne olduğunu iyi belleyin arkadaşlar.
SEDA KÂYA ÖSEN (İzmir) - Ay, iğrenç ya vallahi.
ORHAN YEGİN (Ankara) - Şimdi "Millet bahçesine kek yiyip yuvarlanacak yer yapmışlar." diyen arkadaşlar...
YÜKSEL TAŞKIN (İzmir) - Onu siz diyordunuz.
ORHAN YEGİN (Ankara) - ..."sosyal donatı" deyince oturup kâğıt oynanan yerler zannediyor olabilirler, sosyal donatılardan da bahsediliyor çünkü. Konutların ihtiyacını sağlayacak 1.500 civarı okul, 1.240 cami, 2.900 ticaret üniteleri, 270 hastane, 100'ün üzerinde sağlık ocağı, kültür merkezleri, peyzaj alanları olmak üzere 66 bin sosyal donatı alanı yapmışız; arkadaşlar, bunlar kâğıt oynanan kahveler değil, bunlar içerisinde... Haricen, 22 tane stadyumun, 220 tane yurdun olduğu işler de var. Dolayısıyla, işleri küçümsemeye kalkmayın, rakamlar konuşulduğu zaman siz komik hâle düşüyorsunuz.
EVRİM RIZVANOĞLU (İstanbul) - Asıl komik sizsiniz.
ORHAN YEGİN (Ankara) - Şimdi, "Hep afet sonrasına odaklandığı için işler iyi gitmiyor Sayın Bakan, hâlbuki sizin riski azaltmaya odaklanmanız lazım." diyorlar. Ne yapıyoruz biz kardeşim, biz ne yapıyoruz ya! Biz bir yandan işin mevzuatını geliştirip düzenlemeye, bir yandan bu konuyla ilgili sözü, çalışması olan
herkesi sürecin içerisine katmaya, bin türlü nazlarına rağmen onlara katlanarak sizin belediyelerinizi işin içinde tutmaya, görünür kılmaya, hibelerle, teşviklerle, ucuz kredilerle devlet eliyle bu riski azaltmaya çalışıyoruz. "Kentsel dönüşüm" diyoruz, destek olacağınıza adamları toplayıp gelip vatandaşın kafasını karıştırıyor, vatandaşı nümayişe zorluyorsunuz, nümayişe!
NAİL ÇİLER (Kocaeli) - Bir ay oldu, Gebze'de dükkânlar kapandı, hiç bir şey yapmadınız.
ORHAN YEGİN (Ankara) - Açık söylemek lazım ki bu ülkede kentsel dönüşümün önünde de en büyük engel muhalefettir, muhalefetin koyduğu takozdur ama çok şükür, tüm engellemelere rağmen biz bu yolda da ilerliyoruz.
CAVİT ARI (Antalya) - En büyük günah iftiradır, iftira. Bak, en büyük günah iftiradır. İstersen din kitaplarını aç bir karıştır yani boşa namaz kılıyorsun, iftira atıyorsun.
ORHAN YEGİN (Ankara) - Kentsel dönüşüm kapsamına alınmış bugün 2,3 milyon bağımsız bölüm var, ev ve iş yerleri var. Yaklaşık 250 bin ev ve iş yerinde yenileme çalışmalarımız hamdolsun sürüyor ve bu çalışmalar Türkiye'nin genelinde olmakla beraber yapılan çalışmaların yarısı deprem riskinin en yüksek olduğu yerde yapılıyor, İstanbul'da. Peki, arkadaşlar, siz İstanbul'da deprem için ne yaptınız ya? Deprem riskini azaltmak için ne yaptınız da gelip burada bu cümleleri konuşuyorsunuz? Bırakın bu işleri!
CAVİT ARI (Antalya) - Ne yapacak belediye? Cumhuriyet Halk Partili belediye altı buçuk yıldır İstanbul'u yönetiyor, otuz yıldır siz ne yaptınız, anlatın. Otuz yıldır İstanbul'da ne yaptınız, bir anlatın.
ORHAN YEGİN (Ankara) - Şimdi, "Arnavutköy Belediyeniz rant uğruna birçok taşınmazı sattı." diyorlar.
CAVİT ARI (Antalya) - Toplanma alanlarının hepsini gökdelen yaptınız.
ORHAN YEGİN (Ankara) - "Arnavutköy Belediyeniz rant uğruna birçok taşınmazı sattı." diyorlar. Haberleri vardır ama biz yine de soralım bu arkadaşlara: Ankara Büyükşehir Belediyesinin satışlarından haberiniz var mı?
CAVİT ARI (Antalya) - Hangi yüzle, utanmadan soruyorsunuz? Otuz yıl İstanbul'u siz yönettiniz, bütün toplanma alanlarını gökdelen yaptınız, gökdelen.
ORHAN YEGİN (Ankara) - Bu satışların ne kadar olduğundan haberiniz var mı, bu satışlardan elde ettiği paraları ne yaptığından, neleri yapmayıp millete nasıl eziyetler yaşattığından?
EVRİM RIZVANOĞLU (İstanbul) - Her şey para mı, her şey para mı!
ORHAN YEGİN (Ankara) - Söyleyelim: Bu yılın bütçesi 100 milyardı, gerçekleşmeye bakarsan 85 milyar olacak.
NİLGÜN ÖK (Denizli) - 100 bin konut ne oldu, 100 bin konut?
CAVİT ARI (Antalya) - Gökdelen diktiniz her tarafa, bir tane toplanma alanı göster!
ORHAN YEGİN (Ankara) - Arkadaşlar, Ankara Büyükşehrin sadece geçen sene yaptığı satışların toplamı 60 milyar, 60 milyar, yaklaşık yıllık bütçesi kadar ve hâlâ her ay 10-15 tane satış için yetki alıyor.
CAVİT ARI (Antalya) - Her taraf gökdelen oldu sayenizde, İstanbul'a ihanet ettiniz. Siz kendiniz söylüyorsunuz, Cumhurbaşkanı kendi söylüyor "İstanbul'a ihanet ettik." diye.
ORHAN YEGİN (Ankara) - Artık, bu gidişle satacağı bir şey de kalmayacak.
CAVİT ARI (Antalya) - İstanbul'u mahvettiniz, düzeltmeye çalışıyor...
ORHAN YEGİN (Ankara) - Yatırım da yok, trafik de çok, musluktan doğru düzgün akan su da yok ama konser çok. Hani konutları konuşuyoruz ya, hani, hani!
CAVİT ARI (Antalya) - İstanbul mahvoldu sizin yüzünüzden!
OTURUM BAŞKANI ORHAN ERDEM - 2 konuşmacı sonra sizde Sayın Arı.
ŞENGÜL KARSLI (İstanbul) - Bağırarak gerçekleri kapatamazsınız.

records.englishTranslation:
ORHAN YEGİN (Ankara) - President, thank you.
I respectfully greet our esteemed Minister, all our guests here, all the MPs and everyone.
"A person finds himself by traveling between his mind and conscience." There is a very beautiful saying that I like.
AYYÜCE TÜRKEŞ TAŞ (Adana) - A philosophical sentence.
ORHAN YEGİN (Ankara) - Our opposition oscillates between envy and envy. Friends, "He who envies will be deprived." They said, don't be jealous. We have provided and presented countless works and countless opportunities to our nation for twenty-three years.
YÜKSEL TAŞKIN (İzmir) - You see yourself in the giant mirror.
AYŞE SİBEL YANIKÖMEROĞLU (Istanbul) - Bravo!
ORHAN YEGİN (Ankara) - All these works belong to everyone who is happy and satisfied with all these services, they are the work of every individual of the nation. If there is a deficiency, it belongs to us, and it is our duty to persevere and strive to complete all of those shortcomings.
"The nation has a weakness for people who know their value." they say. Murat Kurum, our Minister, is a man who has become the recipient of his nation's affection today because he knows the value of his nation with the work he does by taking his leader as an example. Therefore, he is a man from Konya, Ankara, Hatay, Osmaniye, Istanbul, Izmir and Elazığ, in other words, he has not left a place in the country that is not considered as his fellow countryman.
(Humming)
SEDA KÂYA ÖSEN (İzmir) - Mashallah, mashallah!
TAHSİN OCAKLI (Rize) - There was no one from Rize.
ORHAN YEGİN (Ankara) - God bless him, he did this with his entire team.
SEDA KÂYA ÖSEN (İzmir) - You make divan literature.
ORHAN YEGİN (Ankara) - Of course, the previous ministers also contributed greatly to this process, this is the twenty-three-year story of the AK PARTY.
SEDA KÂYA ÖSEN (İzmir) - Washing, lubrication.
ORHAN YEGİN (Ankara) - The signature he signed with the People's Alliance recently. Our esteemed Minister is at the head of the command in that Ministry. We thank him very much.
I give TOKİ statistics at these meetings from time to time, TOKİ every year. I worry that the statistics will get old, but I see that they add new statistics every year, thank God.
CAVİT ARI (Antalya) - We support everything that is done in the right place, you are doing it in the wrong place.
ORHAN YEGİN (Ankara) - TOKİ has a lifespan of forty years, twenty-three years during the AK Party period, nineteen years before the AK Party, let's say half of it. Friends, the number of houses produced by the AK PARTY in its half-life was 43,415; The number of houses produced by the AK Party in its half-life is 1 million 750 thousand. Today, it produces 550 houses a day. When we divide what he produces 550 per day by the number of houses built in his lifetime, before the AK PARTY, friends, the AK PARTY can complete those twenty years in just eighty days. The will, which produces 2,200 houses a year, has now produced 76 thousand houses a day, friends, at 3,500 construction sites at a time.
CAVİT ARI (Antalya) - I couldn't understand how many, 76 thousand?
ORHAN YEGİN (Ankara) - Memorize these numbers well, friends, what the AK PARTY is and what the People's Alliance is.
SEDA KÂYA ÖSEN (İzmir) - Oh, I swear, it's disgusting.
ORHAN YEGİN (Ankara) - Now "They have made a place to eat cake and roll around in the public garden." friends who say.
YÜKSEL TAŞKIN (İzmir) - That's what you said.

ORHAN YEGİN (Ankara) - When you say "social facilities", they may think of places where you sit and play cards, because social facilities are also mentioned. We have built 66 thousand social facilities, including around 1,500 schools, 1,240 mosques, 2,900 commercial units, 270 hospitals, more than 100 health centers, cultural centers and landscape areas, to meet the needs of residences; Friends, these are not cafes where you play cards, these are among them. Apart from that, there are also projects involving 22 stadiums and 220 dormitories. So, don't try to underestimate things, you become funny when the numbers are talked about.
EVRİM RIZVANOĞLU (Istanbul) - You are the real funny one.
ORHAN YEGİN (Ankara) - Now, "Things are not going well, Mr. Minister, because they always focus on the aftermath of the disaster, whereas you should focus on reducing the risk." they say. What are we doing brother, what are we doing! On the one hand, we are developing and regulating the legislation of the business, and on the other hand, we are working with those who have a say and work on this subject.
We are trying to include everyone in the process, to keep your municipalities involved by putting up with them despite their various objections, to make them visible, and to reduce this risk with the help of the state with grants, incentives and cheap loans. We say "urban transformation", but instead of supporting you, you gather people and come and confuse the citizens, forcing the citizens to protest, demonstration!
NAİL ÇİLER (Kocaeli) - It's been a month, the shops were closed in Gebze, you didn't do anything.
ORHAN YEGİN (Ankara) - It must be clear that the biggest obstacle to urban transformation in this country is the opposition, the wedge set by the opposition, but thankfully, despite all the obstacles, we are moving forward on this path.
CAVİT ARI (Antalya) - The biggest sin is slander, slander. Look, the biggest sin is slander. If you want, open the religious books and look through them, that is, you are praying in vain and slandering.
ORHAN YEGİN (Ankara) - Today, there are 2.3 million independent units, houses and workplaces included in the scope of urban transformation. Thank God, our renovation works continue in approximately 250 thousand houses and workplaces, and although these works are throughout Türkiye, half of the works are carried out in the place where the earthquake risk is highest, in Istanbul. So, friends, what did you do for the earthquake in Istanbul? What did you do to reduce the risk of earthquakes that makes you come here and say these sentences? Leave these things alone!
CAVİT ARI (Antalya) - What will the municipality do? The municipality with the Republican People's Party has been governing Istanbul for six and a half years. Tell me what you have done for thirty years. Tell us what you have done in Istanbul for thirty years.
ORHAN YEGİN (Ankara) - Now, "Your Arnavutköy Municipality sold many immovable properties for the sake of profit." they say.
CAVİT ARI (Antalya) - You turned all the meeting areas into skyscrapers.
ORHAN YEGİN (Ankara) - "Your Arnavutköy Municipality sold many immovable properties for the sake of profit." they say. They have news, but let's ask these friends anyway: Are you aware of the sales of Ankara Metropolitan Municipality?
CAVİT ARI (Antalya) - With what face and shamelessness do you ask? You ruled Istanbul for thirty years, you turned all the gathering areas into skyscrapers, skyscrapers.

ORHAN YEGİN (Ankara) - Do you know how much these sales were, what he did with the money he earned from these sales, what he did not do and what kind of suffering he caused the nation?
EVRİM RIZVANOĞLU (Istanbul) - Everything is money, everything is money!
ORHAN YEGİN (Ankara) - Let's say: This year's budget was 100 billion, if you look at the realization, it will be 85 billion.
NİLGÜN ÖK (Denizli) - What happened to 100 thousand houses, 100 thousand houses?
CAVİT ARI (Antalya) - You have built skyscrapers everywhere, show one meeting area!
ORHAN YEGİN (Ankara) - Friends, the total sales of Ankara Metropolitan Municipality last year alone is 60 billion, 60 billion, approximately as much as its annual budget, and it still receives authorization for 10-15 sales every month.
CAVİT ARI (Antalya) - Thanks to you, there are skyscrapers everywhere, you betrayed Istanbul. You say it yourself, the President says it himself: "We betrayed Istanbul." saying.
ORHAN YEGİN (Ankara) - At this rate, there will be nothing left to sell.
CAVİT ARI (Antalya) - You ruined Istanbul, he is trying to fix it.
ORHAN YEGİN (Ankara) - There is no investment, there is a lot of traffic, there is no water flowing properly from the tap, but there are many concerts. You know, we're talking about housing, you know, you know!
CAVİT ARI (Antalya) - Istanbul is ruined because of you!
CHAIRMAN OF THE SESSION ORHAN ERDEM - After 2 speakers, you too, Mr. Arı.
ŞENGÜL KARSLI (Istanbul) - You cannot cover up the facts by shouting.
ORHAN YEGİN (Ankara) - We were talking about housing. I wish he had kept his promise about housing. "I will build 10 thousand houses with urban transformation." He made the promise.
NİLGÜN ÖK (Denizli) - He promised 100 thousand houses in Istanbul.
ORHAN YEGİN (Ankara) - Ankara.
NİLGÜN ÖK (Denizli) - Oh, Ankara.
ORHAN YEGİN (Ankara) - The tender for the houses was held and they spent a lot of money. Friends, should I tell you the number of houses built in seven years during urban transformation? Would you like to take a guess?
NAİL ÇİLER (Kocaeli) - Well, you couldn't expropriate in Gebze, people died, people. They have been out for a month, no one has claimed them.
ORHAN YEGİN (Ankara) - 418, 418. Be a little embarrassed and sit down! Let's say rounding is 500.
CAVİT ARI (Antalya) - You betrayed Istanbul, you destroyed Istanbul. You destroyed the silhouette of Istanbul and left no gathering space in Istanbul.
ORHAN YEGİN (Ankara) - There was one general manager of the company that won this tender, but now he is the Mayor of Keçiören. You are complaining about the sale of real estate, let me tell you: He is now preparing to sell the Ihlamur Pavilion, Esztergon Castle and Cumhuriyet Castle in Keçiören.
CAVİT ARI (Antalya) - You have erected skyscrapers in all parks and gathering areas. God forbid, if there is a disaster, who will people go to and where will they go?
ORHAN YEGİN (Ankara) - You don't feel embarrassed when you say these words, do you?
CAVİT ARI (Antalya) - You have destroyed all the values ​​of Istanbul!
CHAIRMAN OF THE SESSION ORHAN ERDEM - Dear Arı, please.
ORHAN YEGİN (Ankara) - President.
CHAIRMAN OF THE SESSION ORHAN ERDEM - Friends cannot complete the minutes.
ORHAN YEGİN (Ankara) - Friends, your statements are not consistent. "Energy is expensive, facilities are inadequate, increase capacity." You say, but "We are against hydroelectric power plants, solar power plants and nuclear power plants." You say, "We are against everything." you say.

VELİ AĞBABA (Malatya) - Oh, he is puffing, he does not look at his own mayors and speaks shamelessly!
ORHAN YEGİN (Ankara) - From one side and saying "There is no housing." you say, and on the other hand, "You turned everything into concrete, you didn't leave it green." you add.
CAVİT ARI (Antalya) - That's right, that's exactly what happened.
ORHAN YEGİN (Ankara) - And then people's gardens: "What are these places for? Places to eat cake and roll around." you say. You are making a huge inconsistency. Your face doesn't turn red, and your face doesn't turn red either!
CAVİT ARI (Antalya) - You promised these to people during the election, without blushing, "You will eat cake and roll around." you said.
ORHAN YEGİN (Ankara) - On the one hand, "Deliver the houses as soon as possible." You say, on the other hand, "There are 90 concrete plants in the city." You complain.
CAVİT ARI (Antalya) - "You will eat cake and roll around." You are the one who said.
ORHAN YEGİN (Ankara) - "Build the houses a little further away from the city, traffic increases." You say, but to TOKİ residences in a slightly distant neighborhood you say, "Who will go here, who will buy them?" You are trying to devalue the houses. Friends, what do you say? Your purpose is not understood, what do you say?
NAİL ÇİLER (Kocaeli) - You could not expropriate 70 buildings, please answer this.
ORHAN YEGİN (Ankara) - Now, we hear weird environmentalist talk!
CAVİT ARI (Antalya) - You destroyed Istanbul, the silhouette of Istanbul disappeared thanks to you, the silhouette of Istanbul disappeared because of the skyscrapers.
NİLGÜN ÖK (Denizli) - What did you do with Beylikdüzü? Ekrem İmamoğlu Beylikdüzü.
ORHAN YEGİN (Ankara) - Complaints about air pollution. You would think that they have delivered us a clean air. However, what happened is exactly the opposite, we have brought the weather to a much better place.
CAVİT ARI (Antalya) - You have done a shame, you have sinned against Istanbul, it is a shame! You have ruined Istanbul for thirty years, you have been ruling it for thirty years, we have been trying to fix it for six years.
ORHAN YEGİN (Ankara) - Natural gas, which was previously used in 5 provinces and 50 centers, was transferred from 81 to 850 centers, organized industries and factories.
ŞENGÜL KARSLI (Istanbul) - Why do the facts bother you so much?
CAVİT ARI (Antalya) - We are not disturbed, you are disturbed.
ORHAN YEGİN (Ankara) - All production facilities
We took it and made it possible to use natural gas. Air measurements made at 8 stations before AK PARTY are measured and monitored at more than 400 stations today. Gentlemen, environmentalism does not happen by adding "green" to party names or making judgments from where you sit.
NAİL ÇİLER (Kocaeli) - Dilovası cancer plain!
NERMİN YILDIRIM KARA (Hatay) - Mr. Orhan, at least don't say that, don't say that!
ORHAN YEGİN (Ankara) - There were nearly 150 wastewater facilities, today there are more than 1,200; It used to serve 35 percent of the population, today it serves almost the entire population. What are you talking about? We are rehabilitating streams, we are fighting against desertification and erosion, we are implementing an exemplary practice for the world with the Zero Waste Management System, we are expanding deposit management systems, we are spreading the 82 million square meters of community gardens all over the country, we are increasing the forest existence, friends, the forest existence!

EVRİM RIZVANOĞLU (Istanbul) - You cannot protect the forests, how do you increase them?
ORHAN YEGİN (Ankara) - Planting trees is called "Timber planting that will close the current account deficit." But I don't know if the friends who talk about it will be ashamed.
EVRİM RIZVANOĞLU (Istanbul) - You plant saplings, "We made a forest." you say.
ORHAN YEGİN (Ankara) - Do you know, friends, we are in the top 3 in the world in terms of afforestation rate among the countries that increase their forest assets!
(The microphone was automatically turned off by the device)
CHAIRMAN OF THE SESSION ORHAN ERDEM - I'll give you a minute.
ORHAN YEGİN (Ankara) - We build dams, ponds, we do many more, but they have eyes, they cannot see; What can we do? Our opposition is like this too. In fact, we are faced with such an opposition that "'EIA is hindering our efforts, EIA is no longer required for energy and mining licenses.' You made a change in the law saying " He is either unaware of what has been done or has bad intentions. "In this way, you have made nature vulnerable to all kinds of attacks by all kinds of mining." They said, slandered the law passed by the Parliament and provoked the nation.
NAİL ÇİLER (Kocaeli) - Those olive trees will take their revenge on you.
ORHAN YEGİN (Ankara) - Now, my time is over, there have been many ugly speeches, but it is impossible for us to tolerate or forgive even one of them. Today we were told: "You made up a project to evacuate three Alevi villages." they said. Shame on the owner of this word, this mentality, the owner of this slander and claim.
SEVDA KARACA DEMİR (Gaziantep) - Let us invite you to Çığlık village in Malatya, go and tell them.
ORHAN YEGİN (Ankara) - Friends, you will not be able to achieve your goal.
SEVDA KARACA DEMİR (Gaziantep) - You emptied the village.
ORHAN YEGİN (Ankara) - Even if you crack, explode, tear yourself apart, you will not be able to set this nation against each other.
(The microphone was automatically turned off by the device)

ORHAN YEGİN (Ankara) - President, thank you.

I give TOKİ statistics at these meetings from time to time, TOKİ every year. I worry that the statistics will get old, but I see that they add new statistics every year, thank God.
